name: Derek Kilmer
subject: I will always be thankful for this team.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
I have so much to be grateful for this Thanksgiving season
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73881707/439965661/-2027002553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODQ4MzllOGItNmM4YS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7fNzYpHuP3fRvAfzOsNJqf9huPp8noo0KED4sgsQC6g=&emci=3223cc98-9188-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=84839e8b-6c8a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=3595835)

Peter,

Thanksgiving in the Kilmer household is a mix of family, feasting, and, of course, a little post-dinner football. **But above all, it's about taking a moment to give our thanks.**

I am thankful for the incredible men and women who keep our nation safe. The beauty of our region with places like the Olympic National Park and Puget Sound. The educators who have played a crucial role in my kids' lives. _And I am thankful for you, Peter._

As we gather with loved ones and reflect on the year, I wanted to take a moment to share my deepest gratitude for each and every one of you who have been part of my incredible journey representing Washington's 6th District. It has been an honor and a privilege to serve our community, and I am immensely proud of the work we've accomplished together.

I am especially grateful to everyone who reached out after I announced I would not be seeking re-election in 2024. All the kind words have meant the world, and I want you to know I have cherished the opportunity to serve you.

**This Thanksgiving, thank you for your support, your voices, and for making the work we do together so meaningful.**

As always, it's an honor to represent you,

Derek

* * *
Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
---
People for Derek Kilmer
PO Box 1381
Tacoma, WA 98402
United States
Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot. name: A New Direction
subject: Thank you to you!
body:
[](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xwutdl-dihkkhuuli-r/) Friend,In a year marked by uncertainties and hurdles, your dedication to our community has been a source of inspiration. It is during challenging times that we truly discover the strength within our collective efforts to make a positive impact.Despite the obstacles, we are thankful to live in such a beautiful state, surrounded by individuals who are passionate about creating positive change. Our shared commitment to overcoming challenges and building a better future for all is a testament to the resilience of our community.The opportunity to work alongside you in addressing the issues that matter most to our community is a privilege. Together, we have the power to make a lasting difference and contribute to the ongoing transformation of our state.As we gather with loved ones to celebrate Thanksgiving, let us not only reflect on the obstacles we've faced but also on the progress we've made together. We are grateful for the collaborative spirit that defines our community and for the chance to work side by side with you in the pursuit of a brighter tomorrow. Wishing you and your loved ones a Thanksgiving filled with gratitude, hope, and the warmth of shared moments.Thank you,A New Direction [](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xwutdl-dihkkhuuli-y/)[](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xwutdl-dihkkhuuli-j/)[](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xwutdl-dihkkhuuli-t/)[](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xwutdl-dihkkhuuli-i/) | [Preferences](https://andor.updatemyprofile.com/y-xwutdl-172B6299-dihkkhuuli-d) | [Unsubscribe](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-u-xwutdl-dihkkhuuli-h/)
---

name: Nikki Haley
subject: I promise this is worth it.
body:
It's high time we return to the days when America was STRONG and PROUD.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zaoeu53cnopokpkje7o78h9m98bbhsqc1p4aebuo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3i69p32c9h2bs)
---

Friend,

We're rapidly approaching the end of November...

Which means the time left to reach this month's fundraising goal is just around the corner. I want to reach out to you first because **anything helps, especially when so much is on the line.**

**[Your support today will not only be crucial in helping us reach this month's goal, but it will also play a pivotal role in funding my campaign.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3chfsul42b1qcveherojg0g1h1j80s5d3r69sko_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3i69p32c9h2bs "Your support today will not only be crucial in helping us reach this month’s goal, but it will also play a pivotal role in funding my campaign.")**

**Let me break down a few important things that your donation will help us accomplish:**
* Identify and reach out to voters
* Host town halls, rallies, and events in key states
* Establish a robust campaign infrastructure
* Amplify my message to reach every American
* Build dedicated field teams and hire essential staff

---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8npegqsf2hcielmvch25s0ou1jp057j62ut7s3g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3i69p32c9h2bs)
---
| | [WILL YOU HELP ME REACH MY GOAL?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjhhh8t2ot3mmk7sbt1cnnsmekdga6chfdu9abc8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3i69p32c9h2bs)
---
Friend, it's simple. I am running for president to save our country from the downward spiral of socialism and defeatism.

**It's high time we return to the days when America was STRONG and PROUD.**

America is the greatest nation on earth, but under Biden's failed leadership, we are witnessing a decline in our country.

_Just look_ -> We have too many parents worried that their children won't have a better life than they did. Many families are struggling to afford basic necessities like groceries, and too many small businesses find it increasingly challenging to make ends meet. Our streets are plagued by crime, and our border patrol has been overwhelmed.

As a mother, daughter of legal immigrants, and wife of a combat veteran, I understand the challenges we face. As governor and UN ambassador, I've also seen how we can overcome these challenges.

**[I'm on a mission to save our country's future. But in order to do that, I need your help today. Can I count on you to chip in towards our November monthly fundraising goal?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znbafosps7sp7ltufik1fotaklths3djj58nkgt8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3i69p32c9h2bs "I’m on a mission to save our country's future. But in order to do that, I need your help today. Can I count on you to chip in towards our November monthly fundraising goal?")**

Together, we can strive for a stronger future and ensure our best days are yet to come.

Your support means the world to me.
---

My very best,
---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1rrcabtdqdtqpi4l74hsv4dmolh9ef2c6abb3ug_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3i69p32c9h2bs)
---
Nikki Haley
---
| | [DONATE](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9l078brljcnab96u7nd1o21s6j3c16qmp1t7q3g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3i69p32c9h2bs)
---
| | | | |
---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkc1na2boi7ubl5670uk5b576i7hmhsfrslanufo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3i69p32c9h2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvh9v7gdvd4trcgirlntvcpgttnejbqo0vsj42a8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3i69p32c9h2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za2avfqdbq1ke8a3ul8lkmpo5u9uj0hcr8rbpet0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3i69p32c9h2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z76blhnbrpon236stmorcfhpk8dj49vrv6idpbl8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3i69p32c9h2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

body:

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z44sr78spmvr7epdup06mmli8ssbptaace4hf460_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3h6cor5c5h2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zv8mslnvvh5k9l80uq2k7vjl659ha4esoi6hqvmo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3h6cor5c5h2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5n4iavc5neshlpcrbc3hdf352emlsl4oopieemg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3h6cor5c5h2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zii17bg31bkd66utreon6p6mr1dst77uhosvqpeg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3h6cor5c5h2bs)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I want your opinion on religious liberty
body:
American Cornerstone Institute
We need your voice.

|
---
| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36992%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JGO%2bi5vRJh%2fYQ6jMCMgKFg&sysid=1)
---
| Dear Fellow American,

I am reaching out today because I believe that you, like me, are concerned about the increasing trend of legal persecution against Americans who wish to live their lives according to their faith. Our cornerstones of faith, liberty, community, and life form the bedrock of our great nation, and we need your help to maintain them. [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36993%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OW8oN9rwaEYjWM8xFixUaA&sysid=1) From a high school football coach in Washington who lost his job for praying on the field (KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT), to a Colorado baker hauled through the legal system multiple times for not wanting to bake a cake that violated his religious convictions (MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION), we can't ignore the gradual erosion of religious freedom in America.

That's why I created the American Cornerstone Institute to advocate for commonsense solutions to these issues and to strengthen the bonds that keep our nation united. But we can't do it alone.

**We need your voice.**

I want to personally invite you to participate in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**You can share your thoughts using this secure link:[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36994%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aahI7bnpuRMxtRvNt2f95w&sysid=1)**

Your responses are confidential and will be used solely towards furthering our advocacy efforts.

[Please, take a few minutes of your time to complete the survey.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36905%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=D%2biSKxVtBIZVH%2fR%2fZpgZHw&sysid=1) Your input is vital in helping us understand the scope of these issues and develop impactful strategies to counteract them.

Your opinion truly matters. Together, we can ensure that religious liberty continues to thrive as an integral part of our American society.

For Liberty,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---

---

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Can Pres. Trump count on you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
It would mean so much to both President Trump and me if we could depend on your support today in our mission to save America. Can we rely on you in the next fifteen minutes?

|
---
| | |
_**Friend - I am all in for President Trump.**_

I endorse him wholeheartedly, and believe to my core that we have to make Biden a one-term president.

---
| | | [DONATE TO SPEAKER JOHNSON & PRESIDENT TRUMP ➞](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z24d0r1jf6rv111rprdets3pd2q8kf6ebh5i1d48_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3h6cor5c5h2bs "Generic Button")
---

Under President Trump, we built the greatest economy in U.S. history, took concrete steps to secure our southern border, projected strength abroad, and fought back against the radical Left EVERY DAY **- no matter what they threw at us.**

President Trump made America great again, _and I know we can do it once more._

**[But it will take an army of conservative warriors stepping forward in this fight.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb9qh7392v7nahuhs7rap69bcqmsrqjgvsvjlltg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3h6cor5c5h2bs "But it will take an army of conservative warriors stepping forward in this fight.Democrats are going to call on every big-Liberal donor to keep President Trump OUT of the arena, and we are going to need to have the resources to respond.")

It would mean so much to both President Trump and me if we could depend on your support today in our mission to save America. **[Can we rely on you in the next fifteen minutes?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z62arp9974dvojs8m79bt8s7gj7ma1b6dd0e1ieo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3h6cor5c5h2bs "Can we rely on you in the next fifteen minutes?")**

body:
It would mean so much to both President Trump and me if we could depend on your support today in our mission to save America. Can we rely on you in the next fifteen minutes?

|
---
| | |
_**Friend - I am all in for President Trump.**_

I endorse him wholeheartedly, and believe to my core that we have to make Biden a one-term president.

Under President Trump, we built the greatest economy in U.S. history, took concrete steps to secure our southern border, projected strength abroad, and fought back against the radical Left EVERY DAY **- no matter what they threw at us.**

are going to need to have the resources to respond.")

name: Kash Patel
subject: Truth about January 6
body:
Now, it’s time to hold them accountable. Here’s how:

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z55jul4cfq3btjjplhh46neehc9ooug60710g42o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3h6eoj4cth2bs "Kash Foundation")

Friend,

Nancy Pelosi lied about January 6.

Liz Chaney lied about January 6.

FBI Director Wray lied about January 6.

The entire January 6 commission withheld information from the public showing an entirely different story to the lies they told.

Now, it's time to hold them accountable. Here's how:

**STEP ONE** \- The Kash Foundation will continue our work with whistleblowers in the Deep State to expose corruption and bias as we head into 2024. We cannot let the Deep State interfere with our elections.

**STEP TWO** \- The Kash Foundation will continue to financially support some of the families of January 6th prisoners and those being unfairly prosecuted by the Deep State.

**_So far, we have awarded grants to over 15 individuals with January 6th cases_.**

Here's how you can help:

[Can you send an urgent donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, or even $1,000 to the Kash Foundation to support our mission to defeat the Deep State? Click here to donate >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z228jq40t6438iovnv8i4fge5pd11n15j1jg21g8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3h6eoj4cth2bs "Donate")

Here's why I am uniquely qualified to fight against the government gangsters in charge of our federal government...

I've been unlawfully surveilled by the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. My investigation discovered the FBI's unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it intentionally to get rid of President Trump.

It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are thugs who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news.

And once I found the truth, that's when the spying began...

Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help the America-First movement by offering legal protection to whistleblowers, veterans, and the Jan 6 detainees and their families from these government gangsters.

I founded Kash Foundation to defeat the Deep State by offering financial and legal assistance to America-first patriots, veterans, and some families affected by January 6th.

[Please donate any $250, $100, or any amount today to support our efforts >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z51uprojebkpd1litj4tg5k7s18oklpl44aga4e8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3h6eoj4cth2bs)

[Donate >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z97j4180ie3hpqg8ikftuao5mrutbhnr9ol769l0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3h6eoj4cth2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them under our two-tiered system of justice.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no "deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

This is the battle against the "Lawfare" used by radical leftists in control of the government to hunt down America-first patriots.

It's time to fight back.

**Help me raise $20,000 this month by contributing any amount you can generously afford today. **

[Donate $10 >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4kfml24rvhtbv54g9edhtgnra7vt7c7ugn8mg10_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3h6eoj4cth2bs)

[Donate $100 >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi3o4ulg63m93d4j2q7qrjn1qv89mf43t0tt25so_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3h6eoj4cth2bs)

[Donate $250 >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqf4lecslcj4fua47kc2d533ccen8l65et5c17hg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3h6eoj4cth2bs)

And what I found makes me believe that they did it intentionally to get rid of President Trump. It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are thugs who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news. And once I found the truth, that's when the spying began... Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help the America-First movement by offering legal protection to whistleblowers, veterans, and the Jan 6 detainees and their families from these government gangsters. I founded Kash Foundation to defeat the Deep State by offering financial and legal assistance to America-first patriots, veterans, and some families affected by January 6th. We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them under our two-tiered system of justice. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no "deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. This is the battle against the "Lawfare" used by radical leftists in control of the government to hunt down America-first patriots. It's time to fight back. Help me raise $20,000 this month by contributing any amount you can generously afford today. Thank you for your continued support! We will take our country back. Thank you, Kash Patel The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. Trump Train News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

subject: The American Dream is dead.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Roca for Congress**
body:
And Joe Biden and the Democrats are standing over it with the murder weapon.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5rajdm25tvss8kribtacsl3ujccio7fb7u0ip80_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3h6eoj4cth2bs)
---
**The American Dream is dead.**
And Joe Biden and the Democrats’ fingerprints are all over the crime scene.
_Skyrocketing inflation._
_Record home prices._
_Trillions in debt._
It’s all come crashing down.
**My name is Mariela Roca.** You’ve probably never heard of me, but I’m an Air Force veteran who served our country in Afghanistan.
I’m running for Congress to **bring back the American Dream** that once helped a Hispanic, single mom like me achieve success.
Running for Congress is never something I thought I’d do, but I couldn’t sit and watch as **Biden destroyed our dreams** and replaced them with nightmares.
I will never forgive him.
I’m jumping in to run in the MOST COMPETITIVE district in the entire country.
My district will decide if Republicans keep our majority in the House in 2024 and stop the DISASTROUS Democrat agenda.
It pains me to ask, but the Democrats have amassed millions to OBLITERATE me.
Asking for help is something I never thought I’d do in my life, but right now, your help is my only hope.

name: Nikki Haley
subject: I promise this is worth it.
body:
It's high time we return to the days when America was STRONG and PROUD.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2ucf01ifvks82o7gp8pulhee5c4p57f6he0gpa0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3h6eoj6clh2bs)
---

Friend,

We're rapidly approaching the end of November...

Which means the time left to reach this month's fundraising goal is just around the corner. I want to reach out to you first because **anything helps, especially when so much is on the line.**

**[Your support today will not only be crucial in helping us reach this month's goal, but it will also play a pivotal role in funding my campaign.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfr1fj0vndi2nqp9i443u9i14rj6i7tbh5i5ith8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3h6eoj6clh2bs "Your support today will not only be crucial in helping us reach this month’s goal, but it will also play a pivotal role in funding my campaign.")**

**Let me break down a few important things that your donation will help us accomplish:**
* Identify and reach out to voters
* Host town halls, rallies, and events in key states
* Establish a robust campaign infrastructure
* Amplify my message to reach every American
* Build dedicated field teams and hire essential staff

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp0qisdq9aco4qp8bgtnhn1oq2sn14hklc8c7ge8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3h6eoj6clh2bs)
---
| | [WILL YOU HELP ME REACH MY GOAL?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8c8vjknc02bc4ne1km3qaqgs0s49ra0dkbd69gg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3h6eoj6clh2bs)
---
Friend, it's simple. I am running for president to save our country from the downward spiral of socialism and defeatism.

**It's high time we return to the days when America was STRONG and PROUD.**

America is the greatest nation on earth, but under Biden's failed leadership, we are witnessing a decline in our country.

_Just look_ -> We have too many parents worried that their children won't have a better life than they did. Many families are struggling to afford basic necessities like groceries, and too many small businesses find it increasingly challenging to make ends meet. Our streets are plagued by crime, and our border patrol has been overwhelmed.

As a mother, daughter of legal immigrants, and wife of a combat veteran, I understand the challenges we face. As governor and UN ambassador, I've also seen how we can overcome these challenges.

**[I'm on a mission to save our country's future. But in order to do that, I need your help today. Can I count on you to chip in towards our November monthly fundraising goal?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze8c67hfdl0n021ub9764b7o2n0g1b6pk93sgqeo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3h6eoj6clh2bs "I’m on a mission to save our country's future. But in order to do that, I need your help today. Can I count on you to chip in towards our November monthly fundraising goal?")**

Together, we can strive for a stronger future and ensure our best days are yet to come.

Your support means the world to me.
---

My very best,
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zanv92oep5fhfee5d8r46qgr1g4r5ktgqpkvrn4g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3h6eoj6clh2bs)
---
Nikki Haley
---
| | [DONATE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsq5k81ns2ia7nqr2f1s1evumkc9vca4vffiiac0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3h6eoj6clh2bs)
---
| | | | |
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zufig98oqijjf5fa6ml1eg54kd82hdcc13fkpbfg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3h6eoj6clh2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zant0unc7nf8997skerg09k3u4j222q7j4ngvd9o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3h6eoj6clh2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zab3hl431fqbs5g0blkq4p0sbi9t9f05g2be1d20_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3h6eoj6clh2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp2uoo3h6kbcl7ljm60j59m5okqun5vov6bkipig_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3h6eoj6clh2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zequgpv9jtegsbe7v45isqrhevdubeh5dfjih5m0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3h6eoj6clh2bs "DONATE")
---

[www.TeamStandForAmerica.com](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuu0hd1nckf9nioatm7o82fgov9o3g634k9fda80_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3h6eoj6clh2bs)

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: BREAKING - SkyTree Book Fairs challenges Scholastic’s monopoly
body:
Here’s what we’re up against.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685558%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=j2xQPmKBg7pnWHc5awQTKg&sysid=1 "SkyTree Book Fairs")

Friend,

SkyTree Book Fair and I did a deep dive and discovered the cause of why sexually explicit and disgusting books get into our children’s schools, classrooms, and libraries.

Here’s what we’re up against.

These are books Scholastic promotes at book fairs in schools. Here are pages from “Welcome to St. Hell,” a 2022 Scholastic book glamorizing gender transitioning to middle schoolers. (We’ve censored these pages as the original content could violate social media policies against adult material):

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685559%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uBbnOYj%2frWgyuWebOcPYOg&sysid=1)[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685559%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uBbnOYj%2frWgyuWebOcPYOg&sysid=1)

Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda.

Scholastic promotes this agenda over the well-being of our children.

**Here is the solution:**

SkyTree Book Fair offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda.

Here’s how you can help.

[I am asking for your urgent support to help SkyTree replace Scholastic in schools. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward Sky Tree? We are kicking off with a goal to raise $100,000 this month.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685550%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oGh5YplnKvFDRTlD5eAnng&sysid=1)

[Donate](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685551%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0a6%2fypg%2fcldWdrZl1VoQ7w&sysid=1)

SkyTree was inspired by my first children’s book, As You Grow. Now, I am helping them spread to schools across the country as an alternative to Scholastic. And here’s the thing: SkyTree will not only promote age-appropriate books, but they will do so more efficiently to make it easier for schools to choose SkyTree over Scholastic.

And it’s working!

SkyTree has already secured its first public school book fair in Spotsylvania, VA!

No more race-infused storylines. No more confusing gender content. Only age-appropriate content that will nurture childhood innocence and character.

SkyTree needs your support today. American children need your support today!!

We are quickly lining up hundreds of new book fairs in the Spring semester. It costs roughly $7,500 to host a book fair. Please help sponsor SkyTree book fairs in schools across the country.

[Donate $10 >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685552%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kwxwOcWTU3CFd6n7KJYqeQ&sysid=1)

[Donate $35 >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685553%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GMHcQfFaROrXwS4jM0M%2f%2bA&sysid=1)

[Donate $50 >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685554%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=D5qBecn5r5OPJVlS0Z%2fxhg&sysid=1)

[Donate $100 >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685565%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ub7bQfeyayjsqzdyPek83A&sysid=1)

[Donate $250 >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685566%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JVgYjBQHWGdBQCXnzf%2fyfQ&sysid=1)

[Donate $500 >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685567%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=K7KZOz5ZMBULPhI5ZHNU%2bg&sysid=1)

[Donate $1,000 >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685568%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=khQWT95FBdkI3yUXeQq5cA&sysid=1)

[Donate Any Amount >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685569%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HeR39EuqRafmz92RL4mUqw&sysid=1)

Let’s bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination.

It’s not complicated! It’s what you and I grew up with.

Thank you for helping us offer schools an alternative to Scholastic!

God bless,

Kirk Cameron

P.S. Scholastic’s monopoly on school book fairs has ushered in woke and inappropriate books to kids across the nation.

I’ve partnered with SkyTree Book Fairs to give schools a positive alternative to scholastic.

[Help us raise $100,000 to fund book fairs this spring semester at schools. Click here to donate >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685560%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4UqJywvN4BBTGVRieIPJRA&sysid=1)

A reminder of what we’re up against:

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685561%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=48VR3UbFLe%2b9jWWF5PBDUA&sysid=1)

It's time to fight back.

You and I cannot afford to do nothing and let the woke mob indoctrinate millions of children.

[Click here to donate and help SkyTree change the world.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685562%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tplWi8w%2bCGLe1r%2fGTiNpNw&sysid=1)

**The American Dream is dead.**
And Joe Biden and the Democrats’ fingerprints are all over the crime scene.
_Skyrocketing inflation._
_Record home prices._
_Trillions in debt._
It’s all come crashing down.
**My name is Mariela Roca.** You’ve probably never heard of me, but I’m an Air Force veteran who served our country in Afghanistan.
I’m running for Congress to **bring back the American Dream** that once helped a Hispanic, single mom like me achieve success.
Running for Congress is never something I thought I’d do, but I couldn’t sit and watch as **Biden destroyed our dreams** and replaced them with nightmares.
I will never forgive him.
I’m jumping in to run in the MOST COMPETITIVE district in the entire country.
My district will decide if Republicans keep our majority in the House in 2024 and stop the DISASTROUS Democrat agenda.
It pains me to ask, but the Democrats have amassed millions to OBLITERATE me.
Asking for help is something I never thought I’d do in my life, but right now, your help is my only hope.

name: Indiana Republican Party
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
|
---
# **A Message from the Chairwoman**
---
| | ** _Happy Thanksgiving!_**
---
Friends, As we enjoy this Thanksgiving weekend there is a great deal for which to be thankful. With your help, we have accomplished so much this year including winning seventy-six mayors offices statewide, which is a new record! After all of your hard work, please take this weekend to find time with family and friends to relax and be thankful for all our blessings. Thank you for all you do to make our party and our state second to none. Happy Thanksgiving!
---
---
Chairwoman Anne F. Hathaway
---
| |
# **Governor Eric Holcomb's Week in Review**
---
| |
# _Gov. Holcomb Celebrates the Indiana State Poultry Association’s Generosity _
---
---
| | [Governor Eric Holcomb](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/ca588037bc28b19c3947229f28c3afba/40da5ec804aa13dfc3d6b838967d376c/40313) welcomed the Indiana State Poultry Association at the Statehouse this week, to celebrate their generous contributions to families in need during the holiday season. The Indiana Poultry Association received donations from farmers across the state for their 76th annual donation. This year, Indiana poultry farmers contributed over 200,000 pounds of poultry and 172,000 eggs. **What he’s saying** : “Today I was proud to have joined members of the #Indiana State Poultry Association at their 76th annual poultry donation in the Statehouse. #Hoosier farmers are known not only for their work ethic but also their generosity. #NextLevelIndiana”, **Gov. Holcomb** tweeted following the association's attendance at the Statehouse. **What else happened this week? Gov. Holcomb** returned home from his trip to Kenya with the First Lady and Indiana Adjutant General, Maj. Gen. Dale Lyles, where he [shared a Thanksgiving meal](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/ca588037bc28b19c3947229f28c3afba/40f09ba1229d03e0c3d6b838967d376c/40313) with Hoosier National Guard soldiers serving overseas.
* To stay up-to-date, follow **Gov. Holcomb** on [Facebook](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/ca588037bc28b19c3947229f28c3afba/2700a7636274261fc3d6b838967d376c/40313) or [Twitter](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/ca588037bc28b19c3947229f28c3afba/557e60e9fd97fb57c3d6b838967d376c/40313).

---
| |
# **Notable and Newsworthy**
---
| |
# 📰 FOX59 News: These are the Safest Suburbs in Indiana
---
_[From FOX59 News](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/ca588037bc28b19c3947229f28c3afba/8679c4e805b4b42ec3d6b838967d376c/40313) _ From FOX59 News: "Indiana suburbs rounded out the top-five safest, with Carmel ranking second overall, and Fishers and Noblesville in fourth and fifth places.” The 5 safest suburbs in the U.S. according to SmartAsset are: 1\. Great Falls, Virginia 2\. Carmel, Indiana 3\. Bethesda, Maryland 4\. Fishers, Indiana 5\. Noblesville, Indiana
"Furthermore, Indiana’s top entries were also listed as the most affordable of the safest suburbs, with Carmel, Fishers and Noblesville — in that order — taking the top spots. Brownsburg, which was listed in the ranking as the 24th safest suburb in the country, also made the top 10 most affordable." ❗These are the type of results we can continue to expect from Republican leadership in Indiana’s localities, and why we were so successful in electing Republicans in 2023!
---
| |
# Indy Star: Jensen: Being an elected official means being accountable
---
_[From The Indy Star](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/ca588037bc28b19c3947229f28c3afba/1d56dc0fd31531b2c3d6b838967d376c/40313) _ Noblesville Mayor Chris Jensen leads the way in government transparency, sharing his cell phone number in an opinion editorial with the Indy Star. “I share this because, as the Mayor of Noblesville, I give my number to city residents daily as we work together to answer questions or solve problems. I may not always know the answer, but I can find out who does. It is one of the ways I stay connected to the people I serve.” In his op-ed, Mayor Jensen shared details about his city’s new program NobleAct. “In Noblesville, for instance, we realized that our first responders were spending an increasing amount of time addressing mental health challenges — impacting public safety. That’s why we created NobleAct, a proactive mental health crisis and substance abuse response program in collaboration with our police and fire departments. This unique program allows police officers, community paramedics and mental health clinicians to provide linkage to community services and divert those in crisis away from the criminal justice system.”
---
| | |
---
# 📱 _News You Can Use_

---
**Governor Eric Holcomb**[returned](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/ca588037bc28b19c3947229f28c3afba/ddcae7aef8a1a9adc3d6b838967d376c/40313) home from his trip to Kenya with the First Lady and Indiana Adjutant General, Maj. Gen. Dale Lyles, where they shared a Thanksgiving meal with Hoosier National Guard soldiers serving overseas. **Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch **[announced](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/ca588037bc28b19c3947229f28c3afba/fac0c04a20f46acdc3d6b838967d376c/40313) an historic investment for affordable housing. **Secretary Diego Morales**[congratulates](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/ca588037bc28b19c3947229f28c3afba/12350ae6d68455fec3d6b838967d376c/40313) State Senator Mike Gaskill on his appointment as chair of the Senate Committee on Elections. **Attorney General Todd Rokita **and team [obtained](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/ca588037bc28b19c3947229f28c3afba/41e12aff9f61e39ac3d6b838967d376c/40313) $690,000 for Indiana in settlement over data security incidents. **Treasurer Daniel Elliot**[celebrated](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/ca588037bc28b19c3947229f28c3afba/e5443bbba6eedfb2c3d6b838967d376c/40313) our nation’s veterans. **Senator Todd Young**[shared](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/ca588037bc28b19c3947229f28c3afba/df6fe0f0983c31fdc3d6b838967d376c/40313) Hoosier candy with the U.S. Senate. **Senator Mike Braun**[embraced](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/ca588037bc28b19c3947229f28c3afba/dbc7206d19f54955c3d6b838967d376c/40313) artificial intelligence. **Congressman Rudy Yakym**[published](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/ca588037bc28b19c3947229f28c3afba/76f4a3c047f81ac8c3d6b838967d376c/40313) and op-ed on how the Budget Process Reform Task Force they launched last week will help fix Washington’s broken budget process. **Congressman Jim Banks**[visited](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/ca588037bc28b19c3947229f28c3afba/ea0622efaa3cc933c3d6b838967d376c/40313) Hoosier members of the National Guard in Kenya**.** **Congressman Jim Baird's**[held](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/ca588037bc28b19c3947229f28c3afba/e849c3be307a624ec3d6b838967d376c/40313) an agriculture roundtable**.** **Congresswoman Victoria Spartz**[attended](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/ca588037bc28b19c3947229f28c3afba/635073f038a06751c3d6b838967d376c/40313) the OSCE Parliamentary Assembly Autumn Meeting in Armenia to discuss regional and international security challenges, and met with refugees. **Congressman Greg Pence**[honored](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/ca588037bc28b19c3947229f28c3afba/093bc22aa9ccfae3c3d6b838967d376c/40313) our nation’s veterans. **Congressman clean_body: | | | | A Message from the Chairwoman | | Happy Thanksgiving! Friends, As we enjoy this Thanksgiving weekend there is a great deal for which to be thankful. With your help, we have accomplished so much this year including winning seventy-six mayors offices statewide, which is a new record! After all of your hard work, please take this weekend to find time with family and friends to relax and be thankful for all our blessings. Thank you for all you do to make our party and our state second to none. Happy Thanksgiving! Chairwoman Anne F. Hathaway | | Governor Eric Holcomb's Week in Review | | Gov. Holcomb Celebrates the Indiana State Poultry Association’s Generosity | | welcomed the Indiana State Poultry Association at the Statehouse this week, to celebrate their generous contributions to families in need during the holiday season. The Indiana Poultry Association received donations from farmers across the state for their 76th annual donation. This year, Indiana poultry farmers contributed over 200,000 pounds of poultry and 172,000 eggs. What he’s saying : “Today I was proud to have joined members of the #Indiana State Poultry Association at their 76th annual poultry donation in the Statehouse. #Hoosier farmers are known not only for their work ethic but also their generosity. #NextLevelIndiana”, Gov. Holcomb tweeted following the association's attendance at the Statehouse. What else happened this week? Gov. Holcomb returned home from his trip to Kenya with the First Lady and Indiana Adjutant General, Maj. Gen. Dale Lyles, where he with Hoosier National Guard soldiers serving overseas. To stay up-to-date, follow Gov. Holcomb on or . | | Notable and Newsworthy | | 📰 FOX59 News: These are the Safest Suburbs in Indiana From FOX59 News: "Indiana suburbs rounded out the top-five safest, with Carmel ranking second overall, and Fishers and Noblesville in fourth and fifth places.” The 5 safest suburbs in the U.S. according to SmartAsset are: 1\. Great Falls, Virginia 2\. Carmel, Indiana 3\. Bethesda, Maryland 4\. Fishers, Indiana 5\. Noblesville, Indiana "Furthermore, Indiana’s top entries were also listed as the most affordable of the safest suburbs, with Carmel, Fishers and Noblesville — in that order — taking the top spots. Brownsburg, which was listed in the ranking as the 24th safest suburb in the country, also made the top 10 most affordable." ❗These are the type of results we can continue to expect from Republican leadership in Indiana’s localities, and why we were so successful in electing Republicans in 2023! | | Indy Star: Jensen: Being an elected official means being accountable Noblesville Mayor Chris Jensen leads the way in government transparency, sharing his cell phone number in an opinion editorial with the Indy Star. “I share this because, as the Mayor of Noblesville, I give my number to city residents daily as we work together to answer questions or solve problems. I may not always know the answer, but I can find out who does. It is one of the ways I stay connected to the people I serve.” In his op-ed, Mayor Jensen shared details about his city’s new program NobleAct. “In Noblesville, for instance, we realized that our first responders were spending an increasing amount of time addressing mental health challenges — impacting public safety. That’s why we created NobleAct, a proactive mental health crisis and substance abuse response program in collaboration with our police and fire departments. This unique program allows police officers, community paramedics and mental health clinicians to provide linkage to community services and divert those in crisis away from the criminal justice system.” | | | 📱 News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb home from his trip to Kenya with the First Lady and Indiana Adjutant General, Maj. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I want your opinion on religious liberty
body:
American Cornerstone Institute
We need your voice.

|
---
| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2znj40palbnikpcqv3pp9hrp1bh0t1jhnq8gqv930_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3j60o72c3h2bs)
---
| Dear Fellow American,

I am reaching out today because I believe that you, like me, are concerned about the increasing trend of legal persecution against Americans who wish to live their lives according to their faith. Our cornerstones of faith, liberty, community, and life form the bedrock of our great nation, and we need your help to maintain them. [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z055ehqu7hsou3ksah4585qkrsnsvt2ectb4f7ig_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3j60o72c3h2bs) From a high school football coach in Washington who lost his job for praying on the field (KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT), to a Colorado baker hauled through the legal system multiple times for not wanting to bake a cake that violated his religious convictions (MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION), we can't ignore the gradual erosion of religious freedom in America.

That's why I created the American Cornerstone Institute to advocate for commonsense solutions to these issues and to strengthen the bonds that keep our nation united. But we can't do it alone.

**We need your voice.**

I want to personally invite you to participate in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**You can share your thoughts using this secure link:[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2znu055uj6mjacmolmtfno6v5hmlmhut1uar5kjs8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3j60o72c3h2bs)**

Your responses are confidential and will be used solely towards furthering our advocacy efforts.

[Please, take a few minutes of your time to complete the survey.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zr3l0vo4u9dkbddh1qr3khjf8u28rgtnechgc55g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3j60o72c3h2bs) Your input is vital in helping us understand the scope of these issues and develop impactful strategies to counteract them.

Your opinion truly matters. Together, we can ensure that religious liberty continues to thrive as an integral part of our American society.

For Liberty,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

for a bail fund seeking to help free illegal immigrants from
detention, according to the fund’s donation page. Donations for the

according to the bail fund’s donation page.

CARRIE SHEFFIELD: Give Thanks — Even In The Most Troubling Of Times

Sunday was the 160th anniversary of the Gettysburg Address, the
bloodiest battle of the Civil War and a slumping loss for the Union
that enabled the Confederate army’s northward advance. Gettysburg has
a fascinating Thanksgiving connection.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I want your opinion on religious liberty
body:
American Cornerstone Institute
We need your voice.

|
---
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlc2b8vs43l763falfcs4vuevei7g0k7k482dncg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3j60o77chh2bs)
---
| Dear Fellow American,

I am reaching out today because I believe that you, like me, are concerned about the increasing trend of legal persecution against Americans who wish to live their lives according to their faith. Our cornerstones of faith, liberty, community, and life form the bedrock of our great nation, and we need your help to maintain them. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc4b1vgtgi3p8m6979pb5u4t2avb5s2u7o6algro_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3j60o77chh2bs) From a high school football coach in Washington who lost his job for praying on the field (KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT), to a Colorado baker hauled through the legal system multiple times for not wanting to bake a cake that violated his religious convictions (MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION), we can't ignore the gradual erosion of religious freedom in America.

That's why I created the American Cornerstone Institute to advocate for commonsense solutions to these issues and to strengthen the bonds that keep our nation united. But we can't do it alone.

**We need your voice.**

I want to personally invite you to participate in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**You can share your thoughts using this secure link:[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9bds374ov7p9fjp15u2vdgi9k1ggdf9duppnmko_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3j60o77chh2bs)**

Your responses are confidential and will be used solely towards furthering our advocacy efforts.

[Please, take a few minutes of your time to complete the survey.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4l1kpdopa8k7bqlfjsk9jfb75qj0sog5t8vevdg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3j60o77chh2bs) Your input is vital in helping us understand the scope of these issues and develop impactful strategies to counteract them.

Your opinion truly matters. Together, we can ensure that religious liberty continues to thrive as an integral part of our American society.

For Liberty,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

| | | | | Peter, Never in my wildest dreams did I expect to be the Republican Party’s favorite punching bag for insults and attacks. But if investigating Donald Trump for his attempts to overturn the election and incite an insurrection makes me a “Wild-eyed conspiracy nut,” as Tucker Carlson called me, so be it. If investigating and impeaching Donald Trump means Kevin McCarthy calling me a liar and kicking me off the Intelligence Committee, so be it. And if Donald Trump himself wants to call me “shifty Schiff” or a “sleaze bag” for holding him to account again (and again, and again), so be it. I wear their enmity as a badge of honor. The insults and attacks show that they’re terrified of how effective I’ve been — and I’m not letting my foot off the gas when it comes to defending our democracy from MAGA extremists like Trump, Carlson, McCarthy, or anyone else. | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We're in the fight of our lives to save America, and it's a fight we can't win without YOU! Turning Point Action is leading the Right with CHASE THE VOTE, our innovative ballot-chasing strategy to ensure EVERY Conservative in a battleground state VOTES.

For years, the radical Left has beaten us in the ballot game. As recently as the 2022 Election, there was hope for even more Conservative victories ... but not enough ballots from Conservative voters were cast and delivered. That's why, despite conservative majorities in battleground states like Arizona, Georgia, and Wisconsin, we didn't secure the victories we needed. But we learned -- and now, with YOUR support, Turning Point Action is determined to make a difference and get out the vote to WIN BIG in 2024. [**Turning Point Action's CHASE THE VOTE Initiative can be a GAME-CHANGER for the Right, but only if I can count on grassroots patriots like YOU for support.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7csdrdmdcb2p0k8ho4ri0sdrrlh5uatmua7pnqg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30c3j62ob2c1h2bs)

For America, Charlie Kirk Founder Turning Point Action

name: Chuck Hand
subject: I’m not apologizing for January 6, and here’s why…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHUCK HAND FOR GEORGIA
body:
I went inside the US Capitol to support President Trump.

188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/hzgOsrigmYVsysej5Y1oYw~~/AARclAA~)
---
| Fellow Patriot,
**I went inside the US Capitol on January 6, 2021...** to support President Trump and stand up for fair elections in this country.
I was sentenced to**30 days in federal prison** on a petty misdemeanor charge for "picketing" because of it.
(10 of those days, I even spent in solitary confinement, because I refused to take the Covid shot.)
**But I don 't regret one single minute of it,** because I know that standing for what's right is ALWAYS the right thing to do...no matter what.
I'm running for Congress because I think our nation would be a hell of a lot better off if politicians in Washington _actually stood with and stood by their principles._
My name is Chuck Hand and I'm writing to you today because **[I've been told you're the kind of person who's always ready to help a real conservative fight for this country.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/hzgOsrigmYVsysej5Y1oYw~~/AARclAA~)**
**[Could you pitch in just a couple bucks to help me launch my campaign for Congress...](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/hzgOsrigmYVsysej5Y1oYw~~/AARclAA~)** and help me _finally_ give a real voice to the working men and women that make up this nation?
**[Donate here if you can. A couple bucks would be a huge help.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/hzgOsrigmYVsysej5Y1oYw~~/AARclAA~)**
As you can guess, we have **_zero_** support from the GOP Establishment and a whole lot of big guns pointed at us from the Far-Left.
I'd say they're treating me like a joke...that they don't _really_ think a guy who works in construction in one of the poorest districts in America has a snowball's chance in hell...
**_...but they know better._**
After the last few years of conservative wins,**they _absolutely_ believe a Trump-loving, conservative-thinking "deplorable" like me can win. ** That's why they're already firing everything they've got at me. | | | | [STAND WITH ME IN THIS FIGHT!](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/hzgOsrigmYVsysej5Y1oYw~~/AARclAA~)
---
They know that, when I make it to Washington, I'm going to be the biggest headache they've ever seen...

...because I'll force the Establishment to **look straight in the eye** with the American majority they've been screwing over for decades.

They don't want you to have a voice, ever again. **I _refuse_ to be silent.**

But making it to Washington is tough as hell for people like you and me...and **I can only win if I can depend on your help.**

I know times are tight, and I know you're just hearing from me for the first time.

But if you think we need more people like me in Washington, **[I hope you'll pitch in even just a dollar or two to help me prove that I can win this thing.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/hzgOsrigmYVsysej5Y1oYw~~/AARclAA~)**

**[Make your donation using this secure link.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/hzgOsrigmYVsysej5Y1oYw~~/AARclAA~)**

I appreciate all your help, and I can't wait to win this fight with you.

Thanks,

Chuck

PAID FOR BY CHUCK HAND FOR GEORGIA
---

US Conservative Network
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/db4f9OauSEg3Okponr5_hw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnQwL4P0RfaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQudXNjb25zZXJ2YXRpdmVuZXR3b3JrLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1EYWlseS1BbGVydHMmZT1kcHdpbGxpczY3JTI1NDBnbWFpbC5jb21XA3NwY0IKZV_IcGBlhVq7vlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/G5B2kxmWkc76XggtmgbdTQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnQwL4P0QuaHR0cHM6Ly91c2NvbnNlcnZhdGl2ZW5ldHdvcmsuY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgplX8hwYGWFWru-UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

name: Mike Johnson
subject: Let me introduce myself
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
I believe to my core that the most important things in life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the values that guide me and shape my life.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
|
[ ](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xE-hlGuAq7DdIu34w5_JSw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnQwQGP0SaaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9taWtlam9obnNvbi9iaW8tcGEtcj9zYz0yMDIzMTAyNl9NSk9ITlNPTl9FRV9QQV9CSU9fUkVWX0FGUiZ1dG1fdGM9QUZSLTIwMjMxMTI0JnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cmV2JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWJpb1cDc3BjQgplX89wYGVPEoJPUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
Fellow American,

The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them.

**Faith.** Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

**Family.** Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way.

**Freedom.** It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I’ve devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress.

[**This is a simple truth:**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xE-hlGuAq7DdIu34w5_JSw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnQwQGP0SaaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9taWtlam9obnNvbi9iaW8tcGEtcj9zYz0yMDIzMTAyNl9NSk9ITlNPTl9FRV9QQV9CSU9fUkVWX0FGUiZ1dG1fdGM9QUZSLTIwMjMxMTI0JnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cmV2JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWJpb1cDc3BjQgplX89wYGVPEoJPUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are!

[** SUPPORT MIKE JOHNSON > **](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xE-hlGuAq7DdIu34w5_JSw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnQwQGP0SaaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9taWtlam9obnNvbi9iaW8tcGEtcj9zYz0yMDIzMTAyNl9NSk9ITlNPTl9FRV9QQV9CSU9fUkVWX0FGUiZ1dG1fdGM9QUZSLTIwMjMxMTI0JnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cmV2JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWJpb1cDc3BjQgplX89wYGVPEoJPUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

Right now in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness.**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It’s the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

[**Today, to continue to help lead this critical fight, I need your financial support – to restore our country and defend our values. Can you make a donation immediately?**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xE-hlGuAq7DdIu34w5_JSw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnQwQGP0SaaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9taWtlam9obnNvbi9iaW8tcGEtcj9zYz0yMDIzMTAyNl9NSk9ITlNPTl9FRV9QQV9CSU9fUkVWX0FGUiZ1dG1fdGM9QUZSLTIwMjMxMTI0JnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cmV2JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWJpb1cDc3BjQgplX89wYGVPEoJPUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

[** DONATE TO SAVE AMERICA > **](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xE-hlGuAq7DdIu34w5_JSw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnQwQGP0SaaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9taWtlam9obnNvbi9iaW8tcGEtcj9zYz0yMDIzMTAyNl9NSk9ITlNPTl9FRV9QQV9CSU9fUkVWX0FGUiZ1dG1fdGM9QUZSLTIwMjMxMTI0JnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cmV2JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWJpb1cDc3BjQgplX89wYGVPEoJPUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we’re running out of time. I’m not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. [**We simply must make a change before it’s too late.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xE-hlGuAq7DdIu34w5_JSw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnQwQGP0SaaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9taWtlam9obnNvbi9iaW8tcGEtcj9zYz0yMDIzMTAyNl9NSk9ITlNPTl9FRV9QQV9CSU9fUkVWX0FGUiZ1dG1fdGM9QUZSLTIwMjMxMTI0JnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cmV2JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWJpb1cDc3BjQgplX89wYGVPEoJPUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and for Louisiana, and I intend to keep that promise. It’s why I have been a trusted ally of President Donald Trump, who selected me for critical positions and endorsed all of my campaigns. It’s also why I was elected by my colleagues to serve as Vice Chairman of the House Republican Conference – one of seven elected leadership positions for Republicans in the House – and to chair the Subcommittee on the Constitution and Civil Liberties in the prestigious Judiciary Committee.

We are working in Congress every day to defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom, [**but we cannot do it alone.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xE-hlGuAq7DdIu34w5_JSw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnQwQGP0SaaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9taWtlam9obnNvbi9iaW8tcGEtcj9zYz0yMDIzMTAyNl9NSk9ITlNPTl9FRV9QQV9CSU9fUkVWX0FGUiZ1dG1fdGM9QUZSLTIwMjMxMTI0JnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cmV2JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWJpb1cDc3BjQgplX89wYGVPEoJPUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

[**If you are committed to keeping the House from the radical Democrats who are self-serving and want to turn America into a socialist country, then I need your support today.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xE-hlGuAq7DdIu34w5_JSw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnQwQGP0SaaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9taWtlam9obnNvbi9iaW8tcGEtcj9zYz0yMDIzMTAyNl9NSk9ITlNPTl9FRV9QQV9CSU9fUkVWX0FGUiZ1dG1fdGM9QUZSLTIwMjMxMTI0JnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cmV2JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWJpb1cDc3BjQgplX89wYGVPEoJPUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

[** CHIP IN > **](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xE-hlGuAq7DdIu34w5_JSw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnQwQGP0SaaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9taWtlam9obnNvbi9iaW8tcGEtcj9zYz0yMDIzMTAyNl9NSk9ITlNPTl9FRV9QQV9CSU9fUkVWX0FGUiZ1dG1fdGM9QUZSLTIwMjMxMTI0JnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cmV2JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWJpb1cDc3BjQgplX89wYGVPEoJPUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

The path we’re on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still have the ability to turn this country around-- IF conscientious conservatives across America will stand up RIGHT NOW.

We MUST act, and we must do so today.

[**Can you pitch in right now to help save our country, Fellow American?**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xE-hlGuAq7DdIu34w5_JSw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnQwQGP0SaaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9taWtlam9obnNvbi9iaW8tcGEtcj9zYz0yMDIzMTAyNl9NSk9ITlNPTl9FRV9QQV9CSU9fUkVWX0FGUiZ1dG1fdGM9QUZSLTIwMjMxMTI0JnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cmV2JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWJpb1cDc3BjQgplX89wYGVPEoJPUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

Thank you for all you do, and God bless.

[ ](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xE-hlGuAq7DdIu34w5_JSw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnQwQGP0SaaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9taWtlam9obnNvbi9iaW8tcGEtcj9zYz0yMDIzMTAyNl9NSk9ITlNPTl9FRV9QQV9CSU9fUkVWX0FGUiZ1dG1fdGM9QUZSLTIwMjMxMTI0JnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cmV2JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWJpb1cDc3BjQgplX89wYGVPEoJPUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

| **_MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

[**WILL YOU STAND WITH MIKE?**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xE-hlGuAq7DdIu34w5_JSw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnQwQGP0SaaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9taWtlam9obnNvbi9iaW8tcGEtcj9zYz0yMDIzMTAyNl9NSk9ITlNPTl9FRV9QQV9CSU9fUkVWX0FGUiZ1dG1fdGM9QUZSLTIwMjMxMTI0JnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cmV2JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWJpb1cDc3BjQgplX89wYGVPEoJPUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

We MUST act, and we must do so today. ~~ Thank you for all you do, and God bless. ~~ Mike Johnson Speaker of the House | MIKE JOHNSON * Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. ~~ | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA American Freedom Report PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 ~ | ~~_

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=f91acf8dd07019c207d97d6f7afa00f24ced1dfcca19ef31b4adcc210d1681e3a6a8355ee73f28991e461a34d97413b769aa2f95974c8c767593fd744ba57eda

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=f91acf8dd07019c207d97d6f7afa00f24ced1dfcca19ef31b4adcc210d1681e3a6a8355ee73f28991e461a34d97413b769aa2f95974c8c767593fd744ba57eda

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
