body:
Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=47f85f58f91245ae9dc4831e565d8f1b&_e=EcZqxEof2nAF6qnst3x6978uU8nh5cBrjxdetzMmc9SzdPEX6SLXeEamiK3FeVJvJ5exggQenjv6tAqgR7r6_bvwnfjUvSExBq8ohZR7Whjvi1rRx0_Hdo4kSadDNuzAKUQJz8VQc80snFbB-UbUjaPn8rIRX-T_0CK1snd_xrAN6moWLs1wB9lfBSIbQs3gVo4XvoPJcMfFgjB_G0uiYYi8zQILSSzQ07-DiJPYza0asgG1-w6AQ1-fvmad2TeqZNlxmcc9hQx1OUyktS9SrrnkC5rRlSzZHEuNVujgbJPzDXepo1we2oVxqICBHRAw) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=47f85f58f91245ae9dc4831e565d8f1b&_e=EcZqxEof2nAF6qnst3x6978uU8nh5cBrjxdetzMmc9SzdPEX6SLXeEamiK3FeVJvJ5exggQenjv6tAqgR7r6_bvwnfjUvSExBq8ohZR7Whjvi1rRx0_Hdo4kSadDNuzAKUQJz8VQc80snFbB-UbUjX1QBNgPIvh2i3eNYUv1WoxFxfv2yWIuFiL2Nfl5RC-p5DXG_eBIcr75bcJCCP4PsXYnsNTQ6dq6mlkrYgMZIKkKTl9-hsKmQcRoiyP1SESmMcwnfkrEhWKC74zJeeA_yVqirMd9T9xBHTIpPUqH7w4bgBvgP-vO5LhBZUoe4bpl) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=47f85f58f91245ae9dc4831e565d8f1b&_e=EcZqxEof2nAF6qnst3x6978uU8nh5cBrjxdetzMmc9SzdPEX6SLXeEamiK3FeVJvJ5exggQenjv6tAqgR7r6_bvwnfjUvSExBq8ohZR7Whjvi1rRx0_Hdo4kSadDNuzAKUQJz8VQc80snFbB-UbUjdDmyxDyceLJXTamACec3QNluQuMtpXbfhCaMR3uB0bd2BUzSf1KxmMzxzZXC9sd2j8jkqIBqTREJbPoX0yam5CpsEqIaX7CfQhQwHWz8NVJV0IzNWeRoMyP10hIE8Ubk72ZyEL_fqESexbQZYjvIOSmcyDXoJu04w4NLLbkOMUF). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=47f85f58f91245ae9dc4831e565d8f1b&_e=EcZqxEof2nAF6qnst3x6978uU8nh5cBrjxdetzMmc9SzdPEX6SLXeEamiK3FeVJvJ5exggQenjv6tAqgR7r6_bvwnfjUvSExBq8ohZR7Whjvi1rRx0_Hdo4kSadDNuzAKUQJz8VQc80snFbB-UbUjdwXf5UQlZvmNIRXIhQ3Yn6m0pPAfwCBQXgLwfZcqhTrGJ_Arpjb3xujlkjKs-sR2FjgwO5dNjVY9VzrC24-kylhES67I02zkeU2_cACjm5MVp-kVIicx305HnhCczg-rz7JbitUoqAm6YBr1PAWVWaEfKnf4daCl6HGRbv9MkGP)

Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. And then BOOM! Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out. Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. But that's not why this generator is going viral... National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months! Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, "Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse." Despite this clear and present danger... Our Government is Woefully Unprepared They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator. Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and without gas, fumes or noise. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the . THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever. And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on Fox & Friends... And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now. Demand is surging... "It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE." Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

I endorse him wholeheartedly, and believe to my core that we have to make Biden a one-term president.

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Orphaned bear cubs are starving and alone
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **Dear Friend,** | **Bear cubs can’t survive without their mothers. Donate $27 today and help protect wildlife and our planet from irreversible damage.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2141696?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2141697?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2141698?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2141699?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
As snow begins to fall this winter, **it could be splattered red with the blood of helpless mama bears.**
Frail and weak, they wander from their dens in search of nutrition for their babies. But with one bullet, the trophy hunters hiding in the trees could leave these helpless cubs orphaned. Without their mother, they’ll be left to starve, freeze, or meet the same fate at the hands of a trophy hunter. [**We can’t let bear families die like this. Donate $27 today and help protect our nation’s wildlife and the planet before it’s too late!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2141700?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
Hunting season is in full swing, Friend. Trophy hunters are killing black bears in the most brutal ways imaginable. They resort to _**painful metal clamps,**_ leaving bears reeling for days on end. _**Hunting dogs**_ are released to chase down bears in an unfair fight. In some places, hunters go so far as to _**dynamite bear dens**_ while they sleep!
Not even grizzly bears are safe from the slaughter. That’s because trophy hunters and Big Polluters are teaming up to strip away the protections that keep them safe. With grizzlies out of the way, these greedy interests would have free rein to ravage the land for profit. Mining, logging, and other planet-destroying practices could soon take over. Is that the world you want to see, Friend? Me neither. That’s why I need you to step up now and stand up to the greedy interests hoping to harm our planet for profit!
[](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2141701?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
**Grizzly bears must be protected at all costs. Donate $27 to Friends of the Earth today to help protect wildlife and our planet!**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2141696?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2141697?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2141698?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2141699?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
In 2016, critical Endangered Species Act (ESA) protections for grizzlies were rolled back. That’s why now in several states, the horrific and tortuous hunting methods I mentioned above are 100% legal. But it doesn’t end there. **Extremist lawmakers are getting even more aggressive with proposing anti-bear laws, putting these vulnerable animals at even greater risk of extinction.**
As you read this, corrupt politicians are working with hunting lobbyists and special interests to try and remove even more life-saving ESA protections from grizzly bears. But if they succeed, **grizzlies could be pushed past the point of no return.**
You see, grizzly bears once numbered 50,000 in the continental U.S. But human impact decimated their population. Hunting, trapping, and habitat loss put grizzlies at serious risk. That’s why they received protections under the Endangered Species Act.
But even with protections, grizzlies are still struggling to survive. Their habitat is shrinking. Their food sources are increasingly hard to find. And climate change is driving them closer to the brink. As a result, fewer and fewer cubs are surviving to reach adulthood. And adult bears are dying at alarming rates, too. That’s why we can’t let greedy interests slash the few protections that are still keeping grizzlies safe.
**Protect our nation's wildlife and the planet from greedy interests before the loss is too great. Rush your $27 donation now!**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2141696?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2141697?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2141698?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2141699?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
What you may not know is that grizzlies help keep our planet healthy! These intelligent animals keep prey populations in check. That allows other plant and animal species to thrive. What’s more, grizzlies roam far and wide, enriching soils and transporting vital nutrients as they go. But it doesn’t end there -- scientists are continuously discovering more and more ways grizzlies play an important part in their ecosystems.
That’s why we have to protect these bears at all costs. And that means protecting the Endangered Species Act. These vital laws don’t just protect bears, though. They provide critical protection for America’s iconic animal species. They’re also some of our most effective safeguards in the fight to protect our public lands and curb catastrophic climate change.
Yet, trophy hunters and Big Polluters think it’s more important to kill for fun and put our planet in danger. All for the sake of profit. Plain and simple, the inhumane treatment of bears and their cubs can’t continue. One bullet doesn’t just kill a mother bear. It means her cubs will be left to die as well. And if bears are wiped out, their lands will be ravaged for profit, too.
I need you in this fight if our nation’s wildlife and the planet are going to stand a chance. Your membership support to Friends of the Earth today will allow us to take a stand against private interests who want to hunt down vulnerable species, wreak havoc on their environments, and are contributing to the ecological destruction on our planet. Join the fight for our planet and precious wildlife before the loss is too great, and make your $27 membership contribution today!
**Bear cubs may soon be left to starve or freeze to death. Protect wildlife and our planet and donate $27 today!**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2141696?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2141697?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2141698?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2141699?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Raena Garcia
Senior fossil fuels and lands campaigner,
Friends of the Earth**
|

Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](http://foe.org/about-us/contact/)

name: The Flyover
subject: A Fiery Train Wreck in Kentucky, Black Friday Steals, and the Mystery of D.B. Cooper
body:
A train carrying molten sulfur derailed in Kentucky yesterday, starting a blaze that took hours for specialized crews to put out, and Governor Andy Beshear declared a state of emergency in response.

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1971, a man using the alias of Dan Cooper hijacked a commercial airliner and [parachuted out](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz79ugzAQgPGnsTeQ73yYMnjoH7Gla0dkwxGucjByrKC8fdXO3T990u_rMl2CJNmvn-HGvq55CnOVB08ADVKDdiK9-JUZ2Wr20BvzYqkDozdvLRmHXT_EmZxlDgFcNMzgBjfHjrR4NGgBkMB0Q4ct9Xa1NMDglgWiI0WGF6m5tN9Z9rrxmp75waWd800nv9V63JV9VTgqHM_zbGORGvZd5vCbKByj5GsJx_ZUOH40b817zgcXXfxynJKS3F2vyFxvQdLftP5v_AkAAP__AS1RvQ) with 200,000 in cash. He was never officially found ([although some think they've ID'd him](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsjzFr8zAQQH-NtMWc7k52PGgI30eGQroWuhjZOscqcmQcxW7-fUnnru_Bg_dx6S4-pni7vvtZXBlz54cSN-mMOSAfkDrWwY0iKKTFmQbgSGwN6MmFGhCoP0Ib0NYy2AGJRguNFzYkRx0dApIxyAZsa7Hihkbi1rR1CKavWTFIiCWv1VeOtzLJmJ55k7Ua8qyTm0pZ7opOCs8Kz_u-V8_8KI9eXv5FfBkmRedN0X9sI38u_77l7aRXF5Y9phTvdaMYrrOP6TdZ_j78CQAA__8LxlAV)), and he became known as _D.B. Cooper _after a reporter misheard his name. Haven't signed up for _The Flyover_ yet? You can take care of that [with one click](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFugzAQANCvsbcg--6Mw-ChUsRUunZEBh9wrYGIuKn691XVMdnf9N67vouSZZvf4sqhTHsfxyJ37q09AZ0Ae9IpTMzAqDlYb8wZyVmjlzCcyVuEaEfjHANTSsNAyXtuwBt0WgIYQGuBrHGNg4o8TkiNbeqU7FCTIsNJyn5UH7tsZeEp_-x3PqpxX3UOSynXm8IXBa2C9pEoaLs4y_gq2-efwZYVXtL1W3KWW-0VmXmNkv9t_VVWhRcy-gjPjS7PB34DAAD__wHJWr8). ## Train Derailment Starts Fire In Kentucky
A train carrying molten sulfur [derailed in Kentucky](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2OozAUhZ_GdEb-uUAoXGxDl223RBf7OnhjTGSboLz9iNGU033SOcU537_7fMcQQ3r8xY1M9fuMtoY3zVJyBVzpGRpnPJEi3ZCRgxA3DZ0UzWoWa9UweGeFHDvARfgBwQnR2d6Bd2MTjBJKS6lAim7sVAuD9hpGOfbOyaUHBoJcqHtu_-8h1ZV8_Oxvyq3dtyaatdZXYfoPUxNT03mebVpsorNcOVPThUxNR-E_VDaMkT8p1cM-P7zuZ-JHfpDj9EZ7YCVeM4bEHWUMsfDyCvF6z-1KW7AYC882oVQ93GSTjXudV6H0AwPx2DDE72n1d1NfAQAA__-Bymyf) yesterday, starting a blaze that took hours for specialized crews to put out, and Governor Andy Beshear declared a state of emergency in response. When it burns, molten sulfur releases sulfur dioxide, a pollutant that irritates eyes, skin, and the respiratory tract, among other issues. A nearby town [was recommended to evacuate](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2O4yAURp8Gd1j8OklBsY27bLuldQMX-24wRMDGm7cfeerpjvRJR5_On_tyB0qU19-wo-uxLOA7vXGRkivDlV7MEFxEVKgHdPIixFUbK8WwOf2IIVowGvzkLV41oMKIMVj70CKEgZwSSkupjBT2ZtVoLjpqc5O3KQT5mAwzAgP1Use_hXLfMKZPeWMdfdmH5LbeX43pX0zNTM3HcYzwn0o7V6bm083ULOXJJz0x93_--eHr6cil8oA-QcXGcce6YvYfDrFj5b0CZR6wAqXGIQfeXpRS437DnTykNlQXXgelRG26MCPWHSh9_-o_Z_oKAAD__-t2awA) on Thanksgiving day as a result. CSX, the company operating the train, paid for lodging and Thanksgiving meals for residents affected. Crews are monitoring the air to determine when locals should return to the area.
## Dublin Erupts After Knife Attack
Protesters and rioters [took to the streets](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz79ugzAQgPGngc3IZx8GBg9dsqVrR-Q_R7jWwZFxYvXtq3bu_kmffh_X9eo48XF7d3eydcurC5VftAIIhULpFftoNyJFuicLk5SzxhFkv9vZm0VjWMBFkoE8wKSnWaNzhlyguWerpNIACkGOy6gGnPSmcYHFxAjeYIeSItdchs_MR91pS9_5RWUI-d4nu9f6ODv91qlLpy6tteGgdjair9-gU5fCuZ6CyvNRRXz6xIdwW6Uiws4pFjrEWZ33FAXMaEat-mLjo3FKfJqpQ3m7O05_t_o__icAAP__RZZbgA) of Dublin after a stabbing attack outside of an elementary school. Three children were injured, along with two adults. A woman and a child were treated for serious injuries. Irish police said they weren't treating the incident as an act of terrorism, but a group of about 100 people [clashed with local officers](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFy6yAQAL8GOjQcIPQoKF7jzmlTahAc1sVYaBCxkr_POHXa3WJn9v06XwMV2m5v4YG-5zqH2OmJM4BQRig9G558RlSoOXqYpPynzQiSr96M0xLBpdHqDFOU2TmdksQlGxssSE5eSaUBlAE5ulENZtJZGwfOpgSLNcxITNRrGz4qbX3FXL7rE9sQ64MXv_a-H0z_Z-rC1OU8zyHXrw3P4-VfpLaSmLo0qh3bIWIJxyr2Wiii6LXFVcTQxH2jjCL0HuJdpM-l0MabT_tJpdBhJ2bk7RGo_Fb73xN-AgAA__8h218i) and set a police vehicle on fire--as well as an immigration center.

name: Chuck Hand
subject: I’m not apologizing for January 6, and here’s why…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHUCK HAND FOR GEORGIA
body:
I went inside the US Capitol to support President Trump.

---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bb6365256f1d4abfa2bb19706811e700&_e=dIzVGUdrziKTz25b3UlDG9T08w8Foq9ltuZ_i_diaV1Kb79F0RRn-fVGj4FDW73X3ESkF7lu5xDFi1oeqGIMcdXUhFTcy1vObh4aYNyKO6HWhoT7UiFtIQitWpz3Z-JexTa-GLkb2nMfOckbHX8PdT0Ao7fWADUUlKQbLALXuEk24_85T4W_rFJYhzyxzOiKC9s5YnMK-LwBGkFrDATSYWCjurv1APG4024l8NiOs3rRpJyJdxWHLaYxUyTYfXkfHFhCjak-pmvPWI7Z3sTDnCxjF4evQEL21EZUOGvZNUehgi4Shs3mNIYqwyp3e2rvAovyB5wL8CnVIBjKzvvsO3MTbYEOzFv463psxFW3HMpp2iri3-U8ESBoNlbBQpO3Lz9PTAs8v68b0BUdIuTwAHsndPIOfW_INMoCkzRP4nt9GY4tvHci0y570J0x6z6-)
---
| Fellow Patriot,
**I went inside the US Capitol on January 6, 2021...** to support President Trump and stand up for fair elections in this country.
I was sentenced to**30 days in federal prison** on a petty misdemeanor charge for "picketing" because of it.
(10 of those days, I even spent in solitary confinement, because I refused to take the Covid shot.)
**But I don 't regret one single minute of it,** because I know that standing for what's right is ALWAYS the right thing to do...no matter what.
I'm running for Congress because I think our nation would be a hell of a lot better off if politicians in Washington _actually stood with and stood by their principles._
My name is Chuck Hand and I'm writing to you today because **[I've been told you're the kind of person who's always ready to help a real conservative fight for this country.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bb6365256f1d4abfa2bb19706811e700&_e=dIzVGUdrziKTz25b3UlDG9T08w8Foq9ltuZ_i_diaV1Kb79F0RRn-fVGj4FDW73X3ESkF7lu5xDFi1oeqGIMcdXUhFTcy1vObh4aYNyKO6HWhoT7UiFtIQitWpz3Z-JexTa-GLkb2nMfOckbHX8PdT0Ao7fWADUUlKQbLALXuEk24_85T4W_rFJYhzyxzOiKC9s5YnMK-LwBGkFrDATSYWCjurv1APG4024l8NiOs3rRpJyJdxWHLaYxUyTYfXkfHFhCjak-pmvPWI7Z3sTDnIXdiTpmB1rl3oUU1dWt9a6C9OppIABIPjFu07h2skur3ceqQ5MiaFcBSnxEsZ86rmANlFD2H9ruV3OR1fcOO0uxCEMW4VnO6iLAX9j5fVPmPUrWn8dM2in5emYT7ZXjtn70-wlPJIMaRvHIN5_aZ-P3C0vciSs68A4UHXIPHMzo)**
**[Could you pitch in just a couple bucks to help me launch my campaign for Congress...](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bb6365256f1d4abfa2bb19706811e700&_e=dIzVGUdrziKTz25b3UlDG9T08w8Foq9ltuZ_i_diaV1Kb79F0RRn-fVGj4FDW73X3ESkF7lu5xDFi1oeqGIMcdXUhFTcy1vObh4aYNyKO6HWhoT7UiFtIQitWpz3Z-JexTa-GLkb2nMfOckbHX8PdT0Ao7fWADUUlKQbLALXuEk24_85T4W_rFJYhzyxzOiKC9s5YnMK-LwBGkFrDATSYWCjurv1APG4024l8NiOs3rRpJyJdxWHLaYxUyTYfXkfHFhCjak-pmvPWI7Z3sTDnLdXEXwI27U6CikFK6qMkWm3aiECz9XTYWd_mcPG1B1Ru02mB9lB3MAeWzUmN97WviUvUeJTakNEKuLaF5SbvZ658hY3VjieNxKjGRoukBy7iMMj86yJEld-nSg2aruPI3g610BrugeKPIpYTyGxOip5Hz-cEde3yGiPCkL4yI9E)** and help me _finally_ give a real voice to the working men and women that make up this nation?
**[Donate here if you can. A couple bucks would be a huge help.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bb6365256f1d4abfa2bb19706811e700&_e=dIzVGUdrziKTz25b3UlDG9T08w8Foq9ltuZ_i_diaV1Kb79F0RRn-fVGj4FDW73X3ESkF7lu5xDFi1oeqGIMcdXUhFTcy1vObh4aYNyKO6HWhoT7UiFtIQitWpz3Z-JexTa-GLkb2nMfOckbHX8PdT0Ao7fWADUUlKQbLALXuEk24_85T4W_rFJYhzyxzOiKC9s5YnMK-LwBGkFrDATSYWCjurv1APG4024l8NiOs3rRpJyJdxWHLaYxUyTYfXkfHFhCjak-pmvPWI7Z3sTDnK3theKEa3HI2X5hb0w-tRhbWYWMYbGdIG2zEZE6LIJFM0cKqqsxceBLt8TOPO6Azzcq3xThc6bPM0rZpR5zoZ2UHDU-3DBM5Ui3ced9P9CaDoKnBYriT0xAhzJwMHi2p95zuv981z2Xv_43pif8fZfF__igw4zYK94Btvj8rH3V)**
As you can guess, we have **_zero_** support from the GOP Establishment and a whole lot of big guns pointed at us from the Far-Left.
I'd say they're treating me like a joke...that they don't _really_ think a guy who works in construction in one of the poorest districts in America has a snowball's chance in hell...
**_...but they know better._**
After the last few years of conservative wins,**they _absolutely_ believe a Trump-loving, conservative-thinking "deplorable" like me can win. ** That's why they're already firing everything they've got at me. | | | | [STAND WITH ME IN THIS FIGHT!](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bb6365256f1d4abfa2bb19706811e700&_e=dIzVGUdrziKTz25b3UlDG9T08w8Foq9ltuZ_i_diaV1Kb79F0RRn-fVGj4FDW73X3ESkF7lu5xDFi1oeqGIMcdXUhFTcy1vObh4aYNyKO6HWhoT7UiFtIQitWpz3Z-JexTa-GLkb2nMfOckbHX8PdT0Ao7fWADUUlKQbLALXuEk24_85T4W_rFJYhzyxzOiKC9s5YnMK-LwBGkFrDATSYWCjurv1APG4024l8NiOs3rRpJyJdxWHLaYxUyTYfXkfHFhCjak-pmvPWI7Z3sTDnISxFQQXFSw_5ohUPflMZUBduXr8LhTx-XnqaxGN1FTkRFXGY1Xm0RiQtTdW5DqGYxmRN7-DFyLDTTbSexM89H_YObBglg4jHsTDUsbnn2tNTcOdkWCNh_WV4fGH5Ks3uZjElRZZcst8dTQamwMLdOZTCH6VdBQcw9EMuSt-QfWP)
---
They know that, when I make it to Washington, I'm going to be the biggest headache they've ever seen...

...because I'll force the Establishment to **look straight in the eye** with the American majority they've been screwing over for decades.

They don't want you to have a voice, ever again. **I _refuse_ to be silent.**

But making it to Washington is tough as hell for people like you and me...and **I can only win if I can depend on your help.**

I know times are tight, and I know you're just hearing from me for the first time.

But if you think we need more people like me in Washington, **[I hope you'll pitch in even just a dollar or two to help me prove that I can win this thing.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bb6365256f1d4abfa2bb19706811e700&_e=dIzVGUdrziKTz25b3UlDG9T08w8Foq9ltuZ_i_diaV1Kb79F0RRn-fVGj4FDW73X3ESkF7lu5xDFi1oeqGIMcdXUhFTcy1vObh4aYNyKO6HWhoT7UiFtIQitWpz3Z-JexTa-GLkb2nMfOckbHX8PdT0Ao7fWADUUlKQbLALXuEk24_85T4W_rFJYhzyxzOiKC9s5YnMK-LwBGkFrDATSYWCjurv1APG4024l8NiOs3rRpJyJdxWHLaYxUyTYfXkfHFhCjak-pmvPWI7Z3sTDnMl4THg2ONUpwEHK59k3XrPdYJUHumz_LGjXHm_UhNTlqO6JNPFE4Nu4qSVzN2OsGaV086nIwCeflBySEnS7Co68nnjxMGbeGmRvcYvMh9_eI6L-BT1aw4b0BkNf3jA5C099ku_JPJJ_JpYitg6l_xM2JigmKrRAjwSEo5z64_WM)**

**[Make your donation using this secure link.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bb6365256f1d4abfa2bb19706811e700&_e=dIzVGUdrziKTz25b3UlDG9T08w8Foq9ltuZ_i_diaV1Kb79F0RRn-fVGj4FDW73X3ESkF7lu5xDFi1oeqGIMcdXUhFTcy1vObh4aYNyKO6HWhoT7UiFtIQitWpz3Z-JexTa-GLkb2nMfOckbHX8PdT0Ao7fWADUUlKQbLALXuEk24_85T4W_rFJYhzyxzOiKC9s5YnMK-LwBGkFrDATSYWCjurv1APG4024l8NiOs3rRpJyJdxWHLaYxUyTYfXkfHFhCjak-pmvPWI7Z3sTDnK2BcrU0XIMM_GpTL33bV_cyVgh2qEsIqzZv5-iYT8jqP9GbGVvG7pM21TRh6K6d36r80mQ-0Xod9Xzoo8Fkqzk-VkeXPGqdhRWsucLbqBQooj9_ZyBjvz7_jL5BtsSrZ8bFYON0yUxMy8fR7l7kJvzgsZ_VoJaJpqNRw0M1XjYv)**

I appreciate all your help, and I can't wait to win this fight with you.

Thanks,

Chuck

PAID FOR BY CHUCK HAND FOR GEORGIA

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: REVEALED: What school book fairs are teaching children
body:
Here's what we're up against.

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1599931d210b41c48771c41ea05235e8&_e=O3bcOmFkY8MD2dpmJ1Uev854mJ49ErPO4et-gWJXsPH1ll8va4uJRJHlJ9wHIcloTzmYD3W66SErkD5fDfIxIqmTFWt8qG8giilwwkFaFC_X5QTdX5ePwuersB8xJxuqjKVYgUbHGnntRm99KjN0tXA_bkGmLe434lo6RQvFiiNQETSveemf5y3lQxKxgFm2-BK7S_IR_T-Qsj47MyWQCRFtISbHLw69Ea6RMNR8NIs6wgyNoaPifNsf1EXSxzJ7 "SkyTree Book Fairs")

Friend,

SkyTree Book Fair and I did a deep dive and discovered the cause of why sexually explicit and disgusting books get into our children's schools, classrooms, and libraries.

Here's what we're up against.

These are books Scholastic promotes at book fairs in schools. Here are pages from "Welcome to St. Hell," a 2022 Scholastic book glamorizing gender transitioning to middle schoolers. (We've censored these pages as the original content could violate social media policies against adult material):

subject: Want to potentially make money instead of spending it on Black Friday?
body:
Get all the info you need right here.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| Dear Reader, [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/E2UmNxgFW0lpsoXe23bnHA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnQzjgP0RbaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUucGFsbWJlYWNoZ3JvdXAuY29tLz9jaWQ9TUtUNzc3MjU0JmVpZD1NS1Q3NzkzMjkmYWZmX2NsaWNrX2lkPVJNLVJPTi0yMDIzMTEyNFcDc3BjQgplX1SNYGXF1QKaUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) My name is Teeka Tiwari. When I was 20 years old, I became the youngest Vice President at Shearson Lehman, which was one of the largest investment-banking firms in the U.S. After working on Wall Street across three separate decades and even running my own hedge fund... I left and joined one of the largest publishers of independent financial research in the world. Today, we publish our ideas to more than 1.3 million everyday folks just like you. As a former money manager who lived and profited from the computer revolution, the dot com boom, and the crypto boom... I can tell you from personal experience that getting in on the ground floor of a tech breakthrough is the quickest way to build wealth. That’s why I started covering artificial intelligence (AI) 8 years ago when most people thought it was just science fiction Fast-forward to today... My research has identified one company that could reward early investors with a windfall. (Hint: It’s the company powering Elon Musk’s latest AI venture.) And on Black Friday, you can get it all for just $7. That’s $192 off the regular price of $199 for a full year of my financial research publication, The Palm Beach Letter. While most people spend money on Black Friday... Wouldn’t it be nice to make some with a stake in Elon Musk’s new AI project? **[Get all the info you need right here.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/E2UmNxgFW0lpsoXe23bnHA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnQzjgP0RbaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUucGFsbWJlYWNoZ3JvdXAuY29tLz9jaWQ9TUtUNzc3MjU0JmVpZD1NS1Q3NzkzMjkmYWZmX2NsaWNrX2lkPVJNLVJPTi0yMDIzMTEyNFcDc3BjQgplX1SNYGXF1QKaUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** Let the game come to you, Regards, |

Teeka Tiwari
Editor, Palm Beach Research Group

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: I’m done watching Republicans lose
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWdouV1iTN

I will never stop standing up for what I know is right-even when
it goes against the grain of public opinion.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWdouV1iTN

Friend,

The
time for chirping from the sidelines is over.

Talk is ineffective, and that's why my message has been simple:
2024 is the time to put up or shut up.

As
a leader, your job is to put the interests of the people you
serve above your own political gain. I've done that in Florida,
and I've watched the American people cry out for real leadership
nationwide. I am looking forward to rising to the occasion to
show the nation that leadership.

I
debate and defend what I KNOW is right-even when it goes against
the grain of the approved elite media narrative.

The
American people deserve a President with a track record of taking
action and standing for what's right. The lack of action from our
leaders across this country has gone on for far too long. Joe
Biden has done more to damage to our nation than anyone, and
Kamala Harris has done nothing at all.

I
am DONE listening to excuses, and I know you are too. If
Republicans want to ditch the culture of losing, then it's time
we try something new. In Florida, I showed the country the
playbook for defeating the woke mob:

Giving parents back their voice in the classroom by BANNING CRT
and pornographic content for young kids

STANDING UP against corporations who have tried to force
taxpayers to fund an ESG agenda

DEFEATING Faucism and giving back Floridians the freedom to
breathe and see their families after the elites in DC shut down
the country

I
promise you, with me as your nominee for President, Republicans
will forget this culture of losing once and for all. This is a
race to defeat Joe Biden. That is my focus. To get that done, I
am asking for your continued support. If you can, will you pitch
in $25 today?

PITCH IN
$25

PITCH IN
$47

PITCH IN
$75

PITCH IN
$100

PITCH IN
$150

PITCH IN
$200

The
time to act is now. The time for leadership is now.

2024 is going to be the year that our Great American Comeback
takes shape. Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And
freedom is worth fighting for. We will fight back and WIN.

I
am humbly asking for your support today, Friend. Join me, and we
will put an end to the culture of losing that has surrounded the
Republican party. We will keep the woke indoctrination away from
kids, the way we live our lives, the curriculum taught in
schools, and the consumer choices we make.

Stand with me on the debate stage: Donate
HERE

Our
Great American Comeback is attainable as long as we're willing to
fight for it.

In
Freedom,

Ron
DeSantis

Meet Ron DeSantis

A native Floridian with
blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a
nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin
High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he
was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated
with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission
in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service,
Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah,
Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military
decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service
and the Iraq Campaign Medal.

Ron
also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child
predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a
platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits
and a balanced budget amendment.

In
Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the
weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to
hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in
manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a
veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our
country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans
and expand support for mental health.

In
2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As
governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for
the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when
the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media
united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis
stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding
principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to
transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival.
Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative
priorities:

Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine
mandates,

Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border
crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against
illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured
professors accountable,

Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital
currency,

Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

Protecting the unborn,

Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a
constitutional carry state,

Expanding education freedom,

Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and
entities,

Lowering prescription drug costs,

Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

Creating a universal school choice program,

Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme
Court,

...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout
his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of
nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the
largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than
1.5 million votes.

But
history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the
majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional
wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently
as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30
points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red,
including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties
overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor
DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics,
and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with
battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing
down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his
inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense
suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of
sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even
for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we
choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than
cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe
place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership,
Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education
opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden
Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that
seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to
the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered
the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's
history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:

Record tax relief

ESG prohibitions

Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering
transparency

Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

Improvements to our state's infrastructure

Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death
penalty for child rapists

The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border
crisis

Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward
school unions

Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No
leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor
DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country,
leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron
is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television
anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters,
Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as
charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.
Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without
"green cards"), federal government contractors, and national
banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best
efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address,
occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose
aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The
maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600
($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple
using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary &
$6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute
$10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident
(i.e., green card holder).

This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not
being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose
of making this contribution.

I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card
and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued
to another person.

I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this
contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization,
national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal
contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron
DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his
military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not
imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department
of Defense.

Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President

PO Box 3696

Tallahassee, FL 32315

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 25, 2023.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWdouV1iTN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWdouV1iTN

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Mariela Roca, Candidate for Congress
subject: The American Dream is dead.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Roca for Congress**
body:
And Joe Biden and the Democrats are standing over it with the murder weapon.

| | | [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=adbfc837c5fa4f0089e6ad5999173714&_e=xog4tGAUKX1TbdfK9z6RSqggSgRr1JUtqBOyfyqTpOJCZwV7Ogmi3Al7dm963zEuULwIaA2wBCors0bvUJykuf91rIJeSHMeOE_BgL3l5HtIvalD3TPhehUQi8eYCh62q1zKBnVBDv8QrLqIzzVrXqwWpKFOF6CSRbDM7v1RGZQymGAWUC5GnejM1B257rc8TpW5HE2-euSpRWa4c_ycRcoKJ9r9WltdDGJlu7ScRkOudpPTJta8Gr9xr7FIQ_8BkJGta0FPPh1Y7ra8Qgi-hLQbiP_riAGRtfSCCn_nZOs_tWPeOfnKKaIdlhorlrdQAkFCq6MwzPQma04S4vsWhU_j8Vw8Fht_E4oc6B8ce3MCC59EqW-SD5Q0fIb3hu_x6FcSDI3MqnIVhSTV8wFug-T6qj4kAzcG_ZJUqO7eqPQQau8SoyBz17T9Ii4tDBZZs2iaRjuFq9W22DbuffBVQcStjBrg298yOuzeh3MyplR67FsLujOW_eRWizuFKqI9)
---
**The American Dream is dead.**
And Joe Biden and the Democrats' fingerprints are all over the crime scene.
_Skyrocketing inflation._
_Record home prices._
_Trillions in debt._
It's all come crashing down.
**My name is Mariela Roca.** You've probably never heard of me, but I'm an Air Force veteran who served our country in Afghanistan.
I'm running for Congress to **bring back the American Dream** that once helped a Hispanic, single mom like me achieve success.
Running for Congress is never something I thought I'd do, but I couldn't sit and watch as **Biden destroyed our dreams** and replaced them with nightmares.
I will never forgive him.
I'm jumping in to run in the MOST COMPETITIVE district in the entire country.
My district will decide if Republicans keep our majority in the House in 2024 and stop the DISASTROUS Democrat agenda.
It pains me to ask, but the Democrats have amassed millions to OBLITERATE me.
Asking for help is something I never thought I'd do in my life, but right now, your help is my only hope.
[**Please chip in just a few bucks today.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=adbfc837c5fa4f0089e6ad5999173714&_e=xog4tGAUKX1TbdfK9z6RSqggSgRr1JUtqBOyfyqTpOJCZwV7Ogmi3Al7dm963zEuULwIaA2wBCors0bvUJykuf91rIJeSHMeOE_BgL3l5HtIvalD3TPhehUQi8eYCh62q1zKBnVBDv8QrLqIzzVrXqwWpKFOF6CSRbDM7v1RGZQymGAWUC5GnejM1B257rc8TpW5HE2-euSpRWa4c_ycRcoKJ9r9WltdDGJlu7ScRkOudpPTJta8Gr9xr7FIQ_8BkJGta0FPPh1Y7ra8Qgi-hLQbiP_riAGRtfSCCn_nZOs_tWPeOfnKKaIdlhorlrdQAkFCq6MwzPQma04S4vsWhZJ9eP9jv1Q2-rTG8aq3jiPPKaa3fl-MxhPPl3kGxOYuc4olPew_kGw48xxqh0gbwh-I1TcMuP24JWCx3PzQccFdquw7G2pT_VkVjdsUZJNGIROoBahc5t8UMGcxwfPuLdSmClwfWUZtZv_SUXMzauAej_rTMghQb3pks51_vB9u)

Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=05a51e7ffd86424d8ffe5c458f896e4c&_e=v_9I_9htmVVgHcF3TUeZxxMjJF6UIVTKE_1IdF-qK_Jp9ZJrvJBsHLfpAjpa0etvtEKkHsJjsvYzy4WCfurX9LFyHeHc8I-KPq9TgKIBeDLzypn9irRTZd8vycT6PgnmwONHBRckWsUU97XyFiQ4l8R8_Kig2zecukz62Yv_wofUxtFtT5Ce4Fc43jbn5V9R4JGcc-AiKtBLOrUk4czY6qc2C0fDIXiN1bC1j9Hduu-TxjFaj44Zlp6vK9Os5iq39bR0boCKb6SINktH4Fb8k9oORs_Cfu5FhCpkEG08IdAGSLbiNXuFDItxDvL2T9u5) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=05a51e7ffd86424d8ffe5c458f896e4c&_e=v_9I_9htmVVgHcF3TUeZxxMjJF6UIVTKE_1IdF-qK_Jp9ZJrvJBsHLfpAjpa0etvtEKkHsJjsvYzy4WCfurX9LFyHeHc8I-KPq9TgKIBeDLzypn9irRTZd8vycT6PgnmwONHBRckWsUU97XyFiQ4l3kLiJB3g1tOAOXweHQmTNkxkfRS-a61sLTrhtJ3pln_8hC6EkFRrp64wM3vK8eWx5BebW5XqzMvHcVxA2Dvvsx4X8YRFW6P5Ax99ZmBzYPCS3XmqtvoM0Lo3t53wHPK6C2ESWL-0P7TjCZJQv0M4Y0eoCya3MoggLWEL8iJS2P_) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=05a51e7ffd86424d8ffe5c458f896e4c&_e=v_9I_9htmVVgHcF3TUeZxxMjJF6UIVTKE_1IdF-qK_Jp9ZJrvJBsHLfpAjpa0etvtEKkHsJjsvYzy4WCfurX9LFyHeHc8I-KPq9TgKIBeDLzypn9irRTZd8vycT6PgnmwONHBRckWsUU97XyFiQ4l2LNIP6C1zCJaRCEyg4kefGMoU7t28WKlimb2sExa3ybkEupzGp2Kb_Y0xIXHwyveRgAiE2vuRq_5dVNo_ePapmb5_EBPfpiFjZX6kPYTOulJaV8sZ6OLvjSbHWrzTCtMijlSYgdR7L2H4J-vtMRlgeLmJFultYaZl1lSm96bbEy). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=05a51e7ffd86424d8ffe5c458f896e4c&_e=v_9I_9htmVVgHcF3TUeZxxMjJF6UIVTKE_1IdF-qK_Jp9ZJrvJBsHLfpAjpa0etvtEKkHsJjsvYzy4WCfurX9LFyHeHc8I-KPq9TgKIBeDLzypn9irRTZd8vycT6PgnmwONHBRckWsUU97XyFiQ4l0m68JY22C-D31I_9rWX6lsyoZX_bWeZDK0SbxfNa1Oyo2HWgpNH0VOPuR3ydoiq3g8teITntC9XNNSpxHXGSGGl5-PKHN07t_NUi2JxUehsnrXyLVcQDteWMtEi4hy1IJCWgWfcAUUSjejQ8bEQR8shkzDdhC7gbC_ReyZwWaMU)

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7b134bc21f11efb7c829933d895025be341684a7a0fb24b14028366c2fea463279e54c454a7b24560aff9e5ac50ea17ff27795f17d9c293f3466c3a566971936

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7b134bc21f11efb7c829933d895025be341684a7a0fb24b14028366c2fea463279e54c454a7b24560aff9e5ac50ea17ff27795f17d9c293f3466c3a566971936

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

name: Chuck Hand
subject: I’m not apologizing for January 6, and here’s why…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHUCK HAND FOR GEORGIA
body:
I went inside the US Capitol to support President Trump.

---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a4c475c349e84a23bf32fedf55e81d07&_e=VDyrDlRDea3juZQYXABZG1k6FNLzVAYSHClQpwv0BJJqd5lkHN7B_wuw17eMS0oKyjglEvWk2M7m6F70Gx7IlgP_9a6mjYAafUevjZvSOiCD-GECb0WVEHxDZPf7-qNBfAYd4qoyDJYoJUUgzXG4mEtIg8wKDamzzAGphq58gsSsZOgUfLCIleuP1nUaD9sXr3Bg4XC4bWLfBXzSkiSTNP1pRTvqK-0TI9Yn-wBukKb973rOW4n3-Bvj-QD3aUvdm5L95Lp_g6c3KIWMZGLF7Sttoil_50eFvI1OAIcFM2ZeOHoHkjQ12_0Uu9Ny5Z8imbaEseCfN3gAyJjW8XRzFAf87Y6oBI_2J3ExdhoACS0x4FgkABuhktLhuRQPVwxlpSoIXPEiyGGoOTS06450WmvZgwAW12ABiARiArZEvKQmCN52W1S0qIyBPNH2yphH)
---
| Fellow Patriot,
**I went inside the US Capitol on January 6, 2021...** to support President Trump and stand up for fair elections in this country.
I was sentenced to**30 days in federal prison** on a petty misdemeanor charge for "picketing" because of it.
(10 of those days, I even spent in solitary confinement, because I refused to take the Covid shot.)
**But I don 't regret one single minute of it,** because I know that standing for what's right is ALWAYS the right thing to do...no matter what.
I'm running for Congress because I think our nation would be a hell of a lot better off if politicians in Washington _actually stood with and stood by their principles._
My name is Chuck Hand and I'm writing to you today because **[I've been told you're the kind of person who's always ready to help a real conservative fight for this country.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a4c475c349e84a23bf32fedf55e81d07&_e=VDyrDlRDea3juZQYXABZG1k6FNLzVAYSHClQpwv0BJJqd5lkHN7B_wuw17eMS0oKyjglEvWk2M7m6F70Gx7IlgP_9a6mjYAafUevjZvSOiCD-GECb0WVEHxDZPf7-qNBfAYd4qoyDJYoJUUgzXG4mEtIg8wKDamzzAGphq58gsSsZOgUfLCIleuP1nUaD9sXr3Bg4XC4bWLfBXzSkiSTNP1pRTvqK-0TI9Yn-wBukKb973rOW4n3-Bvj-QD3aUvdm5L95Lp_g6c3KIWMZGLF7VcriLuPG_ccc467qGXfclXWvRKkmoB2pzK1GpW7U9iwAGo9goy9K2sLbUVsZI1ncvPSRkzM1M-5N50JbGiOEQTZNMi1owR6Yx7r0q8ShF-i4-MqJAqsxgiUUSawY8Y3Rdpb54iAkbGpBlNTZcwzO03f_iMtbyKg4F0VE2z_QRnf)**
**[Could you pitch in just a couple bucks to help me launch my campaign for Congress...](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a4c475c349e84a23bf32fedf55e81d07&_e=VDyrDlRDea3juZQYXABZG1k6FNLzVAYSHClQpwv0BJJqd5lkHN7B_wuw17eMS0oKyjglEvWk2M7m6F70Gx7IlgP_9a6mjYAafUevjZvSOiCD-GECb0WVEHxDZPf7-qNBfAYd4qoyDJYoJUUgzXG4mEtIg8wKDamzzAGphq58gsSsZOgUfLCIleuP1nUaD9sXr3Bg4XC4bWLfBXzSkiSTNP1pRTvqK-0TI9Yn-wBukKb973rOW4n3-Bvj-QD3aUvdm5L95Lp_g6c3KIWMZGLF7Xj13GyjFU0LqHDjq9cqGH09yypVj2LkrVoi9tZqfh3EZFd76BRReHNOfS4D8K4yChPg3mitIaisejJghnvQ30QHM76h6e5TI1awazQODSnTPOK1bb1TPriZJ417fyaqAWFuTpqNcJ4HEdn86mLZVzm7EriCBgpLObHNbVt7dNl4)** and help me _finally_ give a real voice to the working men and women that make up this nation?
**[Donate here if you can. A couple bucks would be a huge help.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a4c475c349e84a23bf32fedf55e81d07&_e=VDyrDlRDea3juZQYXABZG1k6FNLzVAYSHClQpwv0BJJqd5lkHN7B_wuw17eMS0oKyjglEvWk2M7m6F70Gx7IlgP_9a6mjYAafUevjZvSOiCD-GECb0WVEHxDZPf7-qNBfAYd4qoyDJYoJUUgzXG4mEtIg8wKDamzzAGphq58gsSsZOgUfLCIleuP1nUaD9sXr3Bg4XC4bWLfBXzSkiSTNP1pRTvqK-0TI9Yn-wBukKb973rOW4n3-Bvj-QD3aUvdm5L95Lp_g6c3KIWMZGLF7bW5hTSun8vVQk1g5EEhKCKWh1us0AMHpBDEAeTEmYSKDgHK5klwY7Ep--Od9uBEk081Lr0qUuOXogahweZnlgoROPWDXITAyYBuvCa1kuY9RiLVS9HSQrYqFBAAowF9aWqAtPyJ_XgwH3Ofm7Ru1kyj14zNRNj-BT8JgKYCglQS)**
As you can guess, we have **_zero_** support from the GOP Establishment and a whole lot of big guns pointed at us from the Far-Left.
I'd say they're treating me like a joke...that they don't _really_ think a guy who works in construction in one of the poorest districts in America has a snowball's chance in hell...
**_...but they know better._**
After the last few years of conservative wins,**they _absolutely_ believe a Trump-loving, conservative-thinking "deplorable" like me can win. ** That's why they're already firing everything they've got at me. | | | | [STAND WITH ME IN THIS FIGHT!](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a4c475c349e84a23bf32fedf55e81d07&_e=VDyrDlRDea3juZQYXABZG1k6FNLzVAYSHClQpwv0BJJqd5lkHN7B_wuw17eMS0oKyjglEvWk2M7m6F70Gx7IlgP_9a6mjYAafUevjZvSOiCD-GECb0WVEHxDZPf7-qNBfAYd4qoyDJYoJUUgzXG4mEtIg8wKDamzzAGphq58gsSsZOgUfLCIleuP1nUaD9sXr3Bg4XC4bWLfBXzSkiSTNP1pRTvqK-0TI9Yn-wBukKb973rOW4n3-Bvj-QD3aUvdm5L95Lp_g6c3KIWMZGLF7ZPEz5BcWke3lkPT_ft0eKbZvtb_LMPUvGcVdy-saRdpjOau9t-INAwIzhyyg_qUlRycQiBp7w6Hr8MDCKZ2Nrg4_hQhyPnoQ2RqVGvrZ-lRWMa7cIduaVHZ4WTssOJRKsizNYVGl8hpmuEyvv5B16JgCDmdG1lcGeglq81DBfOL)
---
They know that, when I make it to Washington, I'm going to be the biggest headache they've ever seen...

...because I'll force the Establishment to **look straight in the eye** with the American majority they've been screwing over for decades.

They don't want you to have a voice, ever again. **I _refuse_ to be silent.**

But making it to Washington is tough as hell for people like you and me...and **I can only win if I can depend on your help.**

I know times are tight, and I know you're just hearing from me for the first time.

But if you think we need more people like me in Washington, **[I hope you'll pitch in even just a dollar or two to help me prove that I can win this thing.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a4c475c349e84a23bf32fedf55e81d07&_e=VDyrDlRDea3juZQYXABZG1k6FNLzVAYSHClQpwv0BJJqd5lkHN7B_wuw17eMS0oKyjglEvWk2M7m6F70Gx7IlgP_9a6mjYAafUevjZvSOiCD-GECb0WVEHxDZPf7-qNBfAYd4qoyDJYoJUUgzXG4mEtIg8wKDamzzAGphq58gsSsZOgUfLCIleuP1nUaD9sXr3Bg4XC4bWLfBXzSkiSTNP1pRTvqK-0TI9Yn-wBukKb973rOW4n3-Bvj-QD3aUvdm5L95Lp_g6c3KIWMZGLF7ed21ywVlozrXLhBlCF2zXkspAhrkD_XwIvMiDWCosrWhhvLPkoXgs21Lvg04HruMD-b1YaQhI8KG3PeYn14O3Bmc3LJeONBwXEQ2MoVbcEj9H1QxebZsWchnPGBoV13w-tx94YLz15LZU3KzyxOss5pvnD6-v8HgWTpoe430Mfy)**

clean_body: I went inside the US Capitol to support President Trump. | | | | | | | | | | Fellow Patriot, I went inside the US Capitol on January 6, 2021... to support President Trump and stand up for fair elections in this country. I was sentenced to30 days in federal prison on a petty misdemeanor charge for "picketing" because of it. (10 of those days, I even spent in solitary confinement, because I refused to take the Covid shot.) But I don 't regret one single minute of it, because I know that standing for what's right is ALWAYS the right thing to do...no matter what. I'm running for Congress because I think our nation would be a hell of a lot better off if politicians in Washington actually stood with and stood by their principles. My name is Chuck Hand and I'm writing to you today because and help me finally give a real voice to the working men and women that make up this nation? As you can guess, we have zero support from the GOP Establishment and a whole lot of big guns pointed at us from the Far-Left. I'd say they're treating me like a joke...that they don't really think a guy who works in construction in one of the poorest districts in America has a snowball's chance in hell... ...but they know better. After the last few years of conservative wins,they absolutely believe a Trump-loving, conservative-thinking "deplorable" like me can win. That's why they're already firing everything they've got at me. | | | | They know that, when I make it to Washington, I'm going to be the biggest headache they've ever seen... ...because I'll force the Establishment to look straight in the eye with the American majority they've been screwing over for decades. They don't want you to have a voice, ever again. I refuse to be silent. But making it to Washington is tough as hell for people like you and me...and I can only win if I can depend on your help. I know times are tight, and I know you're just hearing from me for the first time. But if you think we need more people like me in Washington, I appreciate all your help, and I can't wait to win this fight with you. Thanks, Chuck PAID FOR BY CHUCK HAND FOR GEORGIA Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

Because I want to help people and deliver the results they deserve. I’m not a career politician…I’m a retired Navy Helicopter Pilot, Wife, Mom, and Nurse Practitioner who has spent my career working to help others. I ran for Congress because I actually want to make a difference, and I got sick and tired of hearing false promises from some of our elected officials. I’m not afraid to call out the politicians that only care about their own agendas, gaining personal power, and wealth….I promise to always tell the truth! Which is why I’m the Democrat's number one target next year. They don’t want someone who stands up for the truth and calls out their woke agenda—I don’t play by their games. The Left has spent MILLIONS trying to silence me and have made me their #1 target...but I'm not backing down. Which is why I’m the Democrat's number one target next year. They don’t want someone who stands up for the truth and calls out their woke agenda—I don’t play by their games. The Left has spent MILLIONS trying to silence me and have made me their #1 target...but I'm not backing down. I promise to continue to stand up for what’s right and fight to protect the future of our nation, but I can't do it on my own. I need committed supporters like you to join my team as I fight for our nation. STAND WITH JEN I don’t normally ask for help like this, but it would mean a lot to me if you would stand with me as I fight to defend what’s right and to give the American people the future we deserve. STAND WITH JEN Let’s work together! -Jen Kiggans JEN KIGGANS is running for Congress in the most competitive House race in the entire country, and she needs our urgent support. Can you spare just $5 or $10 today to protect her vulnerable seat? If we are going to defeat the Democrats and keep the Republican Majority, then we MUST support tough conservatives like Jen Kiggans right now. ">Give your endorsement to this Navy Pilot, Nurse Practitioner, and Mom >> Paid for by Kiggans for Congress USE OF MILITARY IMAGES OR RANK DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT BY THE U.S. DEPT. body:
It would mean so much to both President Trump and me if we could depend on your support today in our mission to save America. Can we rely on you in the next fifteen minutes?

|
---
| | |
_**Friend - I am all in for President Trump.**_

I endorse him wholeheartedly, and believe to my core that we have to make Biden a one-term president.

---
| | | [DONATE TO SPEAKER JOHNSON & PRESIDENT TRUMP ➞](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fdb22f1fb28e4536821860c5050479b6&_e=QscQ6fQKCP4dzDg75cDE-biJsTcQJndaYsKzrKcf0FQ6L-UKm7AyGkte4zfcuXRgy8NR9K7W-agIsyfJvi-ZcaAIKEPKFe71Z0V2jJvuUU3FwixTef54wJGlJbpPDCvPwcr62GpADg8FaNJHIOYwctIt0RqemXphfJjIXIkwBkrIMEbB9EYetsGXR59Yh4f2q7DI25uFB0DSU79S_ybRMjLApKnNPDJwYJo3NeVdJ4vM9-z_qcuaMsH5Dh_H2xprp4BNMcD4W3tcmAHk3M9knZqNJVG1z_LMZ7sE1Cpw2NfgtD6bhi5pKSWMogWOO8LEL1UHXar-SzcR9feG4RtvwZ8stqZmnxhPCIUsuVJE1xgJFVuLGoQ1hksXGMp0rbeXhxd6a13tgBqvweYDyBu4W-Fl5ZR5Dh0LPFNyg-Ouwqqxp0FBSRrvHmnBPByM9W-K-_4fO5GjkAWf_BcN-HMJMw%3D%3D "Generic Button")

Under President Trump, we built the greatest economy in U.S. history, took concrete steps to secure our southern border, projected strength abroad, and fought back against the radical Left EVERY DAY **- no matter what they threw at us.**

President Trump made America great again, _and I know we can do it once more._

**[But it will take an army of conservative warriors stepping forward in this fight.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fdb22f1fb28e4536821860c5050479b6&_e=QscQ6fQKCP4dzDg75cDE-biJsTcQJndaYsKzrKcf0FQ6L-UKm7AyGkte4zfcuXRgy8NR9K7W-agIsyfJvi-ZcaAIKEPKFe71Z0V2jJvuUU3FwixTef54wJGlJbpPDCvPwcr62GpADg8FaNJHIOYwctIt0RqemXphfJjIXIkwBkrIMEbB9EYetsGXR59Yh4f2q7DI25uFB0DSU79S_ybRMjLApKnNPDJwYJo3NeVdJ4vM9-z_qcuaMsH5Dh_H2xprp4BNMcD4W3tcmAHk3M9knZqNJVG1z_LMZ7sE1Cpw2NfgtD6bhi5pKSWMogWOO8LEXkwLuZM7Vs1vjZC400OK5R_dpfEbRHkpCWO745J24VHAZd1Eu1Fyl400-cU-BiZEArVd3kjECYLHT0sc8I5vMDf7okKn339Yebck_BYz9XrrCQ22B9Hzm5nKr2oE0xquDZJe0EeLLJAv4zmCha85lQ%3D%3D "But it will take an army of conservative warriors stepping forward in this fight.Democrats are going to call on every big-Liberal donor to keep President Trump OUT of the arena, and we are going to need to have the resources to respond.")

[Democrats are going to call on every big-Liberal donor to keep President Trump OUT of the arena, and we are going to need to have the resources to respond.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fdb22f1fb28e4536821860c5050479b6&_e=QscQ6fQKCP4dzDg75cDE-biJsTcQJndaYsKzrKcf0FQ6L-UKm7AyGkte4zfcuXRgy8NR9K7W-agIsyfJvi-ZcaAIKEPKFe71Z0V2jJvuUU3FwixTef54wJGlJbpPDCvPwcr62GpADg8FaNJHIOYwctIt0RqemXphfJjIXIkwBkrIMEbB9EYetsGXR59Yh4f2q7DI25uFB0DSU79S_ybRMjLApKnNPDJwYJo3NeVdJ4vM9-z_qcuaMsH5Dh_H2xprp4BNMcD4W3tcmAHk3M9knZqNJVG1z_LMZ7sE1Cpw2NfgtD6bhi5pKSWMogWOO8LEFBgGNJdnUM8GI_ZkBU8CIjfjB63Q9CShh81PeGAt_EAbIDfhJFu-s-tXBCc8PfXOtyLZgJ9dWODQjx51wYG3Lnvqy1Z2Upmd4AwVCXlcjPWWmoq8gdiPR1KZPhrfV9kW0GjLLIeDoSnX3xzMR6d8Fg%3D%3D "But it will take an army of conservative warriors stepping forward in this fight.Democrats are going to call on every big-Liberal donor to keep President Trump OUT of the arena, and we are going to need to have the resources to respond.")**

| | With Thanksgiving behind us, the holiday season is officially kicking into high gear, Peter! If you’re anything like me, I’m sure your calendar is jam-packed over the next few weeks. It can be loads of fun, but it can also be _a lot._ **[So in between fighting holiday traffic and trying to make the most of Black Friday shopping deals, I was hoping you could spare a quick minute to chip in $25 toward our November fundraising goal!](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7891?t=12&amount=25&akid=682%2E52803%2EIy-tWo)** | | | [Donate $25](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7891?t=13&amount=25&akid=682%2E52803%2EIy-tWo)
---
| | [Other Amount](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7891?t=14&amount=35&akid=682%2E52803%2EIy-tWo)
---
We set an especially ambitious end-of-month goal for November (_$20,000!!!_) because we know campaign fundraising can slow to a trickle the closer we get to the end of the year.
**So there are two big reasons why hitting our November goal — which is less than a week away — is so important:**
_1) We need to stockpile resources now so we don’t have to scale back our operations during slower fundraising months._
_2) We’re already thinking about 2024 and all the things we need to accomplish between now and Election Day._
**[So what do you say, Peter? Would you be willing to make a Black Friday donation to my campaign for the U.S. Senate and chip in $25 today?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7891?t=15&amount=25&akid=682%2E52803%2EIy-tWo)**
_If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._

As Rick Scott’s Communications Director, it’s my job to make sure his mission to _**RESCUE AMERICA**_ reaches as many patriots as possible.

_**Rick’s seat is the Democrats’ top target for 2024, so we’re going to have to fight extra hard to fend off the millions George Soros and the Left plan on spending against us.**_

Their dark money will go towards lies and misinformation - typical of Democrats.

subject: REMINDER - JOIN U.S. REP. ANDY OGLES - Friday, December 8th.
body:
A festive evening in support of Andy Ogles, hosted by Lee Beaman and Julie Hannah at the home of Lee Beaman. | | | |
---
| | | Hello Friends,

Having just celebrated Thanksgiving, we find ourselves immersed in gratitude for the sense of community and the shared experiences that bring us joy.

As the holiday season continues, **_I want to reach out and remind you of our upcoming event_** , graciously hosted by Lee Beaman and Julie Hannah. This will be an excellent opportunity for us to make meaningful connections and set a strong tone as we conclude this year.

I am excitedly anticipating the pleasure of your company at this gathering, and I hope that your Thanksgiving was brimming with family, love, and an abundance of blessings!

name: Brigid Godfrey
subject: Native American Heritage Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Freedom Virginia, Inc
body:
freedomva.org [freedomva.org]
Today we honor Native American Heritage Day. We celebrate the Indigenous communities around the country and specifically in Virginia for the impact they’ve had. Tribes such as the Cheroenhaka (Nottoway), Chickahominy, Eastern Chickahominy, Mattaponi, Monacan Indian Nation, Nansemond, Nottoway of Virginia, Pamunkey, Patawomeck, Rappahannock, and Upper Mattaponi Tribes have given Virginians so much.
Our top priority at Freedom Virginia is to establish a Prescription Drug Affordability Board in Virginia to keep drug and healthcare costs low. The Indigenous community in the United States has been greatly afflicted by disproportionate drug costs and medical treatment. We can only hope to give back some of what Native Americans have given us, and we’re starting with the health system in Virginia.
Please join us today in celebrating and honoring the Indigenous communities in Virginia!
https://www.facebook.com/TeamFreedomVA [https://www.facebook.com/TeamFreedomVA] https://twitter.com/TeamFreedomVa [https://twitter.com/TeamFreedomVa] https://instagram.com/teamfreedomva [https://instagram.com/teamfreedomva]

clean_body: freedomva.org [freedomva.org] Today we honor Native American Heritage Day. We celebrate the Indigenous communities around the country and specifically in Virginia for the impact they’ve had. Tribes such as the Cheroenhaka (Nottoway), Chickahominy, Eastern Chickahominy, Mattaponi, Monacan Indian Nation, Nansemond, Nottoway of Virginia, Pamunkey, Patawomeck, Rappahannock, and Upper Mattaponi Tribes have given Virginians so much. Our top priority at Freedom Virginia is to establish a Prescription Drug Affordability Board in Virginia to keep drug and healthcare costs low. The Indigenous community in the United States has been greatly afflicted by disproportionate drug costs and medical treatment. We can only hope to give back some of what Native Americans have given us, and we’re starting with the health system in Virginia. Please join us today in celebrating and honoring the Indigenous communities in Virginia! [] [] [] Paid for by Freedom Virginia, Inc. Freedom Virginia PO Box 10102 Norfolk, VA 23513 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Team Cornel West 2024
subject: Empower Our Campaign for Truth and Justice!
body:
We need your help before the month's over.

| | | [ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=psQUkJGc26u6Wi0imicX-00jZnUVaZYVu06OFU-xtOc&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231124fundraising_directask&n=1)
---
Dear Peter, As we tread the path of truth and justice, we acknowledge our limited resources against the backdrop of organized greed. And yet, our campaign is one that starts with the fight back - and empowers all people with a true alternative to the powers that be. In a culture consumed by endless corporate greed, our mission stands strong: to shatter the belief that we're confined to two parties fueling democratic decline. These parties lead us towards ecological catastrophe and escalating poverty, fostering institutionalized hatred that divides us further each day. Dr. West reminds us that envisioning a revival of democratizing energies is challenging, but we refuse to concede hope. We walk alongside those who have historically opposed the lies that paralyze us. ****Take Action Now: Support Our Movement for Truth and Justice****
---
| [](http://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231124fundraising_directask&n=2 "DONATE NOW") [DONATE NOW](http://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231124fundraising_directask&n=2)
---
Your commitment propels us towards a brighter future, strengthening our movement with hope and providing an ALTERNATIVE to the status quo. Not only can your support sustain our cause, but your donation plays a vital role in securing ballot access in all 50 states. Help us make a difference. Join us in pursuing ballot access across the nation and contribute to the movement's growth. Can we count on your recurring monthly donation or a one-time contribution to strengthen our efforts?

---
Thank you for standing with us on this journey. In Solidarity, **Team Cornel West 2024**
---

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73895037/440006182/-826917173?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20231124_fr_thxnews_cand_kw_30da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmVjZDZlMS1kYThhLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xe8oC_RFXXVrI6SazVsp7ThEwUvMZ0Zk0IfdCqKQyEQ=)

Hey co-pilots, it’s Ashley here! I hope you had a great Thanksgiving with your loved ones yesterday. **At my Thanksgiving table, what I was most grateful for was easy: Supporters like YOU for giving me the strength and motivation to keep going every day.** In really exciting news, our campaign has now raised over $500,000 – and not ONE penny came from corporate PACs! That is especially meaningful to me as someone who was raised by a single mom who wasn’t always able to afford housing. I don't have a trust fund or a massive network of wealthy prep school peers to fund this campaign. Instead, we are building a people-powered campaign to defeat Brian Fitzpatrick. [Of course we need to keep it going, so if you can, please pitch in your first donation of $10, or more >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73895040/440006184/-826917173?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20231124_fr_thxnews_cand_kw_30da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmVjZDZlMS1kYThhLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xe8oC_RFXXVrI6SazVsp7ThEwUvMZ0Zk0IfdCqKQyEQ=) Thanks again from the bottom of my heart. I cannot wait to see what we accomplish together between now and next November. But for now, check out this month’s highlights my team pulled together below. Respectfully, Ash 🚁
* * *
**November Roundup**
* Democrats swept races up and down the ballot in PA-01 this past election day, including the PA Supreme Court, Bucks County Commissioners, and school board races throughout PA-01. We shifted the vote 6.5 points towards Democrats, and in 2024, we only need to shift it 5 points to flip this seat!

* Ashley recently joined Reed Galen on _The Lincoln Project_ podcast to talk about growing up in Southeastern PA, why she joined the Army, commanding her first platoon at just 22 years old, and what's most dangerous about Brian Fitzpatrick. [Watch here >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73895043/440006187/1565926587?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20231124_fr_thxnews_cand_kw_30da_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmVjZDZlMS1kYThhLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xe8oC_RFXXVrI6SazVsp7ThEwUvMZ0Zk0IfdCqKQyEQ=)

* We’ve secured some key endorsements from organizations, including **Elect Democratic Women** and **Reproductive Freedom for All** (formerly NARAL)!

**_Republicans will do absolutely anything to win Florida._**
And now, more and more people from the far-right are going to be tuning into our election. We have to rally our own base of support if we want any chance of fighting back. **[So I'm asking 20,000 grassroots Democrats from all across the country to endorse my campaign before 11:59 p.m. tonight. Will you please sign on now to show the GOP that we're flipping Florida blue in 2024?
