name: Maria Montero
subject: Campaign Updates November 24!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MARIA MONTERO
body:
ICYMI
| | | |
---
---
| Maria's Community Champions
---
| | |
---|---
Earning the confidence and support of community members, leaders, and business people is what distinguishes Maria Montero--she reflects the people, values, and work ethic of the 7th Congressional District in Pennsylvania.

This week, we are pleased to share the support of Lisa Scheller. Lisa was our PA CD-7 candidate last cycle and came within a razor-thin margin of defeating Susan Wild. Act 77, the vote by mail for "any reason" bill, caused a seismic shift in end results for PA in the 2022 election. After regrouping, Lisa with other concerned citizens formed the
"[Win Again PAC](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XBDVToMIOHGwO0WLdZWE99fYcEIRJytdbj6NFSGSd2Iws-Aq3pxMTvd06vAIH9WeX_YrrC7mg7uiDOkKSwE9rOeqZubj31l1lnBYYtn3hmtUt87YiiwKBajZU-kjy0VcHNsryAY8GaGvoxsb7VG78g==&c=H8l0YArNS65-NFwYc5HX_J3KmVNqDc22Rkva6zXdyV2qWOxh1BT6CA==&ch=qfZiVvZ-ah8caqPpkDbjJxDNUZvsXJUdwD0sksk6gCSgA__zqaIw6w==)", the only group in Pennsylvania dedicated to increasing Republican's participation by mail-in voting. Lisa is laser focused on Republicans winning again in Pennsylvania.

Lisa has known Maria over 30 years. She knows Maria's work ethic, her Conservative values, and her commitment to winning. The Republican Party is at a cross-roads in Pennsylvania, especially here in PA-7. We can continue the status quo or we can vote for the success and future of our party. Maria, a first generation America on her father's side and a Spanish speaker, has been a committed servant to the Latino community, which accounts for 19.5% of this district, which equals 55,000 Spanish speaking voters. Maria was Governor Tom Corbett's Executive Director of the PA Latino Commission who focused their efforts on small business empowerment, educational excellence, and school choice. Maria is a former member of the Allentown Puerto Rican parade committee and served on Hispanic Center Lehigh Valley's board. In addition, Maria was a founding member of the Lehigh Valley Latino Republicans and is actively engaged with the Hispanic Republican Coalition of Pennsylvania.

Maria is a multi-dimensional candidate...a mom, a former Division 1 Athlete and youth sports' coach, an Allentown businesswoman, and an active member of her church in Easton who can bring our team and new voters together for win!

During this Thanksgiving week, what better time to thank Lisa Scheller for friendship, support, and strategic guidance in helping PA, WIN AGAIN!
---
| |
---
| Around The District
---
|
---
|
---
---
| The Lehigh Valley IronPigs, Triple-A affiliate to the Philadelphia Phillies, is a major family attraction in Pennsylvania's 7th Congressional District and an important regional economic driver in the hospitality and tourism industry. When Maria read about her favorite baseball team's new Pennsylvania Dutch themed gear, she couldn't wait to get over to Coca-Cola Park to get the new merch! Maria was thankful for the tour and the special guest appearance of beloved IronPigs mascot, FeFe. Opening Day is March 31, 2024...can't wait!
---
| |
---
| Maria visited Executive Education Academy Charter School in Allentown, an outstanding institution providing top-tier education to students in our region. Executive Charter School is considered a blueprint for charter schools, not only in education, but also athletics...cultivating community, leadership, and intellect!
---

Maria Montero Republican Congressional Candidate PA-7

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: I got a few minutes this morning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
The only reason I am here... |
---
Hey Peter —

I had an extra few minutes this morning so I wanted to share some thoughts with you.

Here’s the truth:

No matter why you are reading this, I am thankful for you.

People like me don’t often make it to Congress.

I’m the son of Latino immigrants, who, with my three sisters, was raised by my single mother. I was the first in my family to attend college, cleaning the toilets of my classmates to make it work, and I joined the Marine Corps after graduating and went to Iraq.

The only reason I am here is because of the support I’ve had along the way.

As a kid, the support from my family.

In combat, the support of my fellow Marines.

In these campaigns, support from people like you.

But now I have a new mission: replacing Kyrsten Sinema and working to expand voting rights, protect abortion rights, take on drug companies and hedge fund managers and be a voice and a vote for working people in the Senate.

I need your help. So please:

[Can you split a $15 contribution between my re-election campaign and Defeat Republicans? This month has been tough on fundraising, and I need your help to get things back on track before it’s too late. ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73897047/440012923/1708957644?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_231124_1_1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY0ZDNhOGFhLWRkOGEtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QlkbzQMA64Rc5IUoEn8twzv107V9i1KcqmerU95JcnQ=)

clean_body: The only reason I am here... | Hey Peter — I had an extra few minutes this morning so I wanted to share some thoughts with you. Here’s the truth: No matter why you are reading this, I am thankful for you. People like me don’t often make it to Congress. I’m the son of Latino immigrants, who, with my three sisters, was raised by my single mother. I was the first in my family to attend college, cleaning the toilets of my classmates to make it work, and I joined the Marine Corps after graduating and went to Iraq. The only reason I am here is because of the support I’ve had along the way. As a kid, the support from my family. In combat, the support of my fellow Marines. In these campaigns, support from people like you. But now I have a new mission: replacing Kyrsten Sinema and working to expand voting rights, protect abortion rights, take on drug companies and hedge fund managers and be a voice and a vote for working people in the Senate. I need your help. So please: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. | = = = = = Thank you in advance for chipping in. It means a lot. Ruben ****** **** **** ****** Defeat Republicans | Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www.DefeatRepublicans.org) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Lucas Kunce for U.S. Senate
subject: Recent polling in Missouri’s U.S. Senate race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Lucas Kunce and Josh Hawley are in a *margin-of-error* race
#
Peter — earlier this fall, one of the first public polls of Missouri’s U.S. Senate race showed Josh Hawley and Lucas Kunce in a _statistical tie_.
**And now, on the heels of major wins for red state Democrats in Kentucky and Ohio, another new poll confirmed this will be a margin-of-error race.**
— RECENT MISSOURI SENATE POLLING —
**Kunce 43% | Hawley 44% | +/-3% Margin Of Error**
**Kunce 42% | Hawley 46% | +/-4.9% Margin Of Error**
After almost a year of holding Hawley accountable and getting Lucas’ message in front of voters across the state, we’re putting this race on the map — and we’re showing everyone that the record-breaking, people-powered, and worker-led movement we’re building together really can flip this Senate seat.
**But let’s be clear: the GOP insiders and corporate elites backing Hawley are seeing all these polls too.** They’ve made our race one of their top defensive targets for 2024 because they know we can win. And with this new confirmation, they’ll spend EVEN MORE if it means re-electing Hawley next year and keeping their grip on power in Missouri.
They’ve already set up a Super PAC with more than $1 MILLION to fund their desperate attacks about Lucas. And national insiders have transferred millions into Hawley’s campaign over the course of this year to make him look strong.
So if we’re going to close the gap in this neck-and-neck race, we need the resources to cut through their inevitable onslaught of attacks and keep reaching voters with Lucas’ election-winning message online, on TV, and on the ground. **That’s why we’re asking for your help today, Peter:**
**[Will you please rush a donation of $25, $10, or anything you can afford toward our campaign to elect Lucas Kunce to Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat? This race is one of our best and only chances to flip a GOP-held Senate seat in 2024, so this could be your opportunity to make a real difference.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39357?refcode=em20231124-4235&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4235%2E614464%2ELc8YSi)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39358?refcode=em20231124-4235&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=4235%2E614464%2ELc8YSi) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39358?refcode=em20231124-4235&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=4235%2E614464%2ELc8YSi) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39358?refcode=em20231124-4235&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=4235%2E614464%2ELc8YSi) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39358?refcode=em20231124-4235&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=4235%2E614464%2ELc8YSi) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39358?refcode=em20231124-4235&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=4235%2E614464%2ELc8YSi) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39358?refcode=em20231124-4235&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=4235%2E614464%2ELc8YSi) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39357?refcode=em20231124-4235&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=4235%2E614464%2ELc8YSi)
---
National insiders, corporate elites, and even Hawley’s own campaign — they’re all worried that they might actually lose this seat to a real warrior for working people like Lucas Kunce.
But you know what they should be worried about instead? What Lucas is going to do to them when he gets there — because on November 5, 2024, we’re flipping this U.S. Senate seat and taking back power for everyday Missourians.
Thanks for all your support,
Team Lucas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20231124-4235-footer&t=9&refcode2=4235_614464_Lc8YSi&akid=4235%2E614464%2ELc8YSi)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: A Black Friday deal on the hottest t-shirt and koozie bundle, Rebel Scum Collection. | | Fellow American, Why bother with Black Friday crowds when you can shop for the best Team Vivek merch from the comfort of your own home? There are no lines or stressful parking lots and you can enjoy your Thanksgiving leftovers while you shop! This will make the perfect gift for your friends and family who love our nation and are ready to stand up to the Establishment! The response to the Rebel Scum Collection launch was massive and our supplies are limited. Thank you. Vivek | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. name: James Carville
subject: I've selected you to represent Pennsylvania!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hey, it's James Carville and I’m real excited to hear from you.

I'm conducting a series of strategy interviews with the very best, most engaged Democrats, and I've selected _you_ to represent Pennsylvania -- **[so please, click here to get started right now:](https://go.dscc.org/go/15878?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231124-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231124-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=12679%2E9716520%2EDl2C_o)**

| | [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/15878?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231124-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231124-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=12679%2E9716520%2EDl2C_o)
---

I’ve been in politics a LONG time, and I’ll be honest, **I don’t think I’ve ever seen an election with more at stake than this one.** If we win, we’ll continue to enact President Biden's agenda and work for ALL Americans. If we lose, **Mitch McConnell and his flat-out wacko candidates will grind all progress to a halt -- and that will only be the beginning.**

All across the country, Republicans are taking away a woman’s right to choose, trying to cut health care, restricting the right to vote, and burying their heads in the sand on climate change. **And if Democrats don’t get fired the hell up, those same crazy Republicans will take control of the Senate next year.**

That's why I want to talk to you. I need to hear from _real voters like you_ \-- not more political types -- so I can help our best and brightest defend the Senate.

**I selected you specifically, so please, will you click here to begin your interview?** **[www.dscc.org/DemocraticInterviewNovember/](https://go.dscc.org/go/15878?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231124-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231124-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=12679%2E9716520%2EDl2C_o)**

| [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/15878?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231124-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231124-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=12679%2E9716520%2EDl2C_o)
---

Thank you

\- James

name: Allred HQ
subject: The odds are stacked against us.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
| | |
---
Peter – when Colin ran for Congress in 2018, the odds were stacked against him.

His opponent was a Republican Congressman who had held his seat for 11 terms. Colin and our team put everything we had into the campaign – but just 48 days from the election, **the polls gave Colin a 10% chance of winning, and the district was leaning Republican.**

In the last days of the campaign, Colin worked day and night to connect with Texans and earn their votes. He slowly chipped away at his opponent's lead as voters got to know him.

**By Election Day, he had a 37% chance of victory. And when the numbers finally came in, he won with 52% of the vote.**
| | [Split a donation between Letitia James and Colin Allred to defeat Ted Cruz →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73901076/440027234/1337142349?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1264-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjYzZTMzZS1lMzhhLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=54NSrmbQGbLXaSqcpjXaoyLKs4osZRoi48p6AgsNnko=)

Peter, this time around we're facing an even bigger opponent: Ted Cruz. But we're starting this race with much better odds. Polls show Colin just 5 points down with 14% of voters undecided.

**What's more, Ted Cruz only won reelection by 2.6% last time.**

**We have a clear path to victory, and all it's going to take is connecting with enough undecided voters. That's why Colin is on the road traveling to every corner of Texas, shaking every hand he can and listening to what voters have to say.**

**[But voter outreach on this massive scale is expensive. clean_body: | | | Peter – when Colin ran for Congress in 2018, the odds were stacked against him. His opponent was a Republican Congressman who had held his seat for 11 terms. Colin and our team put everything we had into the campaign – but just 48 days from the election, the polls gave Colin a 10% chance of winning, and the district was leaning Republican. In the last days of the campaign, Colin worked day and night to connect with Texans and earn their votes. He slowly chipped away at his opponent's lead as voters got to know him. By Election Day, he had a 37% chance of victory. And when the numbers finally came in, he won with 52% of the vote. | | = Peter, this time around we're facing an even bigger opponent: Ted Cruz. But we're starting this race with much better odds. Polls show Colin just 5 points down with 14% of voters undecided. What's more, Ted Cruz only won reelection by 2.6% last time. We have a clear path to victory, and all it's going to take is connecting with enough undecided voters. That's why Colin is on the road traveling to every corner of Texas, shaking every hand he can and listening to what voters have to say. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Colin Allred and Letitia James will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = \- Team Allred | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. body:
Ryan Busse puts principles over politics. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/KuMB1syMs0W9O3v5MuCvqQ2?unsubscribedata=Pi2QIj2dxHqClY9%2BDzYcHitYaleLYU0bBDQ7KRykS25nr%2FXhnty38Rw5pukb8B%2FABoIQK%2BmriQImfvwD6qI4asMVEDxCGVlF6wPk4%2BBeAy8TX7ctTaoVs1mu59w1RRXo4KXoPUCve2bbB%2F64pvKBs9jbP1a5Svs2WliewmFUVhzxyJ4lIzKEQorDccAQxbg4%2Fz1qhuxEj7mPg9jkIRiSX78yWC5nVYxgsojzdaR3PI1y0bNA%2FJWd8rDxcv8ewP0nV8At8RklECePQZax%2BUBBp92xS3BXonOV6BSjMJfoTYfUSD36QLVViSTaGpAtNj3%2FAdwotGIVh%2FhUdW45keaHexGBJvoPEYLeE6K2qhy06dbTaYTYRujNv091OMf9tzcp74%2FwwbdiGTFCtyfTOtYFrdsjzlHEZ%2Bji5Fos%2BYEGAF%2FSMWzSDRTpREv5qE8HtSDB)

**Ryan on the Road** I’ve been on the campaign trail since September 14, and what an encouraging few months it’s been. I’ve already clocked several thousand miles, many with my wife Sara, crisscrossing our state. This is a chance to share some of the highlights and challenges we’re seeing as we fight for a new brand in Montana. |
---
**The Good Stuff**

Two days after launching this campaign, my neighbor of 10 years (who also has had a Trump flag flying in his driveway since 2015), marched over and told me how proud he was of me and our family for going for it... and that he just might even vote for me because he’s so upset by Governor Gianforte’s property tax hike!

Maybe that’s why we blew the roof off our fundraising in the first two weeks, raising far more than we expected. But I’m learning fast that the backbone of a successful campaign is never letting up on fundraising. We’re trying to throw out a billionaire who bought this seat by writing himself multimillion-dollar checks...and he’ll try and do it again. So please don’t hold all the fundraising emails against us. It’s the work. And if you can afford to send a maximum contribution ($1,000 before our June 4 Primary Election and another $1,000 after), you’ll drop off the list! (incentive!)

And the very best part of the campaign: the people. Folks are ready to fight for a change for Montana. We’ve had record and electric political events across the state: from Havre and Glendive to Bozeman and Whitefish. Montana is ready for a new brand.

---
**The Not-So-Good**

In case you missed it, Gianforte is battling elected leaders from his own party over his giant property tax hike, and he’s trying to mislead women about his plan to strip their privacy and access to abortion.

So let’s get really clear: Gianforte and HIS supermajority could have provided Montana homeowners tax relief in the last session, but they chose not to. And when the new tax bills came out, Gianforte blamed higher taxes on the counties. But Montana counties are having NONE of that...and neither am I.

And now Greg Gianforte is traveling around the state touting adoption and foster care as “successes” to distract voters from his extreme agenda to strip women of all of their healthcare rights, including privacy and the right to an abortion. DO NOT BE DISTRACTED. Gianforte’s goal is to flip the Montana Supreme Court and rewrite our Constitution to remove our right to privacy as quickly as possible, turning Montana into Texas. No effing way. Not on my watch.

**Where I’ll be next**

This week we hosted friends for our annual Friendsgiving, then the boys and I set off for a special father-sons elk hunt.

In December we’ll be all over the state again. We’re off to Lake County, Livingston, Billings, Red Lodge, Bozeman, Big Sky, Missoula. You’ll get the details for all the public events in your area.

**Highlight Reel**

My team pulled together these media highlights from the past few weeks. Please share them with your friends!

Here’s a video where I take issue with **Greg Gianforte’s recent TV interview** , in which he lied to Montanans about his tax hike. His interview was a disaster, to say the least.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73901182/440027543/-1334501424?source=SBD_RB_EM_NL_NOV23_1_2_NewsLetter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDgzNDciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODNlNzNmNjUtZTM4YS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ei4cecHAXiLlXVMzmIiQ03LR-Pq58HS44RhVTnelRCc=&emci=68a89a5b-d087-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=83e73f65-e38a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=17465008)

We covered everything from college football to Gianforte’s dangerous vision for Montana. Listen to hear why I missed my calling as a major league baseball pitcher.

[_Explore Big Sky_ Podcast](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73901191/440027554/-803653937?v=jxgZ27_kM5Q&source=SBD_RB_EM_NL_NOV23_1_2_NewsLetter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDgzNDciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODNlNzNmNjUtZTM4YS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ei4cecHAXiLlXVMzmIiQ03LR-Pq58HS44RhVTnelRCc=&emci=68a89a5b-d087-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=83e73f65-e38a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=17465008): Comedians Joe and Michelle Borden invited me to sit at their kitchen table to record this episode of the _Explore Big Sky Podcast._

[_The Havre Daily News_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73901192/440027555/-469098538?source=SBD_RB_EM_NL_NOV23_1_2_NewsLetter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDgzNDciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODNlNzNmNjUtZTM4YS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ei4cecHAXiLlXVMzmIiQ03LR-Pq58HS44RhVTnelRCc=&emci=68a89a5b-d087-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=83e73f65-e38a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=17465008): In Havre, I stopped by the _Havre Daily News_ for an interview with reporter Patrick Johnston. Read how Montana changed me for the better.

[_Fast Politics_ with Molly Jong-Fast](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73901193/440027556/294944414?source=SBD_RB_EM_NL_NOV23_1_2_NewsLetter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDgzNDciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODNlNzNmNjUtZTM4YS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ei4cecHAXiLlXVMzmIiQ03LR-Pq58HS44RhVTnelRCc=&emci=68a89a5b-d087-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=83e73f65-e38a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=17465008): If you follow politics, there’s a good chance you follow Molly Jong-Fast. Check out my interview with _Fast Politics_ here.

[Stand Up! with Pete Dominick](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73901194/440027557/-1678814333?source=SBD_RB_EM_NL_NOV23_1_2_NewsLetter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDgzNDciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODNlNzNmNjUtZTM4YS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ei4cecHAXiLlXVMzmIiQ03LR-Pq58HS44RhVTnelRCc=&emci=68a89a5b-d087-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=83e73f65-e38a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=17465008): I’ve listened to Pete’s hard-hitting show for a long time. We pull no punches in this episode.

And of course, folks are still talking about our viral campaign announcement video, which racked up over a million views on Twitter (or whatever it’s called these days).

clean_body: Ryan Busse puts principles over politics. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Ryan on the Road I’ve been on the campaign trail since September 14, and what an encouraging few months it’s been. I’ve already clocked several thousand miles, many with my wife Sara, crisscrossing our state. This is a chance to share some of the highlights and challenges we’re seeing as we fight for a new brand in Montana. | The Good Stuff Two days after launching this campaign, my neighbor of 10 years (who also has had a Trump flag flying in his driveway since 2015), marched over and told me how proud he was of me and our family for going for it... and that he just might even vote for me because he’s so upset by Governor Gianforte’s property tax hike! Maybe that’s why we blew the roof off our fundraising in the first two weeks, raising far more than we expected. But I’m learning fast that the backbone of a successful campaign is never letting up on fundraising. We’re trying to throw out a billionaire who bought this seat by writing himself multimillion-dollar checks...and he’ll try and do it again. So please don’t hold all the fundraising emails against us. It’s the work. And if you can afford to send a maximum contribution ($1,000 before our June 4 Primary Election and another $1,000 after), you’ll drop off the list! (incentive!) And the very best part of the campaign: the people. Folks are ready to fight for a change for Montana. We’ve had record and electric political events across the state: from Havre and Glendive to Bozeman and Whitefish. Montana is ready for a new brand. The Not-So-Good In case you missed it, Gianforte is battling elected leaders from his own party over his giant property tax hike, and he’s trying to mislead women about his plan to strip their privacy and access to abortion. So let’s get really clear: Gianforte and HIS supermajority could have provided Montana homeowners tax relief in the last session, but they chose not to. And when the new tax bills came out, Gianforte blamed higher taxes on the counties. But Montana counties are having NONE of that...and neither am I. And now Greg Gianforte is traveling around the state touting adoption and foster care as “successes” to distract voters from his extreme agenda to strip women of all of their healthcare rights, including privacy and the right to an abortion. DO NOT BE DISTRACTED. Gianforte’s goal is to flip the Montana Supreme Court and rewrite our Constitution to remove our right to privacy as quickly as possible, turning Montana into Texas. No effing way. Not on my watch. Where I’ll be next This week we hosted friends for our annual Friendsgiving, then the boys and I set off for a special father-sons elk hunt. In December we’ll be all over the state again. We’re off to Lake County, Livingston, Billings, Red Lodge, Bozeman, Big Sky, Missoula. You’ll get the details for all the public events in your area. Highlight Reel My team pulled together these media highlights from the past few weeks. Please share them with your friends! Here’s a video where I take issue with Greg Gianforte’s recent TV interview , in which he lied to Montanans about his tax hike. His interview was a disaster, to say the least. : I joined reporter Big Sky Chat House reporter Max Savage Levenson for a wide-ranging conversation about my campaign and the future of Montana. : I joined the always colorful Bill Foley for a lunchtime chat inside Butte’s famous M&M Bar. We covered everything from college football to Gianforte’s dangerous vision for Montana. Listen to hear why I missed my calling as a major league baseball pitcher. : Comedians Joe and Michelle Borden invited me to sit at their kitchen table to record this episode of the Explore Big Sky Podcast. : In Havre, I stopped by the Havre Daily News for an interview with reporter Patrick Johnston. Read how Montana changed me for the better. : If you follow politics, there’s a good chance you follow Molly Jong-Fast. Check out my interview with Fast Politics here. : I’ve listened to Pete’s hard-hitting show for a long time. We pull no punches in this episode. And of course, folks are still talking about our viral campaign announcement video, which racked up over a million views on Twitter (or whatever it’s called these days). Last Stop We’re doing a special year-end fundraiser with a limited run of brand new stickers... We think you’re going to love ‘em. Dropping soon, so get ready! = Let’s paint this state ORANGE! And LFG!!! Ryan * | = Ryan is running to fight for freedom, fairness, and common sense. Meanwhile, liars, cheats, billionaires, and fascists are unraveling American democracy before our eyes. We should be terrified of their anti-freedom agenda. Greg Gianforte is the problem. He’s already raised your taxes, ignored the high cost of housing, lied to Montanans, and even went jet-setting in Italy while Montanans had to deal with record-breaking floods. He’s just getting started. Ryan is ready to deliver “a new brand for Montana,” and protect the Last Best Place from Greg Gianforte’s dangerous, failed leadership. | = = Paid for by Busse for Montana, PO Box 8537 Kalispell, MT 59904, Democrat Busse for Montana PO Box 8537 Kalispell, MT 59904 United States If you need to you can unsubscribe here: You can also =.

| | Friend, While it’s important that we’re all focused on protecting our democracy, it’s also important that your holiday gift list is complete. And what better way to do both than by celebrating and honoring one of democracy’s biggest champions, Ruth Bader Ginsburg. Justice Ginsburg was a fierce advocate for a functional democracy and ensuring that all citizens had equal protection under the law. She was instrumental in protecting equal rights for women and the LGBTQ+ community, illustrated by her support in _Roe v. Wade_ and _Obergefell v. Hodges_. The legacy of RBG can be seen in the recent win for abortion rights in Ohio. **[Join us in celebrating the work of Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg this Black Friday and make the day of the advocates and champions in your life by making a contribution of $19.99 or $29.99 and we’ll send you an RBG T-shirt or pair of RBG socks as an appreciation gift.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73901770/440029561/163468236?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRiMDc2NDNiLWU0OGEtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AVXh2_PIDSTQcKci4OvKOW0PYTGhBHzeLblirndv2jc=)** This Black Friday deal won’t last long, so make a contribution today to get your T-shirt or socks!

Hey, it's Kari Lake.

Our fight isn't over -- not by a long shot.

name: Katie Porter
subject: Opening this email is a big deal, Derek.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=33514%2E3422442%2EJvHa3Y)
Derek, you opening this email is a big deal.
**I’m sure you’re getting a million emails today, and normally our email open rate is about 16%.**
But on a day like today, when Black Friday deals are flooding your inbox, that rate will likely be lower.
**The less people who open our emails, the less donations we see come in.** Normally, a slower day or two isn’t a huge deal. But we’re three months to our primary, and what we raise right now absolutely determines how much we can spend on key advertisements.
So before you head back to enjoying your leftovers, can you chip in $5? You’re an absolutely critical part of our team.
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231124-1?refcode=EMAN24_1_LEF_20231124_V1_F&refcode2=33514_3422442_JvHa3Y&akid=33514%2E3422442%2EJvHa3Y)
Thanks!!
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAN24_1_LEF_20231124_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=33514_3422442_JvHa3Y&akid=33514%2E3422442%2EJvHa3Y)**

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: Who will win ‘The Game’ tomorrow?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=843%2E135344%2ErvtFeL)

Hey there --
If there is one thing that many Michiganders look forward to all Thanksgiving week, it’s not turkey or Black Friday deals -- it’s the annual showdown between University of Michigan and Ohio State on the football field.
The rivalry between us and our neighbors to the south runs deep -- both on and off the gridiron. In addition to winning the last two editions of The Game, Michigan has been the big brother to look up to for Ohio at the ballot box: Ohio just passed a ballot initiative to protect abortion -- following in our footsteps after Michigan passed Prop 3 last November.
With both teams undefeated so far this season, the game Saturday -- the 119th time these teams have met! -- will certainly be a game to remember. **So please weigh in and let us know who you think will be taking home the victory tomorrow:**
**[UNIVERSITY OF MICHIGAN](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1683?t=2&akid=843%2E135344%2ErvtFeL)**
**[OHIO STATE UNIVERSITY](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1684?t=3&akid=843%2E135344%2ErvtFeL)**
Thanks for weighing in on our poll, and beat Ohio!
-- Team Slotkin

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=843%2E135344%2ErvtFeL).

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=5&akid=843%2E135344%2ErvtFeL)

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

clean_body: | = Friend, It’s no secret that the political system is severely damaged when it comes to funding campaigns, and big special interests are free to spend millions to buy influence. The good news is that grassroots Democrats have proven that when enough people come together and stand up – we CAN win. We have the power to defeat the corrupting influence of money in politics. And it can cost less than you think. = That’s right, $1. For less than 1/3rd of what it costs for a cup of coffee, you can: Boost our number of small donors and show our strength. Engage more volunteers with greater canvassing resources. Meet more voters where they are by helping us fuel up our travel across the district. Unlock support from new endorsers by equipping our small but mighty team. Unlike some of our opponents, we are not taking corporate PAC donations. But everything adds up, and together we can make this people-powered campaign larger than any individual and stronger than the sum of its parts. = | **= = Thank you, Laura If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26912?t=2&akid=20438%2E4449941%2E1LSss3). **Or, to help us reject the Big Money status quo in states and cities across the country, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26913?t=3&akid=20438%2E4449941%2E1LSss3).**

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: GIFFORDS
subject: Wear your values with GIFFORDS merchandise
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
100% of your purchase is a donation to GIFFORDS PAC and our efforts to save lives.
#

Friends -
We hope that as some of you may start your holiday shopping this Black Friday, you’ll consider purchasing from the GIFFORDS store.
**When you make a purchase from the GIFFORDS store, your purchase is a donation to GIFFORDS PAC, and 100% of the proceeds go directly toward our efforts to save lives.**
[**We have our classic T-shirts, buttons, totes, and more:**](https://go.giffords.org/go/24252?utm_source=em231124-1-30&utm_campaign=em231124-1-30&t=1&akid=6939%2E3935704%2E0EkhJ-)
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/24342?utm_source=em231124-1-30&utm_campaign=em231124-1-30&t=2&akid=6939%2E3935704%2E0EkhJ-)
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/24475?utm_source=em231124-1-30&utm_campaign=em231124-1-30&t=3&akid=6939%2E3935704%2E0EkhJ-)
[**We have our Courage Collab with original art from Tyson Krank and Rebecca Williams:**](https://go.giffords.org/go/24497?utm_source=em231124-1-30&utm_campaign=em231124-1-30&t=4&akid=6939%2E3935704%2E0EkhJ-)
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/24608?utm_source=em231124-1-30&utm_campaign=em231124-1-30&t=5&akid=6939%2E3935704%2E0EkhJ-)
[**And for the responsible gun owners in your life, we have T-shirts, hats, stickers, and magnets in our Gun Owners for Safety collection:**](https://go.giffords.org/go/24633?utm_source=em231124-1-30&utm_campaign=em231124-1-30&t=6&akid=6939%2E3935704%2E0EkhJ-)
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/24721?utm_source=em231124-1-30&utm_campaign=em231124-1-30&t=7&akid=6939%2E3935704%2E0EkhJ-)
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/24721?utm_source=em231124-1-30&utm_campaign=em231124-1-30&t=8&akid=6939%2E3935704%2E0EkhJ-)
We have merchandise perfect for anyone in your life who is committed to the fight to end gun violence and wants to wear their values.
[**So please, click here to visit our online store today and give the gift of GIFFORDS merch this holiday season.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/24723?utm_source=em231124-1-30&utm_campaign=em231124-1-30&t=9&akid=6939%2E3935704%2E0EkhJ-)
**[VISIT THE STORE](https://go.giffords.org/go/24723?utm_source=em231124-1-30&utm_campaign=em231124-1-30&t=10&akid=6939%2E3935704%2E0EkhJ-)**
\- The team at GIFFORDS

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=6939%2E3935704%2E0EkhJ-) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.
clean_body: 100% of your purchase is a donation to GIFFORDS PAC and our efforts to save lives. Friends - We hope that as some of you may start your holiday shopping this Black Friday, you’ll consider purchasing from the GIFFORDS store. When you make a purchase from the GIFFORDS store, your purchase is a donation to GIFFORDS PAC, and 100% of the proceeds go directly toward our efforts to save lives. - - - - - - - - We have merchandise perfect for anyone in your life who is committed to the fight to end gun violence and wants to wear their values. - - \- The team at GIFFORDS Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

name: Kendra Brooks and Nicolas O'Rourke, Working Families Party
subject: Our movement owes it to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
Against all odds, but with hard work and principled organizing, the future of Philadelphia just got a little brighter — and we truly couldn't have made it here without your dedicated support. | | | Hi Peter, it's Kendra Brooks and Nicolas O’Rourke. As we look back on a whirlwind of an election cycle, we just wanted to reach out and thank you personally. Earlier this month, we made history (_again_) in Philadelphia — and together, we left the Republican Party in the dustbin of history in one of the biggest cities in the country. It brings both of us tremendous pride to be able to do the people's work, continue our fight for a city that invests in communities, and boldly represent Philadelphia’s working families on the City Council next year. Against all odds, but with hard work and principled organizing, the future of Philadelphia just got a little brighter —**and we truly couldn't have made it here without your dedicated support.** [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDMdk0Xc5F3XT7oWSkA6eoLl1UnFTJ24A-l3Q4WdU-9r7Sle2vC2Jim2MtDh35ochwr2AFTlQ4KBbINs0BH_gq5ygDHG4QQHhn366jEW-vYhvdTwPRqWLOEP4zGd13-ZIrS9wROYSvOy9BjbZGBvv7tEglkD1Mtem9gwudsTMiDlBtfQKF4cEbkNrfbaGZt-H2isthU1ZfwdhvnK9iRMo98XdyIn7mJ2FRqn2TX8xL_daioqiq-PVNXK5ykqOd0jzI_ELN78Nkk7FBZ_X5GiM2BOCZWaJCnCQQFPeF8L17pR9SJdvqkPalVZlelT-8-8PQw/41k/TaL5lIE2QKWvNaJjUcCWNA/h0/ztdlhhPczijxNuuzzuw-wz3UPwagcHmKBEasn4N2QnM) When the haters and cynics tried to brush us off and when the dinosaurs let out their tiny roars, we let them know that we would not be intimidated. You stood with us and our vision for a city with fully-funded public schools, safe neighborhoods, affordable housing, and real opportunity for all — and we'll always be grateful. **But we're just getting started, Peter.** It's our mission to keep growing this movement for cities that work for all of us in the next four years and beyond. The best is yet to come. Philadelphia is now a two-party town: Democrats and the **Working Families Party.** Thank you again for everything, Kendra Brooks and Nicolas O’Rourke [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/mRshnjzLbfRUAJcmEcvG0z7LbPfEzyUQoTxoFfOCLCVbR0YoP-dpRE5F5UEI-u5cpPX-VxWByQULvSIsqxKWnABi31HOSJEFRIuqqnOjN1Fd-wDYxw2XcnGB6Xw5jjhWn-Jjy1-sRzi545UJfzdsxL4Tk7H_ogXRJ8vDfGl0ZEYHnfXUaUwmOAAgmq-yCkvAljH2bvrBOu16aAjVwUGHQOpaVivOisRFBwxuwWAAijJQrCIt8ResLibMFdHeNDqHTv53t_ZWjwdZHqwgIP69AUFnb2vE8-Fj5wSywjkNRLs/41k/TaL5lIE2QKWvNaJjUcCWNA/h1/83tVBsJ1-9hJlpioV5WSugWPffalwm62o6aKI8ew9Aw)[](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhpI1kLPEGRW4KnFarPJtxfN9U9y0YeH5CaLF3DG4soQc9Fq9LANWEBMX49kyPMFKjIlqTMHi2Pstd3KSCEuU5EA6O3FK3j6HP72f2h5d8XQSQUXXbsvY5G4647jWFx32dOohHSyhpuwivx1rDK37NbRlPNEvIQNj3EoNGGWKG7vKZBBG4QLRy8EBsZJLvZ_jmYs4V6d2YZolZI5Yu6lRYsyRN3tjW2bRme07yAFXSMgNXV2tU2-nT4r2vGTF5aKlfw/41k/TaL5lIE2QKWvNaJjUcCWNA/h2/s22MmCny6XQbqci8flZi5RlL5THj30cg2uKtgGyAOfw)[](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDE-osrDsyUs4KS0eRiq-k7Q-xOI-kLyL5jO9OnnCBTuKTKOAP3xe62fw4oxTKybpkOTSntik3_vaiUkOyb-EOPvS4cIwyz8VhFvlTcNMCUk5B3CeRpfXVxews78tjQZ7e08YuMltO_3qrLVikF2nsBCCvhNbvB5SOExNa9GLbFRavzF_6FiwWqnD24YDPt1EJ16AoaHqqrSxthAIKFyVa5MIc8tAYDy7_DKtV5BRmXVZWBuXCrZz4c_YwV9-3b7-0TVxCxJNvFYmgsQj0C4MZhU/41k/TaL5lIE2QKWvNaJjUcCWNA/h3/jEXMwblPR2rKCWHCTC2aF-6wLSd2rwp51zdjlwt-AMs) Thoughts? clean_body: Against all odds, but with hard work and principled organizing, the future of Philadelphia just got a little brighter — and we truly couldn't have made it here without your dedicated support. | | | Hi Peter, it's Kendra Brooks and Nicolas O’Rourke. As we look back on a whirlwind of an election cycle, we just wanted to reach out and thank you personally. Earlier this month, we made history (again) in Philadelphia — and together, we left the Republican Party in the dustbin of history in one of the biggest cities in the country. It brings both of us tremendous pride to be able to do the people's work, continue our fight for a city that invests in communities, and boldly represent Philadelphia’s working families on the City Council next year. Against all odds, but with hard work and principled organizing, the future of Philadelphia just got a little brighter —and we truly couldn't have made it here without your dedicated support. When the haters and cynics tried to brush us off and when the dinosaurs let out their tiny roars, we let them know that we would not be intimidated. You stood with us and our vision for a city with fully-funded public schools, safe neighborhoods, affordable housing, and real opportunity for all — and we'll always be grateful. But we're just getting started, Peter. It's our mission to keep growing this movement for cities that work for all of us in the next four years and beyond. The best is yet to come. Philadelphia is now a two-party town: Democrats and the Working Families Party. Thank you again for everything, Kendra Brooks and Nicolas O’Rourke Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. 🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=94c6bcdaaecb70e7baad1d6cc1ea9829fd977edab1178cf420d3496b7cea5eabf8e084fcb64759f9479a8b8f7b79ef23e68c349deefbfe943d81e25c50f4aa32
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=94c6bcdaaecb70e7fce5b8fdd75fd5fe11a87ac04b628093879663897d4e2217551bbf62088d0adec5f2c97fa087b5489e3efdadab974e801a1e39c88b0a81c6
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=94c6bcdaaecb70e7b28a655c71c0fdaf9c70ebb8f2fa879814ed4ed254e88ed7087390e9d76e7ac77d8a75557c1bbb0eadd7f923dadd7df5443a3d60b15faa8b

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=94c6bcdaaecb70e7b28a655c71c0fdaf9c70ebb8f2fa879814ed4ed254e88ed7087390e9d76e7ac77d8a75557c1bbb0eadd7f923dadd7df5443a3d60b15faa8b

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click here. Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! Get to Know Ron DeSantis Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules - I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). - This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. - I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. - I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

body:

[ ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0029f5a4d80a4196ac123e7978e233a8&_e=LUbCalL_BION0UiXXDRhWCz9KSjnAsTvaXI1ygdfLRwXu_q6TzaK0RMbaI1IMRqTW3HN-nU7F-JRwbYbolMSoxdC7NSc9s7zEzau42nJdxOXNngluPsE60rF_YkQRCyovN_wziotgHYgr9ilVUgiIjkVewDB9axJn3nI0ekznhgZSYneuU_7BwZKov7Y8bdviIuyk_zaglrMTsap-9OYdL5-AOUmw2RtSOH7qZUYg4qKN7Q8npe_5cJMrwtDNsJdxQ5U_WZt2KAGS7qiD30M0hHnQ_lDJBu9tIVKAsjt77pVF4ckPK096N4ytgi7gs-Drst_syJK9kGS1Z-HrzkeU8v65WaevWu9WHV51caPyZONPjhCMB7hEwLm9q80dIB5GEwv5AD6ab8A4SgA03JLhg%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American,

To my core, I believe the most important things in life are **faith, family, and freedom** - _but those foundations of our great country are under attack._

Right now, in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**_This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness._**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It’s the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

[**Today, to continue to help lead this critical fight, I need your financial support – to restore our country and defend our values. Will you please stand with me immediately?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0029f5a4d80a4196ac123e7978e233a8&_e=LUbCalL_BION0UiXXDRhWCz9KSjnAsTvaXI1ygdfLRwXu_q6TzaK0RMbaI1IMRqTW3HN-nU7F-JRwbYbolMSoxdC7NSc9s7zEzau42nJdxOXNngluPsE60rF_YkQRCyovN_wziotgHYgr9ilVUgiIjkVewDB9axJn3nI0ekznhgZSYneuU_7BwZKov7Y8bdviIuyk_zaglrMTsap-9OYdL5-AOUmw2RtSOH7qZUYg4qKN7Q8npe_5cJMrwtDNsJdk-6liPEzfsqJHHXwEA-YxQhrATCmfYnrYnc8-3azZA4Ex7VlDy4dkFhmQQFnKQ8Soq49MQeRBpGc16pU5Aeo9d17MArpb5795UY95jl5fF2zz4iw45PEO5J11iD3zNfJiZ-Qy5ytiBjdKZc50w_Ccg%3D%3D)

[** CHIP IN > **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0029f5a4d80a4196ac123e7978e233a8&_e=LUbCalL_BION0UiXXDRhWCz9KSjnAsTvaXI1ygdfLRwXu_q6TzaK0RMbaI1IMRqTW3HN-nU7F-JRwbYbolMSoxdC7NSc9s7zEzau42nJdxOXNngluPsE60rF_YkQRCyovN_wziotgHYgr9ilVUgiIjkVewDB9axJn3nI0ekznhgZSYneuU_7BwZKov7Y8bdviIuyk_zaglrMTsap-9OYdL5-AOUmw2RtSOH7qZUYg4qKN7Q8npe_5cJMrwtDNsJdqMa8j4sIM3FaDCv5BEqLT248Mspr44Fm5QibNLUXJqSsQdPEDi47NFRuLQBB6x-vf2yjiS0eu1EejmK7N_5kmvxiL523pr_I3Ep905vfhOUR7LEpXtktBTNSmyHJae-H8RuI8TwlGLxQCNHzWAD_AQ%3D%3D)

Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we’re running out of time. I’m not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. [**We simply must make a change before it’s too late.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0029f5a4d80a4196ac123e7978e233a8&_e=LUbCalL_BION0UiXXDRhWCz9KSjnAsTvaXI1ygdfLRwXu_q6TzaK0RMbaI1IMRqTW3HN-nU7F-JRwbYbolMSoxdC7NSc9s7zEzau42nJdxOXNngluPsE60rF_YkQRCyovN_wziotgHYgr9ilVUgiIjkVewDB9axJn3nI0ekznhgZSYneuU_7BwZKov7Y8bdviIuyk_zaglrMTsap-9OYdL5-AOUmw2RtSOH7qZUYg4qKN7Q8npe_5cJMrwtDNsJd_cAx2OXf5SHzdDrj7fUJTaEFe2YBqQewNawmGmJLLRIVjoCHHKeUYAR8-ZRhn-ZaIZHvBpmqKdX4nCj2WJHZXonj-VFyyUaJPy4rD4h7eb8sSiSMU-F0-RzdNJzmFHVgM1Y8oa7vd8OfXi9RmNS9qg%3D%3D)

The path we’re on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still can turn this country around - _**IF**_ conscientious conservatives across America stand up RIGHT NOW.

We MUST act, and we must do so today.

[**Can you pitch in right now to help save our country?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0029f5a4d80a4196ac123e7978e233a8&_e=LUbCalL_BION0UiXXDRhWCz9KSjnAsTvaXI1ygdfLRwXu_q6TzaK0RMbaI1IMRqTW3HN-nU7F-JRwbYbolMSoxdC7NSc9s7zEzau42nJdxOXNngluPsE60rF_YkQRCyovN_wziotgHYgr9ilVUgiIjkVewDB9axJn3nI0ekznhgZSYneuU_7BwZKov7Y8bdviIuyk_zaglrMTsap-9OYdL5-AOUmw2RtSOH7qZUYg4qKN7Q8npe_5cJMrwtDNsJdsh5tbicMV-Q-q8Vzdep2cI-F_n8E2pqtD6rT_w4vQodMvWdYAv0KoD9g0oRRQjL-xYBcr_OgtZPxxz0KG-_dVtTY-PQ6DWNkEeEz6B_v7yZdI_mf2Ptti9N9Fdk7inlYGr-ANg9JlalhLvWJW7zsBg%3D%3D)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER JOHNSON > **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0029f5a4d80a4196ac123e7978e233a8&_e=LUbCalL_BION0UiXXDRhWCz9KSjnAsTvaXI1ygdfLRwXu_q6TzaK0RMbaI1IMRqTW3HN-nU7F-JRwbYbolMSoxdC7NSc9s7zEzau42nJdxOXNngluPsE60rF_YkQRCyovN_wziotgHYgr9ilVUgiIjkVewDB9axJn3nI0ekznhgZSYneuU_7BwZKov7Y8bdviIuyk_zaglrMTsap-9OYdL5-AOUmw2RtSOH7qZUYg4qKN7Q8npe_5cJMrwtDNsJdu-1nrbbFNOnNL1y0gEtWhkcwiUY5uR7A46IYBtf6XItNOcddbeqNEvVbYeWQHXDGH31tGKFrx9FhaU3xl7fiigZlD6bW4GEiEUz1Ok2UDQVQJz4xo-RR7qamvXiLEP-CKxP4FI2h8XvYxPJhqYAbMg%3D%3D)

Thank you for all you do, and God bless.

[ ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0029f5a4d80a4196ac123e7978e233a8&_e=LUbCalL_BION0UiXXDRhWCz9KSjnAsTvaXI1ygdfLRwXu_q6TzaK0RMbaI1IMRqTW3HN-nU7F-JRwbYbolMSoxdC7NSc9s7zEzau42nJdxOXNngluPsE60rF_YkQRCyovN_wziotgHYgr9ilVUgiIjkVewDB9axJn3nI0ekznhgZSYneuU_7BwZKov7Y8bdviIuyk_zaglrMTsap-9OYdL5-AOUmw2RtSOH7qZUYg4qKN7Q8npe_5cJMrwtDNsJd9ygsp4o9VIJolnXW5UoM6Duqy81lIDsneUoQvn_y5ne1n2u9EiE6Q5UlT7_j9BpQBz4bVje-XO6KnUNjqiAgRZpOZ61JC_NEM-IB-5ePw4uipGB7gXUIyomFFtIjpSn6JVPN7lB4osf56dFnyRC19Q%3D%3D)

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

| **_MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

[**WILL YOU STAND WITH MIKE?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0029f5a4d80a4196ac123e7978e233a8&_e=LUbCalL_BION0UiXXDRhWCz9KSjnAsTvaXI1ygdfLRwXu_q6TzaK0RMbaI1IMRqTW3HN-nU7F-JRwbYbolMSoxdC7NSc9s7zEzau42nJdxOXNngluPsE60rF_YkQRCyovN_wziotgHYgr9ilVUgiIjkVewDB9axJn3nI0ekznhgZSYneuU_7BwZKov7Y8bdviIuyk_zaglrMTsap-9OYdL5-AOUmw2RtSOH7qZUYg4qKN7Q8npe_5cJMrwtDNsJdOV6_Ye1AhEUUj14kLZ-kl-WfH40lkE3mn0HHDt2Oxz1lQlouM40oMfP-iCBRwUtA795s1vUqHINDtmzS7WexvU3KO2ekcgxcAfpsqpq3AtK7-TojP-TrIiCsA0G3H_2CZWBjxIaTC5mAmAR-ccZoZg%3D%3D)

Kansas City Chiefs tight end Travis Kelce's mom was seen pretending to work at Raising Cane's on Monday in Kansas City prior to Monday Night's Chiefs vs Eagles Game. Graves has also made donations to Louisiana Senator Bill Cassidy, who has said Trump needs to drop out of the presidential race.

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, **It wasn’t long ago that The New York Sun, one of my favorite papers, became the exclusive publisher of my columns. ****In the short time that’s passed, the Sun’s mission has become more urgent than ever.****

**It’s been obvious to many of us for some time that journalism in our country has become corrupted.

More dangerous than the ideological implication is the fact that we’re left with precious few to hold our country’s most powerful institutions to account. Our justice system, law enforcement, universities, major corporations and government agencies have become politicized beyond recognition and act with impunity.

**The Sun is brave and relentless**. Every day it tackles head-on the most important issues facing our country. It truly holds the powerful to account.

It acts as a true newspaper should, in the service of traditional American values and the American people.

The Sun has a long history leading the charge. Its commitment to the finest journalistic standards goes all the way back to its founding in 1833.

The Sun is now growing at a rapid pace, but we’re up against some of the world’s largest media conglomerates. **To win, we need you to join us**. Every single person counts.

| |
Friend,

Since 2019, **_Thanksgiving costs have increased by 25%_** , according to a new report from the American Farm Bureau Federation.

The simple truth is that my tax-and-spend opponent, Jim Costa, has been a top lieutenant for the devastating Bidenomics inflation explosion. Costa has voted time and time again for out-of-control taxes and spending.

Let’s make Thanksgiving affordable for every American once again. **As your next Congressman, I will vote to lower taxes and work to reverse the Biden/Costa price inflation damage. **

Be part of the Maher for Congress team to get our economy moving back in the right direction.

Click the [Join the Team](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=4567422c07&e=1722d05e10) or [$5 Friday](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=14fdfa2368&e=1722d05e10) donate button to help us win and make the changes our Central Valley families and neighbors need!

name: Courier HQ
subject: NPR: Fighting false election claims “may be harder in 2024”
body:
Courier’s mission will be more important than ever in 2024.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73906483/440044638/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzIxNjkwMzItZWY4YS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UjsD7Gs-n_UVSJnWhBLaF_oE6i_fF8fY-gVOQo7VkFA=&emci=2e169032-ef8a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=32169032-ef8a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
**A new NPR report details why countering false election claims may be even harder in 2024:**
[****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73906484/440044639/-924895370?refcode=em20231124&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzIxNjkwMzItZWY4YS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UjsD7Gs-n_UVSJnWhBLaF_oE6i_fF8fY-gVOQo7VkFA=)
_Why?_ Republicans are waging a coordinated legal and political campaign to create the false idea that efforts to stop election lies and conspiracy theories are “censorship.”
As a result, many of the post-2020 efforts to combat election misinformation have been scaled back or dismantled entirely.
_**According to NPR, one election official described the chilling effect of Republican efforts, saying: “Everyone is gun shy.”**_
By actively undermining efforts to stop election lies, **Republicans are rigging the game** so people like Donald Trump can continue to spread election lies unchecked.
[**That’s why the work we’re doing at Courier will be more important than ever in next year’s elections. Will you donate $5 to help our nine newsrooms across the country deliver the real, fact-based journalism readers deserve?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73906485/440044640/27526728?refcode=em20231124&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzIxNjkwMzItZWY4YS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UjsD7Gs-n_UVSJnWhBLaF_oE6i_fF8fY-gVOQo7VkFA=)
We’ve already seen what happens when election lies go unchecked. After the 2020 election, Donald Trump used right-wing media like Fox News and One America News Network to spread ‘the Big Lie.’
Two months later, rioters stormed the Capitol, many sincerely believing Trump’s baseless lie that Democrats had stolen the election.
Nearly three years later, our democracy is still reeling. **A recent CNN poll found that an overwhelming majority of Republican and Republican-leaning voters (nearly 70%) still believe that the election was stolen.**
**We founded Courier Newsroom as a direct response to this toxic dynamic.**
**The coming election will be a true test of our democracy’s strength.** At Courier, we’re dedicated to providing fact-based journalism to communities where election lies spread. But we can only continue to do this with your support, Peter,.
[**Please — make a $5 contribution now to support Courier’s work >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73906486/440044641/27526728?refcode=em20231124&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzIxNjkwMzItZWY4YS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UjsD7Gs-n_UVSJnWhBLaF_oE6i_fF8fY-gVOQo7VkFA=)
[Contribute ➡️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73906487/440044642/-924895370?refcode=em20231124&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzIxNjkwMzItZWY4YS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UjsD7Gs-n_UVSJnWhBLaF_oE6i_fF8fY-gVOQo7VkFA=)
Thank you,
Courier HQ

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73906495/440044708/1666406465?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzljMjk0Mi1lZjhhLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RxqPvyN3CCehmBg-7I3Qd6ULJ9jdN5ao3Xhbnm9WlFI=)
Friend, Wes didn’t want to write this email, so I will. Most folks are spending this holiday weekend with family and loved ones...which means less people are opening, clicking, and donating to our emails. (Trust me, I check the numbers a lot!) subject: my coming out experience

body:
After all these years, I can’t think of a stronger rebuke of Calvert's long-standing, anti-LGBTQ agenda than by replacing him with an openly gay prosecutor like Will, who will uphold the law and fight for equal rights.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73906593/440045055/395234972?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2023-11-24_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFiYzhlMzZhLWVmOGEtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AVT80D8oIzCAWk9pqjenax7GiaeM8jck8TXE3b3M-uE=)
---
Hi there, Peter, it's Mark Takano.

I'm reaching out to ask you to split a [_**$10 donation**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73906594/440045056/395234972?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2023-11-24_1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFiYzhlMzZhLWVmOGEtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AVT80D8oIzCAWk9pqjenax7GiaeM8jck8TXE3b3M-uE=) between Fight for Progress and Will Rollins’ campaign before his next deadline hits. Before I do, I want to be vulnerable for a moment and share a personal story about my coming out experience.

In 1994, my Republican opponent outed me as gay by sending out bigoted, homophobic campaign mailers in our race.

This was before I'd even come out publicly.

Coming out is an extremely personal moment, so you can imagine my horror finding out I had been outed so publicly -- and in such a hateful way.

**And you might be familiar with the person who did it -- Ken Calvert, the same Republican that Will Rollins is now running to unseat.**

Calvert blamed “the times” and claims he has since changed, but his attacks on the LGBTQ community haven’t. He voted against the Matthew Shepard hate crimes bill. He voted against gay adoption and voted to keep us out of the military.

**After all these years, I can’t think of a stronger rebuke of Calvert's long-standing, anti-LGBTQ agenda than by replacing him with an openly gay prosecutor like Will, who will uphold the law and fight for equal rights.**

[_**Will’s race happens to be one of the most consequential elections in the country in the Democrats’ effort to retake the House. He can win, but he’ll need your support to do it. If you can, please split a contribution of $10 or more between FIght for Progress and Will’s campaign before their next fundraising deadline.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73906595/440045057/395234972?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2023-11-24_1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFiYzhlMzZhLWVmOGEtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AVT80D8oIzCAWk9pqjenax7GiaeM8jck8TXE3b3M-uE=)

clean_body: After all these years, I can’t think of a stronger rebuke of Calvert's long-standing, anti-LGBTQ agenda than by replacing him with an openly gay prosecutor like Will, who will uphold the law and fight for equal rights. | = Hi there, Peter, it's Mark Takano. I'm reaching out to ask you to split a = between Fight for Progress and Will Rollins’ campaign before his next deadline hits. Before I do, I want to be vulnerable for a moment and share a personal story about my coming out experience. In 1994, my Republican opponent outed me as gay by sending out bigoted, homophobic campaign mailers in our race. This was before I'd even come out publicly. Coming out is an extremely personal moment, so you can imagine my horror finding out I had been outed so publicly -- and in such a hateful way. And you might be familiar with the person who did it -- Ken Calvert, the same Republican that Will Rollins is now running to unseat. Calvert blamed “the times” and claims he has since changed, but his attacks on the LGBTQ community haven’t. He voted against the Matthew Shepard hate crimes bill. He voted against gay adoption and voted to keep us out of the military. After all these years, I can’t think of a stronger rebuke of Calvert's long-standing, anti-LGBTQ agenda than by replacing him with an openly gay prosecutor like Will, who will uphold the law and fight for equal rights. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Mark * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. | | Patriot, I’ve never been more thankful for our incredible supporters like _**YOU**_.

---
That’s why, even though our VIP contest for my year-end reception _technically_ closed Sunday night, I couldn’t possibly pick just one VIP Guest. _What can I say – I have a big heart!_
---
**So, I’ll be hosting BACK-TO-BACK END-OF-YEAR RECEPTIONS in Florida to close out 2023 as we celebrate our historic DOMINATION of Crooked Joe in all the polls!**_
_
---
And just like the first reception, I’ll cover your flight and hotel, you’ll get to enjoy hors d'oeuvres and refreshments on me, and we’ll even take a photo together at this December 6 reception so that you can always remember this special night.

---
_And all you have to do is enter to WIN!_
