name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Urgent: Your American Dream is at Stake
body:
American Cornerstone Institute
But there is hope.

188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb |
---
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/MkgUA9JFvbUXMp14I5wKAg~~/AARclAA~)
---
| Dear Fellow American,

As you know, our nation is experiencing a time of great turbulence. The fundamental American values that have undergirded our society since its founding are being challenged and, sadly, eroded. These values--faith, liberty, community, and life--are the cornerstones that have made our country not just good, but great, the greatest the world has ever seen.

As individuals, we hold dear to these principles. Collectively, they make up the American Dream--a shared belief that liberty and prosperity are within every person's reach through hard work and resolve. [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/MkgUA9JFvbUXMp14I5wKAg~~/AARclAA~) I fear, however, that this dream is being threatened. Ideologies that directly oppose these time-honored values are gaining traction, driven by a prevailing political climate that seems to value uniformity over diversity of thought.

**But there is hope.**

I believe that together, we can challenge this dangerous trajectory and restore our foundational values. I have penned a petition--a statement of belief--affirming faith, liberty, community, and life. But I cannot do it alone. **Your voice is needed.**

[Join me, and sign this petition today.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/MkgUA9JFvbUXMp14I5wKAg~~/AARclAA~)

This is a critical moment for each of us individually, and for our country as a whole. Let's secure the American dream for ourselves, our children, and generations to come.

Thank you in advance for your willingness to stand with me.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---

name: House Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: It’s all coordinated. And it’s all preplanned.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising
body:
Please read the following message.

My fellow Americans - this is Mike
Johnson.

This is a longer email but I'm humbly
asking you to read it start to finish.

Why? Because the moment I was elected
Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY
unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me.

The Liberal Media spun up hit piece
after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press
Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC.

Politico fired off this headline:
"Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson."

And I can't even begin to tell you
how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the
minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the
next FEC reports.

Look:

These vicious attacks are a dime a
dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. But I'll let you
in on a little secret: that's not really the goal…

The real goal of this political ambush
is two-fold: 1) smear the good names of every House Republican to
hurt them electorally, and 2) scare Liberals enough to whip out
their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats.

It's about power and money. Nothing
else.

That's why it's mission-critical that
we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. So as
one of my first moves as Speaker, I'm teaming up with my fellow
Louisianian - Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to set a goal of
raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.

It's ambitious. I get it. But that's
the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in
battleground races across the country.

If we fall short of that, we'll be
forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital
outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing
could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House
Majority.

So here's my final pitch to you:

We urgently need your help. Not next
week, not in the new year - right here and right now.

The difference between a strong
Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine
will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this.

Let me make myself perfectly clear:

I'm not asking you to pitch in more
than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be
tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I
would be equally appreciative.

The ONLY thing I ask is for every
Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.

That will be the difference between
victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in?

YES >>_NO >>

Thanks for all you do.

In liberty,

Speaker Mike Johnson

This is Steve Scalise.

As your Majority Leader, I'm respectfully asking
you to fill out my MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY at your earliest
convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your
concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else.

What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm
taking on the Radical Democrats?

START MY MAJORITY LEADER
SURVEY >>

Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising
committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and
EYE OF THE TIGER PAC.

Team Scalise is committed to defending our Conservative House
majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you
for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to
dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative
grassroots network.

Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee,
are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income
tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks,
labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and
federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law
requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the
name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each
individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year.

You can donate via mail by sending a check to:

320 First Street SE

2nd Floor

Washington, DC 20003

Privacy Policy

DCDailyJournal.com

525-K East Market Street # 114

City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176

© Copyright DCDailyJournal.com All Rights
Reserved.

You were added to the system July 13, 2023.

body:
The rematch is on. Don’t sit this one out!

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73909879/440054290/1013293294?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20231124_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjI4Y2E3Zi1mNzhhLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sqVjMkXFfsDln6WagfRGKafh4R61kSyv2L9NaMvBPA8=) **Peter, I’ve got a huge announcement that should bring a smile to your face and hope to your heart:** former federal prosecutor, Will Rollins announced his campaign for Congress in California’s 41st district -- one of the most important races in the country in the effort by Democrats to retake the House.

Will stunned political experts in 2022 when he came so close to winning against right wing Republican, Ken Calvert. It ended up being one of the closest races in the country. He outperformed every projection and was the only Democratic challenger in California to win the independent vote. That’s a big deal.

There is no question in my mind that in this upcoming election, with the Presidency on the ballot, the larger turnout will be the key to victory IF we have a strong campaign.

I have committed my energy, time and money to this race and today I am asking you to start Will off with a show of support that will send him a message that we are behind him 100 percent.

[**I’ll share more about why I'm backing Will, but first, I have an important request: Could you split a $3 donation between Will’s campaign and Mark Takano to help him campaign with strength? They have a big fundraising deadline tonight. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73909880/440054291/1013293294?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20231124_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjI4Y2E3Zi1mNzhhLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sqVjMkXFfsDln6WagfRGKafh4R61kSyv2L9NaMvBPA8=) | [CHIP IN $3 TO SUPPORT LGBTQ CHAMPIONS WILL ROLLINS AND MARK TAKANO »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73909881/440054292/1013293294?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20231124_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjI4Y2E3Zi1mNzhhLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sqVjMkXFfsDln6WagfRGKafh4R61kSyv2L9NaMvBPA8=)
---
Here’s why Democrats across the country should pay close attention to this race:
1. **We need candidates like Will in Congress.** As a former federal prosecutor, he understands the ongoing danger that extremism poses to our democracy. He brought justice to insurrectionists, and I know he'll take the oath to defend democracy as seriously now as he did in the Justice Department.
2. **Retaking the House runs through CA-41.** After the new lines were drawn, CA-41 became a true swing seat. It’s the type of district Democrats MUST WIN to regain Congress.
3. **GOP super PACs.** Despite the tough midterm environment in 2022, Will was the third most “overperforming” Dem challenger in the country. He was also heavily outspent by the GOP’s dark money machine. If Democrats help Will keep pace, he can flip this seat!
4. **Will’s opponent Ken Calvert has got to go.** Calvert voted to overturn the 2020 presidential election. He backs the extreme ban on abortion -- including for instances of rape, and wants doctors who perform them to go to jail. CA-41 is home to one of the most LGBTQ-friendly cities in Palm Springs, yet Calvert staunchly opposes gay marriage.

The rematch is on, folks. Will came so close to winning in 2022, and this is our chance to finish the job. But it depends on widespread, grassroots support.

[**Please split a $3 contribution between Will Rollins’ campaign for Congress and Mark Takano today. I’m telling you, this will be one of the most critical races in the country, so don’t sit this one out! We need lots of Democrats to step up right out of the gate. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73909882/440054293/1013293294?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20231124_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjI4Y2E3Zi1mNzhhLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sqVjMkXFfsDln6WagfRGKafh4R61kSyv2L9NaMvBPA8=)

clean_body: The rematch is on. Don’t sit this one out! | = Peter, I’ve got a huge announcement that should bring a smile to your face and hope to your heart: former federal prosecutor, Will Rollins announced his campaign for Congress in California’s 41st district -- one of the most important races in the country in the effort by Democrats to retake the House. Will stunned political experts in 2022 when he came so close to winning against right wing Republican, Ken Calvert. It ended up being one of the closest races in the country. He outperformed every projection and was the only Democratic challenger in California to win the independent vote. That’s a big deal. There is no question in my mind that in this upcoming election, with the Presidency on the ballot, the larger turnout will be the key to victory IF we have a strong campaign. I have committed my energy, time and money to this race and today I am asking you to start Will off with a show of support that will send him a message that we are behind him 100 percent. = | = Here’s why Democrats across the country should pay close attention to this race: 1. We need candidates like Will in Congress. As a former federal prosecutor, he understands the ongoing danger that extremism poses to our democracy. He brought justice to insurrectionists, and I know he'll take the oath to defend democracy as seriously now as he did in the Justice Department. 2. Retaking the House runs through CA-41. After the new lines were drawn, CA-41 became a true swing seat. It’s the type of district Democrats MUST WIN to regain Congress. 3. GOP super PACs. Despite the tough midterm environment in 2022, Will was the third most “overperforming” Dem challenger in the country. He was also heavily outspent by the GOP’s dark money machine. If Democrats help Will keep pace, he can flip this seat! 4. Will’s opponent Ken Calvert has got to go. Calvert voted to overturn the 2020 presidential election. He backs the extreme ban on abortion -- including for instances of rape, and wants doctors who perform them to go to jail. CA-41 is home to one of the most LGBTQ-friendly cities in Palm Springs, yet Calvert staunchly opposes gay marriage. The rematch is on, folks. Will came so close to winning in 2022, and this is our chance to finish the job. But it depends on widespread, grassroots support. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Will Rollins and Mark Takano will go through immediately: = = = Thanks, Barbara Boxer Former U.S. Senator, California | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. While there are more than 50 of these suits still currently pending in the country, we consider these to be among the most serious challenges. The Left has not and will not stop fighting. But neither will we. - | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. ---
Republican Celeste Maloy has won the highly contested special election in Utah’s 2nd Congressional District, beating state Sen. Kathleen Riebe, a self-described moderate, according to the Associated Press. This victory fills the last remaining open seat in the U.S. House of Representatives. The special election was triggered by the resignation of former Republican Rep. Chris ..

name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: I wanted to share these photos from our event
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73923004/440063403/17193116?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20231124_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2ExYTFlMi1mZjhhLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZSIokX0Y0ga5e1WR0gkvcGZnKD6_wetIN0cpQ0tFqds=&emci=c2b62e96-de8a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=03a1a1e2-ff8a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=13891387) Folks, This month, our campaign hosted our second annual Women with Nikki Luncheon in Springfield, Illinois. Over 300 women from Central and Southern Illinois joined us for an important discussion on how women are uniquely equipped to lead during challenging times. Every year, we’re going to grow this event, because as the first woman to represent Illinois’ 13th Congressional District, allowing space for conversations like this is incredibly important to me. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73923005/440063404/17193116?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20231124_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2ExYTFlMi1mZjhhLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZSIokX0Y0ga5e1WR0gkvcGZnKD6_wetIN0cpQ0tFqds=&emci=c2b62e96-de8a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=03a1a1e2-ff8a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=13891387) I led a panel discussion featuring women mayors throughout the district who have firsthand experience in leading their communities through crises, including rebuilding cities post-COVID and extreme weather events that caused day long power outages. We all agreed that we need leaders who are sensitive to the stress and frustration people are feeling, who can pivot, and display honesty and integrity — traits that an analysis in the _Harvard Business Review_ found are more likely found in women leaders. **There are more men named “Mike” who serve as committee chairs in Congress than there are women committee chairs total. It’s time for a change.** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73923006/440063405/17193116?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20231124_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2ExYTFlMi1mZjhhLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZSIokX0Y0ga5e1WR0gkvcGZnKD6_wetIN0cpQ0tFqds=&emci=c2b62e96-de8a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=03a1a1e2-ff8a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=13891387)** I’ve never been one to sit on the sidelines, and since coming to Congress, I’ve used compassion and understanding to listen to my constituents and work across the aisle to find solutions to the issues concerning them the most. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73923007/440063407/17193116?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20231124_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2ExYTFlMi1mZjhhLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZSIokX0Y0ga5e1WR0gkvcGZnKD6_wetIN0cpQ0tFqds=&emci=c2b62e96-de8a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=03a1a1e2-ff8a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=13891387) I look forward to continuing my work and welcoming women of all backgrounds to step up and join me as a voice for working families and a more equal and just future in Congress. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73923009/440063409/17193116?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20231124_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2ExYTFlMi1mZjhhLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZSIokX0Y0ga5e1WR0gkvcGZnKD6_wetIN0cpQ0tFqds=&emci=c2b62e96-de8a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=03a1a1e2-ff8a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=13891387) If our Women with Nikki luncheon showed us anything, it’s that women across our district are**fired up** and ready to keep fighting in Congress to advance our shared values. **[There’s too much on the line to stop building on our momentum, so I hope I can count on you to take the next step and join our efforts to reach voters across the district:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73923011/440063410/17193116?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20231124_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2ExYTFlMi1mZjhhLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZSIokX0Y0ga5e1WR0gkvcGZnKD6_wetIN0cpQ0tFqds=&emci=c2b62e96-de8a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=03a1a1e2-ff8a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=13891387)** | [GET INVOLVED](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73923014/440063412/17193116?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20231124_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2ExYTFlMi1mZjhhLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZSIokX0Y0ga5e1WR0gkvcGZnKD6_wetIN0cpQ0tFqds=&emci=c2b62e96-de8a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=03a1a1e2-ff8a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=13891387)
---
Thank you for your support. I’ll be in touch with more updates soon!
— Nikki

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: I don't want to be alone. Help me support local candidates and organizations.
body:
Movement for ceasefire starts locally. | | |
---
Friend, Our government continues to find billions of U.S. taxpayer dollars to fund war, while claiming there's not enough to meet Americans’ basic needs, including clean drinking water. Amidst a rise in antisemitic, Islamophobic, and anti-Arab hate crimes, we also continue to see violence against Black people, Indigenous people, other people of color, and LGBTQ+ people. So many local and state elected officials have supported our work on making water a human right, pushed back on “development” projects that push out our residents, taken on corporate polluters, and now back the demand for a ceasefire. **Marginalized communities are feeling unheard and betrayed. There's still so much to do to build the true multiracial democracy we need, and to ensure our communities’ safety and well-being.** Last year in Michigan, my Rooted in Community Leadership PAC supported dozens of candidates and grassroots organizations at the state and local level―donating more than $128,000 to build progressive political power and invest directly in our communities. * * *

At DASS we believe our democracy is strongest when voting is safe, transparent, and most importantly, accessible.

**That’s why we’re strong supporters of vote-by-mail.**

_Even Donald Trump_ used to vote by mail before he decided that conspiracy theories were better for his political pursuits. And his followers have zero evidence of widespread fraud despite countless court cases alleging it!

But some Republicans are now waking up to the fact that these lies are hurting their turnout efforts, so they’re slowly embracing vote-by-mail!

We're glad the GOP is finally coming around, but we need to continue fighting to expand voting access - because it's the right thing to do, not because it's politically convenient.

[Vote By Mail is not only safe, but necessary to ensure voting access for _all_ Americans from every walk of life. But we want to know where you stand: ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73925788/440065439/2112843391?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODA4NjkxMy0wNDhiLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eqNWvtJ_zmPM8ANoP3auY2lQqetLp5ryjSDNSEwdfUI=&emci=a36c04eb-9c88-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=48086913-048b-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=26828920)

But some Republicans are now waking up to the fact that these lies are hurting their turnout efforts, so they’re slowly embracing vote-by-mail! name: Arvina Martin
subject: Celebrating Native American Heritage Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America This email was sent by Emerge America
body:
Peter,
---
My name is Arvina Martin, and I am the Executive Director of Emerge Wisconsin. I am also an enrolled member of the Ho-Chunk Nation, and am Stockbridge-Munsee. I was proud to be the first Native person ever elected to Madison, Wisconsin’s Common Council. I've spent my career working with Native communities and in grassroots politics, and I'm excited to share my message with you today.
Yesterday was Native American Heritage Day. **To celebrate this important day, I wanted to make sure you got the chance to read these stories about three incredible Native alums of Emerge.** Their stories are the Emerge story, and we hope you'll take a moment to learn about the impact that your support can have.
Piinagigi for being part of this team!
Arvina Martin
Executive Director, Emerge Wisconsin
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Team Emerge**
Date: Fri, Nov 10, 2023
Subject: Celebrating Our Indigenous Alums! 🎉
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73926361/440067351/-1986725773?amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=jtk1370-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzMDkwNmM1LTA0OGItZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_-UvGkiscQYWOLaGYjr2e9MQUJO7Zv7Glqbkz5sq4bk=)
---
Peter – it’s Native American Heritage Month, and we’re celebrating Emerge’s visionary Indigenous alums changing the face of politics right now. We can’t wait to introduce you!
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73926362/440067352/-1986725773?amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=jtk1370-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzMDkwNmM1LTA0OGItZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_-UvGkiscQYWOLaGYjr2e9MQUJO7Zv7Glqbkz5sq4bk=)
You may know that **Secretary Deb Haaland (Emerge New Mexico)** made history as the **FIRST Native American to serve as a cabinet secretary.** But that’s not Haaland’s only historic first. When she ran for New Mexico’s first congressional district in 2018 and WON, she became **one of the first Native American women ever elected to Congress.** Haaland has worked tirelessly for over a decade to build a truly inclusive democracy in the U.S.
**April Fournier (Emerge Maine**) made history as the **FIRST Native American woman to serve on the Portland City Council.** She brings her vast experience as a community organizer and advocate to this work, helping to ensure that the needs of all of Portland's residents are heard. April is a member of the Diné (Navajo) Nation. **Ronalda Tome-Warito (Emerge New Mexico)** is going to be the **FIRST Indigenous woman to sit on the Albuquerque School Board.** She has served on multiple educational committees and boards at the state and national levels and has worked with parents and schools for more than 20 years. Tome-Warito has been influential in the growth of New Mexico and Colorado’s education systems and her voice is a much-needed addition to the Albuquerque School Board.
Peter, we are stronger, more resilient, and more just as a country when our elected officials reflect the full range of our identities, cultures, and experiences.

**By empowering more Indigenous women to run for office at every level, Emerge is making major strides toward building the democracy all our communities deserve. But we need your help to build on success and see MORE Indigenous women in politics. **
**[So please: Will you donate $10 or more to Emerge now to recruit, train, and empower bold Democratic women to run and win in 2024 and beyond?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73926363/440067353/-1986725773?amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=jtk1370-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzMDkwNmM1LTA0OGItZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_-UvGkiscQYWOLaGYjr2e9MQUJO7Zv7Glqbkz5sq4bk=)**
| | [SUPPORT EMERGE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73926364/440067354/-1986725773?amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=jtk1370-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzMDkwNmM1LTA0OGItZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_-UvGkiscQYWOLaGYjr2e9MQUJO7Zv7Glqbkz5sq4bk=)
---
Thank you for being a part of our movement,

Team Emerge
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
Email is an important way for Emerge America to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. If you no longer want to hear from Emerge America, click here to [unsubscribe](https://secure.everyaction.com/p/ZShko813aE2PbaayjFt-qw2?unsubscribedata=GLXIZxfeRhtydiGZY0DcZMB6CqlH5tqowTrOpGj8NzZ4Av5%2BDjmC2NY%2FNndHqZ3ut38ulo0xDObwmqmzrp7TF3zpdwGsxfZSXN2G2v4eY6xapOeaZXGWXXzQPRuSI%2FygePZ2Xk1miOcJnO3X3eIK93xHP%2FPKjPOqUn9%2FgeOEClXB3jf7fN8HzGvb5N7HDMsXtz6B1Bnb2QQulB0xsPiKD98gVYoBLCQNZitHJzN4Y3hziJUlhi2PdbmW0p6VLel0LUm273QmZcH5WvbzeaWNnyyGuRan%2BxbGHAWu3a5mZE9vbH41BK9WAjL2cXZwgz9s%2FVCwaapdhEOK9Hye1US5NyATYRQGQmLaMo4gav7fXuqPLd0csaq9TfR%2ByFQWaMDpVAZgKMowvSOl1zXxg7i3qoY4LOdGNcAVKM0xDUgJW0I%3D) off all our lists instantly. Questions or concerns? [Contact us here.](mailto:connect@emergeamerica.org) Paid for by Emerge America This email was sent by Emerge America

name: Rocky Ratliff
subject: The man who enabled my abuse serves in Congress
body:
My name is Rocky Ratliff, I am a former OSU wrestler and survivor of systemic sexual abuse and assault perpetrated by OSU Doctor Richard Strauss | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wBNshDOzLJMfORfziRODTfYxgBKM8hWkiwXtP6XutktV22TP9yKGKy-UGyC2BrtGBuMY4H3c14a03rij_zrU4rlwIy0cod9nqMhKXqpIjeSN4nHENoBlC3nu63Qawg0BfYU-WqkbGFy9olX_qdiRji40QXri6ytWUVo-QwXx9akA8S0nO3qDLHvsLabkvQzhhxMVobXAYfzVozTVFnQx5qYBrg2ULYNVVYGy9975VrWBI_1nbP4oq1UWUA4SwW6fqHDs7BSdvXM2jron_atmzqrcnZvOd2dTbL5QMvsFU3D-BVe-HiLtklevNT55RJQG9H4fWn6zbrVSNA0288aGAb/41k/v-yCcYKVSFykHHZRV0Pukg/h0/9IPJ70C861HAJNzkiRjVtIxnV3DmOT9VXiljyWxg7ec)
---
Team, My name is Rocky Ratliff, I am a former OSU wrestler and survivor of systemic sexual abuse and assault perpetrated by OSU Doctor Richard Strauss. Also, I am an Attorney representing forty-two (42) Plaintiff/Survivors, which includes my own case, against The Ohio State University in the case entitled Knight et. al. v. The Ohio State University filed in the United States District Court for the Southern District of Ohio. For decades, OSU Doctor Richard Strauss sexually abused hundreds of men, including me. OSU received credible and detailed reports of sexual abuse against its students and athletes that were ignored, swept under the rug, concealed, and covered up. Some reports were even shredded by OSU employees. The reports of sexual abuse were given to coaches, athletic trainers, athletic directors, administrators, etc. A $6.8 million-dollar independent investigation was conducted and confirmed that at least 177 OSU student athletes had been sexually abused and OSU turned a blind eye to said abuse. It has been widely reported that one of the OSU Coaches that received reports of abuse and knew of this abusive environment was **Jim Jordan**. As the Head Assistant Wrestling Coach, Jim Jordan would have interacted with victims of Strauss’ sexual abuse daily. Like other OSU Coaches, Jim Jordan brushed off most of the reports. Although dozens of his wrestlers were sexually abused and harassed, Jim Jordan continues to spew a false narrative that he didn’t know. Additionally, this false narrative downplays and belittles the sexual abuse and harassment that athletes under his watch endured. Even if the naïve were to believe Jim Jordan, one has to ask, why has not a single wrestler coached by Jim Jordan been contacted by Mr. Jordan, simply to ask how they are doing? NOT ONE! Jim Jordan was my childhood hero. I was a Jim Jordan supporter. I thought he had character. He was a family friend and my father donated money to his campaigns. It was an honor for me to receive a law school recommendation from him. However, since his false statements regarding the OSU case, in good conscious, I have to speak up. Jim Jordan has abandoned his former athletes for his own selfish reasons. When he could have told the truth to help the sexual survivors of OSU, Jim Jordan deliberately abandoned us. This is not leadership. If Jim Jordan refuses to help his former wrestlers, guys he recruited and promised their parents that he would take care of them, if Jim Jordan will not come to their aid, what chance will the average person have in getting his help? One of my hardest realizations in dealing with OSU, is the fact that my childhood hero, Jim Jordan turned his back on me and the countless others, who were sexually harassed, assaulted, and raped at OSU. We must all now hold OSU and others like Jim Jordan accountable. In our OSU case, we plan on asking Jim Jordan to be deposed under oath and if necessary, using the Court’s subpoena power to force his deposition. Although Jim Jordan refuses to stand with sexual abuse survivors, Tamie Wilson has taken on our fight for justice. She is a fearless leader, who has not backed down in trying to help us. She has been a strong supporter and advocate. Her ability to LISTEN and HELP is what we need. Additionally, she is working on drafting bills to put before our legislators and the NCAA to prevent current and future sexual abuse. Simply put, Tamie Wilson gets it. **[As you know, in order to get rid of Jim Jordan, we must all come together and do what we can to help Tamie Wilson. I am asking you to stand with Tamie and the OSU Survivors as we seek justice. A contribution of any amount to Tamie’s campaign is a statement for Justice and would make a big impact.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wBNshDOzLJMfORfziRODTfn7ncMYB4tSTxJ6CkbuX-lxPC2VvzH0iJ_IUmDAgr5jp7eg10TWa7sF-XokcG6thm1br5zAgIo7NLfHxibbNd5Ol7ZBaZJQOFFGuVmvZ6WKw4TW1B8RbuLQgNX0PQCKZcwDHnQt9YeBYXBLE0u8WFSA1Ik4NQyi-amkydPhzD22YgtbenPSLRlqBDz2_Z2nhzp3PK3_K4l2x3DfaxKqLmDhFufHVWIE3z0vxqrglZvfIVexe8TsYxrnPKXtPOuBt7ukacsH0xvGRUxnjMHpGw8BAiw5S7IYcuMhZ4QfahfSlv1axzI1k4V2jlSmQBNuYBQJPGL2vtElQg3_1Y2cXwwg/41k/v-yCcYKVSFykHHZRV0Pukg/h1/k5ithZ8ZjM3VnRECpnysB8gg4UnNYeVGnLd-9N7zH8U)**

Also, I am an Attorney representing forty-two (42) Plaintiff/Survivors, which includes my own case, against The Ohio State University in the case entitled Knight et. al. v. The Ohio State University filed in the United States District Court for the Southern District of Ohio. For decades, OSU Doctor Richard Strauss sexually abused hundreds of men, including me. OSU received credible and detailed reports of sexual abuse against its students and athletes that were ignored, swept under the rug, concealed, and covered up. Some reports were even shredded by OSU employees. The reports of sexual abuse were given to coaches, athletic trainers, athletic directors, administrators, etc. A $6.8 million-dollar independent investigation was conducted and confirmed that at least 177 OSU student athletes had been sexually abused and OSU turned a blind eye to said abuse. It has been widely reported that one of the OSU Coaches that received reports of abuse and knew of this abusive environment was Jim Jordan. As the Head Assistant Wrestling Coach, Jim Jordan would have interacted with victims of Strauss’ sexual abuse daily. Like other OSU Coaches, Jim Jordan brushed off most of the reports. Although dozens of his wrestlers were sexually abused and harassed, Jim Jordan continues to spew a false narrative that he didn’t know. Additionally, this false narrative downplays and belittles the sexual abuse and harassment that athletes under his watch endured. Even if the naïve were to believe Jim Jordan, one has to ask, why has not a single wrestler coached by Jim Jordan been contacted by Mr. Jordan, simply to ask how they are doing? NOT ONE! Jim Jordan was my childhood hero. I was a Jim Jordan supporter. I thought he had character. He was a family friend and my father donated money to his campaigns. It was an honor for me to receive a law school recommendation from him. However, since his false statements regarding the OSU case, in good conscious, I have to speak up. Jim Jordan has abandoned his former athletes for his own selfish reasons. When he could have told the truth to help the sexual survivors of OSU, Jim Jordan deliberately abandoned us. This is not leadership. If Jim Jordan refuses to help his former wrestlers, guys he recruited and promised their parents that he would take care of them, if Jim Jordan will not come to their aid, what chance will the average person have in getting his help? One of my hardest realizations in dealing with OSU, is the fact that my childhood hero, Jim Jordan turned his back on me and the countless others, who were sexually harassed, assaulted, and raped at OSU. We must all now hold OSU and others like Jim Jordan accountable. In our OSU case, we plan on asking Jim Jordan to be deposed under oath and if necessary, using the Court’s subpoena power to force his deposition. Although Jim Jordan refuses to stand with sexual abuse survivors, Tamie Wilson has taken on our fight for justice. She is a fearless leader, who has not backed down in trying to help us. She has been a strong supporter and advocate. Her ability to LISTEN and HELP is what we need. Additionally, she is working on drafting bills to put before our legislators and the NCAA to prevent current and future sexual abuse. Simply put, Tamie Wilson gets it. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Donate or I appreciate you being in this fight for justice with us. Thank you for your support. Sincerely, Rocky Ratliff Attorney and OSU Survivor | Tamie for US Mail checks to: 273 Saratoga St, Delaware, Ohio, 43015 | | | Sent via . Friend, My name is Rocky Ratliff, I am a former OSU wrestler and survivor of systemic sexual abuse and assault perpetrated by OSU Doctor Richard Strauss. Also, I am an Attorney representing forty-two (42) Plaintiff/Survivors, which includes my own case, against The Ohio State University in the case entitled _Knight et. al. v. The Ohio State University_ filed in the United States District Court for the Southern District of Ohio. For decades, OSU Doctor Richard Strauss sexually abused hundreds of men, including me. OSU received credible and detailed reports of sexual abuse against its students and athletes that were ignored, swept under the rug, concealed, and covered up. Some reports were even shredded by OSU employees. The reports of sexual abuse were given to coaches, athletic trainers, athletic directors, administrators, etc. A $6.8 million-dollar independent investigation was conducted and confirmed that at least 177 OSU student athletes had been sexually abused and OSU turned a blind eye to said abuse. It has been widely reported that one of the OSU Coaches that received reports of abuse and knew of this abusive environment was **Jim Jordan**. As the Head Assistant Wrestling Coach, Jim Jordan would have interacted with victims of Strauss’ sexual abuse daily. Like other OSU Coaches, Jim Jordan brushed off most of the reports. Although dozens of his wrestlers were sexually abused and harassed, Jim Jordan continues to spew a false narrative that he didn’t know. Additionally, this false narrative downplays and belittles the sexual abuse and harassment that athletes under his watch endured. Even if the naïve were to believe Jim Jordan, one has to ask, why has not a single wrestler coached by Jim Jordan been contacted by Mr. Jordan, simply to ask how they are doing? NOT ONE! Jim Jordan was my childhood hero. I was a Jim Jordan supporter. I thought he had character. He was a family friend and my father donated money to his campaigns. It was an honor for me to receive a law school recommendation from him. However, since his false statements regarding the OSU case, in good conscious, I have to speak up. Jim Jordan has abandoned his former athletes for his own selfish reasons. When he could have told the truth to help the sexual survivors of OSU, Jim Jordan deliberately abandoned us. This is not leadership. If Jim Jordan refuses to help his former wrestlers, guys he recruited and promised their parents that he would take care of them, if Jim Jordan will not come to their aid, what chance will the average person have in getting his help? One of my hardest realizations in dealing with OSU, is the fact that my childhood hero, Jim Jordan turned his back on me and the countless others, who were sexually harassed, assaulted, and raped at OSU. We must all now hold OSU and others like Jim Jordan accountable. In our OSU case, we plan on asking Jim Jordan to be deposed under oath and if necessary, using the Court’s subpoena power to force his deposition. Although Jim Jordan refuses to stand with sexual abuse survivors, Tamie Wilson has taken on our fight for justice. She is a fearless leader, who has not backed down in trying to help us. She has been a strong supporter and advocate. Her ability to LISTEN and HELP is what we need. Additionally, she is working on drafting bills to put before our legislators and the NCAA to prevent current and future sexual abuse. Simply put, Tamie Wilson gets it. **[As you know, in order to get rid of Jim Jordan, we must all come together and do what we can to help Tamie Wilson. I am asking you to stand with Tamie and the OSU Survivors as we seek justice. A contribution of any amount to Tamie’s campaign is a statement for Justice and would make a big impact.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73926713/440068661/1649708063?refcode=rockyNGP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzk3MWE2YzktMDY4Yi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FislBlaJ6IvB2Civ9aUDBnD81UTO1Sy2ivze0n-bG4I=)**

Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. _[If you were forwarded this newsletter, you can sign up to receive the Kernel every week by clicking here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73926902/440069422/1416943042?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODZjODc0OC0wODhiLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DalzGnMzvPq8wIB9OdXWoX_h8QQ1bOoYz0adObbfqGA=&emci=b3e56ec2-c78a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=b86c8748-088b-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=4925535)_ **** _Indiana Democratic Party Holiday Party_ Join the Indiana Democrats as we celebrate the holidays, the successes of 2023, and look ahead to 2024. The Holiday Party will take place at the Skyline Club in downtown Indianapolis on December 15th. [Grab your tickets here to attend! ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73926903/440069423/-2008278695?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODZjODc0OC0wODhiLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DalzGnMzvPq8wIB9OdXWoX_h8QQ1bOoYz0adObbfqGA=) [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73926904/440069424/-2008278695?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODZjODc0OC0wODhiLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DalzGnMzvPq8wIB9OdXWoX_h8QQ1bOoYz0adObbfqGA=) **** _Business Leaders & Hoosier Families Call for Increased Child Care Resources_ The Indiana Chamber outlined its legislative priorities for the 2024 session and among them is increasing access to childcare. Indiana Democrats have been fighting for increased early childhood education resources for years, and we agree with business leaders that this must be a top priority for the legislature. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73926905/440069425/1015863832?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODZjODc0OC0wODhiLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DalzGnMzvPq8wIB9OdXWoX_h8QQ1bOoYz0adObbfqGA=&emci=b3e56ec2-c78a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=b86c8748-088b-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=4925535)**[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73926906/440069426/1015863832?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODZjODc0OC0wODhiLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DalzGnMzvPq8wIB9OdXWoX_h8QQ1bOoYz0adObbfqGA=&emci=b3e56ec2-c78a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=b86c8748-088b-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=4925535) Early childhood education improves outcomes for young children while also making an investment in the Indiana economy. Hoosier families have a right to quality education for their children, and no parent should have to pay more for childcare than rent. ****_Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks._ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73926907/440069427/-688666644?s=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODZjODc0OC0wODhiLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DalzGnMzvPq8wIB9OdXWoX_h8QQ1bOoYz0adObbfqGA=&emci=b3e56ec2-c78a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=b86c8748-088b-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=4925535)**_[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73926908/440069428/-688666644?s=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODZjODc0OC0wODhiLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DalzGnMzvPq8wIB9OdXWoX_h8QQ1bOoYz0adObbfqGA=&emci=b3e56ec2-c78a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=b86c8748-088b-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=4925535)_ Under the leadership of Congressman Frank Mrvan, Northwest Indiana’s economy is on fire. The region has a growing population and real wages have risen almost 6% after inflation. The unemployment rate is incredibly low, and economic forecasts look promising. With Rep. Mrvan’s continued leadership and vision, Indiana’s future is bright. clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. ** Indiana Democratic Party Holiday Party Join the Indiana Democrats as we celebrate the holidays, the successes of 2023, and look ahead to 2024. The Holiday Party will take place at the Skyline Club in downtown Indianapolis on December 15th. = = Business Leaders & Hoosier Families Call for Increased Child Care Resources The Indiana Chamber outlined its legislative priorities for the 2024 session and among them is increasing access to childcare. Indiana Democrats have been fighting for increased early childhood education resources for years, and we agree with business leaders that this must be a top priority for the legislature. Early childhood education improves outcomes for young children while also making an investment in the Indiana economy. Hoosier families have a right to quality education for their children, and no parent should have to pay more for childcare than rent. Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. Under the leadership of Congressman Frank Mrvan, Northwest Indiana’s economy is on fire. The region has a growing population and real wages have risen almost 6% after inflation. The unemployment rate is incredibly low, and economic forecasts look promising. With Rep. Mrvan’s continued leadership and vision, Indiana’s future is bright. ** Become a Delegate to the 2024 State and National Conventions ** Stay up-to-date with the latest news and updates on the 2024 Delegate Selection process. Head to for more information about how to be a part of history next year in Chicago. Get Involved! Opportunities to Volunteer Near You! Municipal campaign season is heating up, and campaigns around the state are needing help! Find an event near you and get involved to help ! Upcoming Candidate Trainings Monday, Dec. 4th: 1 p.m. ET: So You Want to Run For Office. Join the National Democratic Training Committee for a free So You Want to Run for Office session. Learn the necessary steps to run, best practices, and how to get a campaign up and running. Sign Up for Rust Belt Rising's Fall Trainings provides free training and research on best connecting with voters in our region and winning seats. They have helped 101 campaigns win elected office. Join their network of more than a thousand Midwestern Democrats to benefit from virtual training sessions and individual messaging and strategy support. Apply to be a Fall 2023 Rust Belt Rising leader with their course , which features weekly Zoom sessions to hear from elected leaders and strategists who’ve run some of the best recent campaigns in the region for approaches you can bring to your organizing. Help President Biden Get on the Indiana Ballot President Biden and VP Harris need your help to get back on the Indiana ballot in 2024! to receive more information about how to collect signatures and get involved in your area! INDems IN the News IndyStar: WRTV: WPVE: Axios: WRTV: Indiana Capital Chronicle: IndyStar: Indiana Democratic Party Unveils New Website ** The Indiana Democratic Party is excited to announce its newly redesigned ! The site features events, ways to get involved, and all the latest news from the party. To stay up to date with all of the groundbreaking work of the Indiana Democratic Party, be sure to check out our new website at . Stay connected with us as we work to build a better future for all Hoosiers! Democratic Party Holiday Party December 15** Join the Indiana Democrats as we celebrate the holidays and a year filled with success for Democratic Hoosiers. The Holiday Party will take place at the Skyline Club in downtown Indianapolis on December 15th. = ### [content goes here] 101 W Washington St., #1110E Indianapolis, IN 46204 Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

_But despite her hard work,_ Republicans are smearing her DAILY in hopes of sabotaging Democrats’ chances of retaining the White House in 2024.

name: Carmen Goers
subject: Supporting Small Business Saturday in the 8th
body:
Join the Team

| | | | | | | |
---
| | | |
---
| | | **Supporting Small Business Saturday in the 8th****
**
---

Dear Peter,
Our small businesses are the heart of our communities, providing jobs, driving innovation, and preserving our local charm.

That's why I'm writing to you today to encourage you to participate in Small Business Saturday on November 25th.

Small Business Saturday is a day dedicated to supporting local businesses that create jobs, boost the economy, and preserve neighborhoods around the country. By shopping at small businesses in our community, we can help them thrive and grow.

We support small business by having our campaign materials printed here in the district. Can you also stand with us by contributing $25, $50, or $100 to ensure our local economic pillars thrive?

---
| | | |
---
|
Your generous donation will help:

* Advocate for policies that reduce unnecessary regulations on small businesses.
* Support initiatives boosting local commerce and job creation.
* Foster an environment where our small businesses can not only survive but thrive.

---
| [ DONATE TODAY! ](https://vgq.soundestlink.com/link/65611ce3d48dfd5101e263c2/655e4e4c723519d7c30c8c9e/652845d9aa222127cf458b43?signature=fd6638ccff5a5dc6a1975f13efb6fc93ea60670a65fc5ebf39f82efd8326b73a)
---
| | | I hope you'll join me in this effort by shopping at your favorite local businesses and spreading the word to your friends and family.

Together, we can make a difference in the lives of small business owners and their employees. Thank you for your support.

Sincerely,

Carmen Goers

---
|
---
| | | | [](https://vgq.soundestlink.com/link/65611ce3d48dfd5101e263c4/655e4e4c723519d7c30c8c9e/652845d9aa222127cf458b43?signature=fd6638ccff5a5dc6a1975f13efb6fc93ea60670a65fc5ebf39f82efd8326b73a) | [](https://vgq.soundestlink.com/link/65611ce3d48dfd5101e263c6/655e4e4c723519d7c30c8c9e/652845d9aa222127cf458b43?signature=fd6638ccff5a5dc6a1975f13efb6fc93ea60670a65fc5ebf39f82efd8326b73a)

name: =?utf-8?Q?David?=
subject: Urgent Update: ‘Tis the Season - Reflecting on Peace and Our Path Forward
body:
Today, I want to discuss two crucial issues: the national polling on a ceasefire between Israel and Hamas, and the concerning influence of special | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/davidkimforca/urgent-update-tis-the-season-reflecting-on-peace-and-our-path-forward?e=fee98d637f)
---
| | |
---
| | |
# **‘Tis the Season: Reflecting on Peace and Our Path Forward**
Today, I want to discuss two crucial issues: the national polling on a ceasefire between Israel and Hamas, and the concerning influence of special interests in our political system.

**Recent national polls indicate an overwhelming majority of Americans advocate for a ceasefire between Israel and Hamas. More than two-thirds (68%) of Americans support this initiative, reflecting a united desire for peace and stability in the region.**

It's a positive step that my opponent has voiced support for a temporary ceasefire. However, this belated action cannot undo the 11,000 Palestinians who have already been killed. A permanent ceasefire should have been our priority much earlier. Our goal remains clear: to address and ultimately end the Israeli occupation of Palestine and to work towards a free and peaceful Palestine. Recent discussions about further hostage releases and the future of Hamas are crucial, but we must stay focused on the broader objective of lasting peace and justice in the region.The question still remains. Why did it take so long for Congress to call for this action?

The answer lies in how special interests manipulate our political system. Massive financial contributions from these groups have continually swayed politicians, overshadowing the voices of everyday Americans. This is evident in the current situation, where despite public support for a ceasefire, many politicians have not yet advocated for this crucial step towards peace.

My opponent remains silent on the ceasefire, ignoring the calls for peace echoed by progressive leaders like Representatives Bush and Ocasio-Cortez and moderates like Representative Jacobs. Instead, he prioritizes profit over people, bending to the will of special interests that [pad his campaign with tens of thousands of dollars.](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=f448b4c76d&e=fee98d637f)

I will never bow to the whims of special interest, and will never take a dime of their corporate PAC money.

As part of our campaign, we are committed to transparency and integrity, refusing to let special interest money dictate our values and actions. We believe in representing the true will of the people, advocating for policies that reflect the needs and desires of our constituents.

While Congress sits still, you can take action. Call your representatives and demand that they call for a PERMANENT ceasefire now! Visit [https://5calls.org/issue/israel-palestine-gaza-war-hamas-ceasefire/](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=4ff269f344&e=fee98d637f) to see who your legislators are.
---
|
---
| **💥 ENDORSEMENT 💥**
---
|
---
|
---
| Did you hear the news? I have been endorsed by LAUSD President and District 5 Board Member, Jackie Goldberg. Ms. Goldberg’s endorsement is joined by endorsements from LA City Controller Kenneth Mejia, CA Democratic Party Progressive Caucus Chair, Fatima Iqbal-Zubair, Burbank Mayor Konstantine Anthony, Los Angeles City Council District 14 Candidate, Ysabel Jurado, Feel The Bern Democratic Club – Los Angeles, and Our Revolution Los Angeles County.
---
|
---
| | **Stay Connected!**
---
| Your engagement is vital in our journey towards a more equitable and peaceful future. Join us in building a future that values community and seeks to empower everyone in our district.

Donations are another critical way to support our fight. Make a monthly $34 recurring contribution at www.davidkimforca.com/donate, or host a fundraiser/house party for our campaign. Every contribution, big or small, fuels our journey towards change. You can contribute by [volunteering](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=9fab47752e&e=fee98d637f) \- text banking, phone banking, door knocking, or simply spreading the word to friends and neighbors.

To stay updated on our campaign and our fight for a more transparent and just political system, I encourage you to follow us on Instagram: [@DavidKimForCA](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=201f89d4f9&e=fee98d637f). Your support and engagement are vital in our journey towards a more equitable and peaceful future.

Together, we can make a difference. Let's continue to raise our voices for peace and integrity in politics.

**Lastly, Happy Holidays and Happy Indigenous Peoples Heritage Day to you, and your loved ones. May you be safe, healthy and happy this holiday season. **
---
|
---
| [Become a monthly $34 donor today!](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=a7846caa1a&e=fee98d637f "Become a monthly $34 donor today!")
---
|
---
|
---
| | |
---

**Our mailing address is:**
David Kim for Congress - CA34950 Magnolia Ave #20Los Angeles, CA 90006
[Add us to your address book](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/vcard?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=5c460842f7)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/profile?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=5c460842f7&e=fee98d637f&c=e152f95fd1) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=5c460842f7&e=fee98d637f&c=e152f95fd1).

During these dark and divided times for our country, President Trump believes there is ONE powerful message that can UNITE every freedom-loving patriot in the nation...
_**...AMERICA FIRST.**_
No matter our differences, no matter how tough these times are, we are all Americans above anything else, we pledge allegiance to one flag, and we believe _our own_ citizens should be put first.

name: LCV Shop
subject: It's not too late to shop LCV's Black Friday sale!
body:
Help us reach 5,000 comments to overcome corporate polluters.? Tell the EPA:
PROTECT COMMUNITIES FROM CHEMICAL DISASTERS
The EPA is now seeking public input on a new rule to require industrial facilities to disclose the hazardous chemical risks posed by their operations, take stronger actions to prevent accidents, and move quickly should an accident occur.

Corporate polluters have already killed this rule once, when Trump decided to allow these dangerous facilities to operate in secrecy. We cannot allow them to succeed again.

GOAL: 5,000 actions
TAKE ACTION https://links.messages.lcv. ? ?
? Peter ? a critical new rule from Biden's EPA would finally require dangerous industrial facilities to disclose any hazardous chemicals they contain ? and take steps to prevent and mitigate harmful accidents.

This rule will especially protect people living closest to these facilities, which are overwhelmingly low-wealth communities and communities of color, as well as workers. Decades of environmental racism ensured these hazardous facilities were located in the neighborhoods with the least resources to fight back, meaning these frontline communities are disproportionately exposed to chemical accidents and harmful pollutants that have jeopardized their health.

Here's the problem: powerful interests, like the oil and gas industry and the chemical industry, are demanding the EPA once again abandon these important protections. Unless our movement speaks up right now, we may miss out on this opportunity to advance environmental justice and worker safety, and create healthier communities and workplaces.

Please TAKE ACTION right now to protect communities from chemical hazards. To beat the chemical industry, we need to urgently deliver 5,000 comments supporting the EPA's proposed rule. https://links.messages.lcv.

We've already seen the dangers these facilities can pose. In 2013, an explosion of ammonium nitrate fertilizer killed 15 people and destroyed a school, nursing home, and many homes in the city of West, Texas. The Obama administration began a painstaking process to prevent similar disasters, culminating in enhanced protections for minimizing and managing chemical risks.

But after an aggressive campaign from the chemical industry and other corporate polluters, the Trump administration abandoned the rule, choosing to prioritize corporate profits over the health of vulnerable communities and workers.

Under President Biden, the EPA can now reverse this dangerous decision and finally help protect people, especially environmental justice communities, from hazardous pollution and chemical disasters.

Don't let corporate polluters undermine critical environment protections. TAKE ACTION now to help us deliver 5,000 comments supporting environmental justice and corporate accountability. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/8wqzCNDWY~sz/b2tsRXQzby9pTlE1STRzeEwyelBYWEVIYTlQMGJwTmJtRlJjcStyVEdzdm91V3ZReTRpeVF5K2pkSnZvRzEydk1jbGFUcGpYSkpFUUF1Vm1YNnpnV3BtVTFSNS9NN0hYeEJ6Vm5mbFMzNG89S0/WXpab01YMGpnRVQrYlZYa1FaZkhsR0ZiMm1kQnJSaEhZOGJCMVhVdG9xajM1V3V0bVc3Sjl5NHU5SHhQVUtrZDRxaUVvR2RVYmZ0bG9ma0xjMld4TUhkOTZuanIyUFBOS0

Thank you for taking action to protect people and workers from environmental disasters.

Sincerely,

Madeleine Foote
Deputy Legislative Director
League of Conservation Voters ? ? ? ? ? This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=10262183&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg2MDQ1ODcxOQS2&spReportId=MTg2MDQ1ODcxOQS2. Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=10262183&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg2MDQ1ODcxOQS2&spReportId=MTg2MDQ1ODcxOQS2 from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 https://links.messages.lcv. ? ? ? ? https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/2zZrMpw3q_sr/b2tsRXQzby9pTlE1STRzeEwyelBYWEVIYTlQMGJwTmJtRlJjcStyVEdzdm91V3ZReTRpeVF5K2pkSnZvRzEydk1jbGFUcGpYSkpFUUF1Vm1YNnpnV3BtVTFSNS9NN0hYeEJ6Vm5mbFMzNG89S0/

name: Adam Schiff
subject: An ignominious start to the year
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| You deserve a government that works to solve problems. As a candidate for Senate, that’s the message I’m taking on the campaign trail.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4558%2E5257348%2EsdPIcG)
What a difference ten months makes, Derek.
It’s hard to believe that it was just ten months ago today that _then_ -Speaker Kevin McCarthy made the unilateral decision to remove me from the House Intelligence Committee — where I had served as chairman and the ranking Democrat for _years._
After enduring 15 humiliating rounds of votes to elect a House Speaker, _those_ were Kevin’s priorities to set the House agenda for the year to come.
All in an effort to punish me for investigating and impeaching Donald Trump.
We launched this campaign for U.S. Senate two days later (and I _promise_ you, that day happening to fall on Kevin McCarthy’s birthday was _pure coincidence_.)
Matt Gaetz introduced the _PENCIL Act_ to bar me from receiving classified information the same day we launched this campaign.
Their efforts haven’t slowed down — not one iota.
McCarthy told the California Republican Party that I could “never” become California’s Senator.
But their efforts have been all bark, no bite.
As one Republican recently lamented on the House floor, they haven’t had _one_ accomplishment they can take back home to voters, but they _did_ censure me under personal threat from Donald Trump.
All the while, I’ve traveled up and down the state of California, meeting with voters and community leaders, building what will be the biggest grassroots campaign in state history to win this Senate race.
You deserve a government that works to solve problems. As a candidate for Senate, that’s the message I’m taking on the campaign trail.
While too many of my colleagues are focused on political stunts, I’m doing everything I can to make an impact on the issues affecting your life.
And in the Senate, I won’t let a filibuster or other draconian rules that appear nowhere within the Constitution impede the progress we still desperately need to make.
**[So Derek, I hope you can contribute a small amount — $3 or whatever you can spare — to ensure that in this critical election year to come, we have the resources we need to win this race. Because after enduring all of the attacks from the past ten months, we better believe there will be more to come — and we need to be ready.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em.uaqk5d&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231124_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=4&akid=4558%2E5257348%2EsdPIcG)**

---

---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $100](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=nov2023_abs_em.5RW9ow&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231124_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=100&t=9&akid=4558%2E5257348%2EsdPIcG)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em.uaqk5d&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231124_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=10&akid=4558%2E5257348%2EsdPIcG)

I truly appreciate everything you’ve done — and will continue to do — to support our campaign. It wouldn’t be the same without you.
Thank you,
Adam

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
body: [INSIDE JW] Happy Thanksgiving! [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65943&L=30750&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdmlkZW9zL3NwZWNpYWwtdGhhbmtzZ2l2aW5nLXdlZWtseS11cGRhdGUtY2Vuc29yZWQtY29udHJvbGxlZC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=19169954b8c5e317b23021c3c67097cd07dfb087776639d3426a984c9c098e12] There is much to concern us this year but also much to be thankful for, including the brave men and women who volunteer to guard our shares and police our streets. At this Thanksgiving we should recall what life was like for the Pilgrims who arrived on these shores in December of 1620. As the Plimoth Plantation [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65943&L=11088&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucGxpbW90aC5vcmcvbGVhcm4vanVzdC1raWRzL2hvbWV3b3JrLWhlbHAvd2hvLXdlcmUtcGlsZ3JpbXM/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=bd7c5205e374f7719488dbb8bcbba04ccd474b586450c33aaf8821540d9a134a] describes it: Many of the colonists fell ill. They were probably suffering from scurvy and pneumonia caused by a lack of shelter in the cold, wet weather. Although the Pilgrims were not starving, their sea-diet was very high in salt, which weakened their bodies on the long journey and during that first winter. As many as two or three people died each day during their first two months on land. Only 52 people survived the first year in Plymouth. When _Mayflower _left Plymouth on April 5, 1621, she was sailed back to England by only half of her crew. Nevertheless, a year after their arrival they sat down for a feast of thanksgiving. They had befriended and made a treaty of mutual protection with the Pokanoket Wampanoag leader, Ousamequin, also known as Massasoit to the Pilgrims. In the fall of 1621, the colonists marked their first harvest with a three-day celebration. Massasoit and 90 of his men joined the English for feasting and entertainment. In the 1800s this famous celebration became the basis for the story of the First Thanksgiving.It would be easy to focus on the passing difficulties of our time, especially for those of us who fight daily to preserve the God-given liberties that have blessed this land since the time of the Pilgrims. But, as they did, we must pause to reflect on all that is good and on the Source of this goodness. I am particularly fond of a hymn [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65943&L=11089&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9lbi53aWtpcGVkaWEub3JnL3dpa2kvQWRyaWFudXNfVmFsZXJpdXM/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=c6cbf9a4c34a5c61aa16eb967ab50ea8b45b424c3c2157ad64814cfa13e8008d] popularly associated with Thanksgiving Day and often sung at family meals and religious services on this day, having been brought to America by Dutch settlers in New Amsterdam, now New York City. It was written by Adrianus Valerius and is entitled “_Wilt Heden Nu Treden” (“We Gather Together.”)_ We gather together to ask the Lord’s blessing; He chastens and hastens His will to make known. The wicked oppressing now cease from distressing. Sing praises to His Name; He forgets not His own. Beside us to guide us, our God with us joining, Ordaining, maintaining His kingdom divine; So from the beginning the fight we were winning; Thou, Lord, were at our side, all glory be Thine! We all do extol Thee, Thou Leader triumphant, And pray that Thou still our Defender will be. Let Thy congregation escape tribulation; Thy Name be ever praised! O Lord, make us free! All of us at Judicial Watch wish you and yours a most blessed Thanksgiving! clean_body: [INSIDE JW] Happy Thanksgiving! [] There is much to concern us this year but also much to be thankful for, including the brave men and women who volunteer to guard our shares and police our streets. At this Thanksgiving we should recall what life was like for the Pilgrims who arrived on these shores in December of 1620. As the Plimoth Plantation [] describes it: Many of the colonists fell ill. They were probably suffering from scurvy and pneumonia caused by a lack of shelter in the cold, wet weather. Although the Pilgrims were not starving, their sea-diet was very high in salt, which weakened their bodies on the long journey and during that first winter. As many as two or three people died each day during their first two months on land. Only 52 people survived the first year in Plymouth. When Mayflower left Plymouth on April 5, 1621, she was sailed back to England by only half of her crew. Nevertheless, a year after their arrival they sat down for a feast of thanksgiving. They had befriended and made a treaty of mutual protection with the Pokanoket Wampanoag leader, Ousamequin, also known as Massasoit to the Pilgrims. In the fall of 1621, the colonists marked their first harvest with a three-day celebration. Massasoit and 90 of his men joined the English for feasting and entertainment. In the 1800s this famous celebration became the basis for the story of the First Thanksgiving.It would be easy to focus on the passing difficulties of our time, especially for those of us who fight daily to preserve the God-given liberties that have blessed this land since the time of the Pilgrims. But, as they did, we must pause to reflect on all that is good and on the Source of this goodness. I am particularly fond of a hymn [] popularly associated with Thanksgiving Day and often sung at family meals and religious services on this day, having been brought to America by Dutch settlers in New Amsterdam, now New York City. It was written by Adrianus Valerius and is entitled “Wilt Heden Nu Treden” (“We Gather Together.”) We gather together to ask the Lord’s blessing; He chastens and hastens His will to make known. The wicked oppressing now cease from distressing. Sing praises to His Name; He forgets not His own. Beside us to guide us, our God with us joining, Ordaining, maintaining His kingdom divine; So from the beginning the fight we were winning; Thou, Lord, were at our side, all glory be Thine! We all do extol Thee, Thou Leader triumphant, And pray that Thou still our Defender will be. Let Thy congregation escape tribulation; Thy Name be ever praised! O Lord, make us free! All of us at Judicial Watch wish you and yours a most blessed Thanksgiving! I would be remiss if I also did not thank you, Dear Supporter, for you any and all support you’ve given Judicial Watch throughout the year. Of course, your special support now for Judicial Watch’s essential work would be most welcome. body:
We thought it was important to explain just how critical these messages are to ensuring we reelect Joe Biden in 2024. | | |
---
Peter -- We have sent a number of fundraising emails lately. And because we still need your help, we thought it was important to explain just how critical these messages are to ensuring we reelect Joe Biden in 2024. Here we go: As you read this, Republican candidates for president and their allied outside spending groups are spending millions and millions of dollars in swing states across the country attacking President Biden with negative ad after negative ad. If you live in one of those states, you've no doubt seen them -- and their frequency. Obviously, we have to fight back if we’re going to win this race. What you may not know is that the overwhelming majority of the donations to the president's reelection come from lots and lots of people chipping in smaller amounts of money. **And there is no greater source of those donations than emails like this.** So when you see us on the air defending the president; when you see our organizing efforts in communities like yours; when you see our poll numbers rise nationally and in swing states, please know it's the response to emails like this one that make it possible. **We simply couldn't do it without these messages.** **[Please use this link to contribute $25 to President Biden's reelection campaign today. body:
